items.title: EUIPO issues further guidance on Phase 2 of EU design reform - GJE
items.title_zh: 欧盟知识产权局发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段进一步指南
items.title_en: EUIPO Releases Further Guidance on Phase Two of EU Design Reform Implementation
items.summary: Today, the EUIPO released details on the implementation of Phase 2 of its design reform programme, due to come into effect on 1 July 2026.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）今日发布了关于其欧盟外观设计改革计划第二阶段实施的更多细节。该改革阶段预计将于2026年7月1日生效。此次发布为注册外观设计申请人及从业者在即将到来的变革前提供了亟需的指导。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published additional details regarding the implementation of Phase 2 of its design reform programme. These changes are scheduled to enter into force on 1 July 2026. The newly released guidance aims to provide clarity for registered design applicants and legal practitioners ahead of the imminent regulatory updates. This announcement serves as a preparatory resource for stakeholders managing EU design portfolios, offering early insight into procedural adjustments. By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EUIPO seeks to facilitate a smoother transition for rights holders and representatives adapting to the reformed framework.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This update offers early visibility into the operational shifts accompanying the EU design reform. For in-house counsel and external practitioners, reviewing this guidance is essential to align internal processes with upcoming requirements. While specific procedural mechanics may evolve, current materials allow for preliminary assessment of portfolio management impacts. Stakeholders should integrate these timelines into their long-term IP strategy planning to ensure compliance and continuity when the new regime becomes mandatory in mid-2026.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme.", "The revised design regulations and associated procedures are scheduled to take effect on 1 July 2026.", "New guidance provides preparatory clarity for registered design applicants and practitioners before changes occur."]

core_points_en: EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme.
The revised design regulations and associated procedures are scheduled to take effect on 1 July 2026.
New guidance provides preparatory clarity for registered design applicants and practitioners before changes occur.

Practice note: Practitioners should review the guidance to identify procedural adjustments needed for future filings and portfolio administration.
What to monitor: Track subsequent EUIPO communications for detailed operational instructions and transitional measures leading up to the effective date.

items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
items.summary: Par Maître Sandra CABANNE, avocate associée au cabinet SCAN Avocats  Décision du Tribunal judiciaire de Paris du 2 avril 2025, RG n°21/13260 Par un jugement du 2 avril 2025 désormais définitif, le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris s’est prononcé sur la validité et la protection des marques HYDRAFACIAL dans un litige opposant leur titulaire et son […] L’article Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son
items.ai_summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
items.ai_summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its capacity to distinguish commercial origin despite market presence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring similar decisions in the aesthetic medical device sector may reveal evolving thresholds for genericide defenses in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性", "法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护", "法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.", "Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.", "Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法院对商标退化认定持谨慎态度，强调显著性的存续", "未经授权使用的制裁表明执法力度依然严格", "需观察该终审判决是否引发后续上诉或关联诉讼"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.", "Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.", "What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes."]
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
items.summary: Milan LD clarifies when patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift when defendants control key information.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This decision highlights the principle of proximity of evidence, requiring defendants with privileged access to technical data to respond to substantial preliminary evidence provided by patent proprietors.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements against defendant-controlled technical data.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景", "若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配", "法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.", "Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.", "The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["专利文献被认定为公知常识需满足“系列文件呈现连贯技术图景”的严格条件", "证据接近原则在UPC程序中适用，被告控制关键信息时可能面临举证责任倒置", "需持续观察米兰地院后续案件中对“强有力初步证据”认定标准的具体化趋势"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.", "Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution."]
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

items.title: IPO launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局推出知识资产管理枢纽
items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for Research Sector
items.summary: New resource to strengthen IP capability and support commercialisation across the UK research sector.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）宣布推出“知识资产管理枢纽”。该新资源旨在加强英国研究领域的知识产权能力，并支持相关成果的商业化转化。原文仅提供标题与摘要，未披露具体功能细节。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has launched the Knowledge Asset Management Hub, a new resource designed to strengthen intellectual property capability and support commercialisation across the UK research sector. This initiative aims to assist research institutions in managing knowledge assets more effectively. The announcement confirms the availability of this platform but does not provide detailed operational specifics or functional modules in the initial release. Rights holders and research entities operating within the United Kingdom should note this development as part of the broader infrastructure supporting IP management and technology transfer in the region.
items.ai_insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息极简，仅能确认UKIPO启动了面向研究部门的支持项目。需持续观察该枢纽的具体服务内容、适用对象资格及是否提供实质性IP评估或交易辅助工具，以评估其对研发机构的实际效用。
items.ai_insight_en: This launch signals continued UK government focus on bridging the gap between academic research and commercial application through improved IP management tools. For in-house counsel and technology transfer offices, this hub may offer standardized frameworks or guidance. However, given the limited initial information, its practical utility remains to be seen. Stakeholders should assess whether the hub provides actionable tools or merely high-level policy guidance. It represents a potential centralization point for best practices in public sector IP management.

items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
items.title_zh: 指南：知识资产管理枢纽
items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
items.summary: A resource collection to help research institutions and businesses to identify, protect, manage and use their intellectual property and wider knowledge assets.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication reflects an ongoing effort by the UKIPO to facilitate better understanding and handling of intangible assets across various sectors, offering accessible materials for diverse organizational needs.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
items.ai_insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corporate governance frameworks. The guidance supports general best practices for asset identification and protection without imposing new regulatory obligations or changing statutory requirements for IP registration or enforcement procedures in the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集", "资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.", "Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架", "观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.", "Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.", "What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation."]
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, June 1, 2026, Order On Procedural Security, UPC_CFI_998/2026 Et Al
items.title_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院就程序性担保作出裁定
items.title_en: LD Düsseldorf, June 1, 2026, Order On Procedural Security, UPC_CFI_998/2026 Et Al
items.summary: When assessing the requirement for a procedural security, namely the question whether the Claimant has “sufficient means” to compensate the Defendant for the legal costs incurred in the proceedings, only the financial situation of the Claimant should be taken into consideration, but not the financial situation of the holding company behind the Claimant.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年6月1日的裁定中明确，评估原告是否有“足够财力”提供程序性担保以补偿被告法律费用时，仅应考虑原告自身的财务状况，而不考虑其背后控股公司的财务情况。法院驳回了被告依据控股公司股价下跌提出的抗辩，认定原告具备偿付能力。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定明确了UPC诉讼中程序性担保的审查边界，强调主体独立性。企业在应对或发起UPC诉讼时，需注意法院将严格区分诉讼主体与其关联实体的财务责任，控股集团的财务危机不必然导致子公司诉讼资格受限。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["评估程序性担保时，仅考量原告自身财务状况，不包括其控股公司", "控股公司非案件当事人，其财务波动及股价下跌不作为判定原告偿付能力的依据", "法院依据《统一专利法院协议》第69(4)条，旨在保护被告免受无偿付能力原告的诉讼困扰"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["程序性担保审查严格限定于诉讼当事人自身财力，排除控股集团影响", "被告难以通过证明原告母公司财务困境来要求提供高额担保或驳回起诉", "需持续观察UPC上诉法院对此类财务独立性认定的后续判例一致性"]

items.title: EU General Court finds holes in Crocs design right
items.title_zh: 欧盟普通法院裁定Crocs外观设计权无效
items.title_en: EU General Court finds holes in Crocs design right
items.summary: Discover why the Crocs EU design right was found invalid by the EU General Court in our case law summary.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院在2026年4月22日判决中，驳回Crocs上诉，维持欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）此前决定。法院认定Crocs的欧盟外观设计因缺乏独特性而无效，理由是西班牙竞争对手Gor Factory提供的“Holey Soles”在先设计已公开。该在先设计于2003年通过网络公开，早于Crocs设计的优先权日，对知情用户而言两者无显著差异。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案强调网络存档证据在外观设计无效程序中的关键作用。企业应重视在先公开的数字化足迹，即便非正式商业发布，只要能为公众所获知，即可能破坏后续注册设计的独特性。需关注法院对“知情用户”注意力程度的界定标准。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟普通法院确认Crocs欧盟外观设计无效，理由为缺乏独特性", "西班牙公司Gor Factory提出的在先设计“Holey Soles”构成有效现有技术", "在先设计于2003年网络公开，早于Crocs设计2004年的优先权日期"]

items.title: CoA, June 1, 2026, Order On Procedural Security, UPC_CoA_48/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭：中小企业身份不免除诉讼费用担保义务
items.title_en: CoA, June 1, 2026, Order On Procedural Security, UPC_CoA_48/2026
items.summary: The qualification of a party as an SME or the submission of a declaration purporting to establish a party’s SME status pursuant to R. 370.8 RoP is not, in itself, sufficient to dispense with the obligation for said party to provide a security for costs in accordance with R. 158 RoP, if the requirements for the application of that rule are met.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在2026年6月1日的命令中明确，当事人仅凭其中小企业身份或依据程序规则提交的声明，不足以免除其提供诉讼费用担保的义务。若满足相关规则适用条件，中小企业仍须遵守费用担保规定。法院指出，减免诉讼费与费用担保追求不同目标，立法者未对中小企业设置例外属有意为之。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定澄清了统一专利法院程序中中小企业地位与财务担保义务的关系。实务中需注意，即便获得诉讼费减免资格，仍可能面临对方提出的费用担保申请。立法者区分了费用减免与风险担保机制，当事人应分别评估这两类程序要求的合规性与财务影响。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["中小企业身份或相关声明本身不足以免除诉讼费用担保义务", "统一专利法院协议及程序规则未对中小企业设置费用担保例外", "减免诉讼费规则与费用担保规则目标不同且相互独立运作"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["中小企业身份不构成诉讼费用担保的自动豁免理由", "需区分诉讼费减免申请与应对费用担保要求的不同策略", "关注后续案件中法院对费用担保具体金额与条件的裁量标准"]

items.title: LD Paris, May 29, 2026, Decision On The Merits, UPC_CFI_130/2025
items.title_zh: UPC巴黎地院就证据保全专家报告及侵权主张作出实体判决
items.title_en: LD Paris, May 29, 2026, Decision On The Merits, UPC_CFI_130/2025
items.summary: One defendant requested that an expert report submitted to the Judge Rapporteur at the end of seizure measures and the inspection of the defendant’s premises be declared null and void.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院巴黎地方法院在TIRU诉VALINEA等案中作出实体判决。法院驳回被告关于宣告专家报告无效的申请，认定单方程序中专家与申请人接触不损害公正性。法院强调有效性抗辩与侵权主张需一致，原告未能证明被控产品功能隐含于特征中。被告提出的权利滥用抗辩因缺乏证据未被支持，且扣押措施已在上诉中获确认。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC单方证据保全程序中专家独立性的审查标准，即预备性接触不必然导致偏颇。同时警示当事人在有效性挑战与侵权比对中需保持逻辑一致，避免功能定义上的矛盾。权利滥用抗辩虽具合法性，但需确凿证据支持，否则难以动摇已获上诉确认的保全措施。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC对单方程序中专家与申请人接触的宽容态度，降低了证据保全被推翻的风险", "专利功能特征的解释需在无效程序与侵权诉讼中保持严格一致，防止自相矛盾", "以权利滥用为由挑战证据保全需承担高举证责任，单纯损害结果不足以构成滥用"]

items.title: Inventeurs fonctionnaires : la cession d’un brevet ne vaut pas abandon de sa valorisation de R 611-12
items.title_zh: 公务员发明人：专利转让不等于放弃法定报酬权
items.title_en: Inventeurs fonctionnaires : la cession d’un brevet ne vaut pas abandon de sa valorisation de R 611-12
items.summary: Deux décisions importantes relatives aux inventions réalisées par des fonctionnaires et agents publics : l’arrêt de la Cour d’appel de Paris du 27 mars 2024 et celui de la Cour de cassation du 3 juin 2026. L’enseignement La cession d’un brevet à un tiers, lorsqu’elle est faite à titre onéreux en vue de son exploitation, […]
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文指出两起关于公务员及公共代理人职务发明的关键判决：巴黎上诉法院2024年3月27日判决及最高法院2026年6月3日判决。核心教导为：以有偿 exploitation 为目的向第三方转让专利，并不构成对《知识产权法典》R. 611-12条规定的价值评估权利的放弃。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注法国法院对公务员发明人法定报酬权（R. 611-12）的解释边界。实务中应监测该判例是否影响公共机构与发明人之间的薪酬协议结构，以及“有偿转让”在何种具体情形下被认定为未放弃后续估值权利。

items.title: Mickey is free! It may not be as free, though…
items.title_zh: 米奇自由了？但未必真的自由……
items.title_en: Mickey is free! It may not be as free, though…
items.summary: On 21 May, the First Board of Appeal (BoA) of the EUIPO delivered a decision, concerning whether the sign “MICKEY IS FREE!” creates a likelihood of confusion with Disney’s figurative MICKEY mark and thus should be refused registration under Article 8(1)(b) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation (EUTMR). BackgroundIn August 2024, Karl Erik Dahl (applicant) filed an application to register “MICKEY IS FREE
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局第一上诉委员会于5月21日作出裁决，审查标志“MICKEY IS FREE!”是否与迪士尼的图形米奇商标产生混淆可能性，从而依据《欧盟商标条例》第8(1)(b)条拒绝注册。申请人Karl Erik Dahl于2024年8月提交该注册申请。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了即使包含公共领域元素或描述性词汇，若整体视觉效果与知名商标近似，仍可能因混淆风险被拒。需关注上诉委员会对包含知名角色名称的描述性短语的显著性及混淆认定标准。

items.title: LD Lisbon, May 26, 2026, Order On Applications Under R. 360 And 361 RoP, UPC_CFI_850/2026
items.title_zh: UPC里斯本地方法院关于R.360及R.361程序规则申请的裁定
items.title_en: LD Lisbon, May 26, 2026, Order On Applications Under R. 360 And 361 RoP, UPC_CFI_850/2026
items.summary: [6] Pursuant to R. 360 RoP, if the Court finds that an action has become devoid of purpose and that there is no longer any need to adjudicate on it, it may at any time, on the application of a party or of its own motion, after giving the parties an opportunity to be heard, dispose of the action by way of order.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC里斯本地方法院在爱立信与传音案件中裁定，依据《程序规则》第360条驳回终止诉讼申请。法院指出，该条款仅适用于起诉后发生致使诉讼失去目的的事件。被告援引的早期FRAND许可诉讼不构成此情形，且原告仍具法律利益，故诉讼未失去目的，需继续审理。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定明确了UPC在处理并行FRAND诉讼时，对“诉讼失去目的”的严格解释标准。实务中需注意，仅存在另一相关许可诉讼并不自动导致当前侵权或有效性诉讼终止，原告的法律利益仍是核心判断依据，当事人应据此管理多地诉讼策略。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确R.360条适用门槛：必须是起诉后发生的新事件，既判力或早期诉讼不自动触发", "确立利益评估基准：以原告方是否仍从胜诉中获益为判断核心，而非被告意愿", "后续需关注UPC上诉法院对此类并行FRAND诉讼程序中止或终止申请的进一步判例倾向"]

items.title: CoA, June 2, 2026, Appeal Judgment In Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CoA_312/2025 Et Al
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院确认对 domiciled 被告的长臂管辖权
items.title_en: CoA, June 2, 2026, Appeal Judgment In Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CoA_312/2025 Et Al
items.summary: [5] Art. 34 UPCA states that “Decisions of the Court shall cover, in the case of a European patent, the territory of those Contracting Member States for which the European patent has eﬀect”. It is not meant to conﬁne the UPC’s jurisdiction to its own territory. Art. 34 UPCA clariﬁes that as a rule – unless a more limited scope is requested (cf Art. 43, 76 UPCA) – decisions of the UPC shall cover the territory of all Contracting Member States where a European patent has eﬀect.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在判决中确认，依据《布鲁塞尔条例I bis》第4条，若被告住所位于UPC缔约成员国，法院拥有长臂管辖权且不得拒绝。判决援引CJEU先例，明确UPC决定通常覆盖所有生效的缔约国领土，除非请求限制范围。法院强调UPCA未将管辖权限于其领土内，并指出行使国际管辖权时需适用礼让等国际法原则。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在被告位于缔约国时的强制管辖义务及裁决的地域覆盖范围，强化了UPC作为泛欧专利诉讼平台的地位。实务中需关注法院如何具体适用“礼让”原则处理涉及非缔约国的复杂管辖冲突，以及这对跨国专利布局策略的影响。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院确认对住所位于缔约国的被告拥有长臂管辖权，且不得以非成员国法院更合适为由…", "依据UPCA第34条，UPC决定通常覆盖欧洲专利生效的所有缔约成员国领土，除非当事人请…", "法院行使国际管辖权时，需适用包括礼让在内的国际法原则，且该管辖权基础不违反TRIPS协定"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["确认UPC对缔约国被告的管辖权具有强制性，限制了法院自由裁量权，增加了在UPC应诉的可…", "明确UPC判决默认覆盖所有生效缔约国，提升了单一诉讼的效率，但也扩大了潜在禁令风险范围", "需持续观察UPC在具体案件中如何平衡国际法原则与欧盟法规，特别是在涉及非缔约国因素时的…"]

items.title: UPC finds infringement of two motorcycle tyres patents following international exhibition | EIP
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院裁定两起摩托车轮胎专利侵权案成立
items.title_en: UPC Milan Finds Infringement of Two Motorcycle Tyre Patents After Exhibition Seizures
items.summary: These Decisions from the Local Division of the Unified Patent Court in Milan relate to EP2519412 and EP3519207. The Applicant, Pirelli Tyre S.P.A. ("Pirelli") brought two separate infringement actions following respective seizure orders against Tianjin Kingtyre Group Co., Ltd ("Kingtyre") and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber Co., Ltd. ("SYR"), in view of the exhibition of allegedly infringing products by the defendants at the "International Motorcycle Exhibition" ("EICMA") between 5 and 10 November 2024.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院就倍耐力起诉天津金宇集团和四川远星橡胶侵犯其EP2519412和EP3519207号专利作出判决。针对四川远星提出的无效反诉被驳回并认定侵权；天津金宇因未提交答辩状，法院作出缺席判决认定侵权。此前倍耐力已与部分共同被告达成和解。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division in Milan ruled that Tianjin Kingtyre Group and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber infringed Pirelli’s unitary patents EP2519412 and EP3519207. The actions followed seizure orders executed after the defendants exhibited allegedly infringing products at the 2024 EICMA motorcycle exhibition. The Court rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s counterclaim for revocation of EP3519207 and confirmed infringement. Conversely, Tianjin Kingtyre failed to file a statement of defence, resulting in a default judgment for infringement of EP2519412 under Rules 355.1(a) and 355.3 RoP. Prior to these judgments, Pirelli had settled with certain co-defendants, including Kingtyre DE and the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade Automotive Sub-Council.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: These judgments illustrate the UPC’s procedural efficiency in handling exhibition-based evidence and default scenarios. Rights holders can leverage seizure orders from trade fairs to secure swift infringement findings when defendants do not engage. For practitioners, the cases highlight the critical importance of timely defensive filings to avoid default judgments and the high threshold for successfully challenging patent validity via counterclaims in parallel infringement proceedings.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207.", "Tianjin Kingtyre received a default judgment for infringing EP2519412 after failing to file a defence.", "Infringement proceedings originated from seizure orders targeting products displayed at the November 2024 EICMA exhibition."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["统一专利法院对未应诉被告迅速作出缺席判决，凸显程序合规的重要性", "无效反诉未能阻止侵权认定，表明法院对专利稳定性及侵权事实的独立审查倾向", "需观察此类基于展会取证的案件在统一专利法院体系下的后续执行与赔偿标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringement judgments if defences ar…", "Practice note: Default judgments under Rule 355 RoP provide a streamlined path for rights holders when defendants fail to participate, emphasizing the need for rigorous service an…", "What to monitor: Observe how the UPC balances provisional measures obtained at exhibitions with subsequent main proceedings, particularly regarding the standard of proof required…"]

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal Reverses Fujifilm v Kodak Infringement | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院推翻富士胶片诉柯达侵权认定
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Reverses Fujifilm v Kodak Infringement | EIP
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal reverses Mannheim's Fujifilm v Kodak infringement findings for Germany and the UK, upholds patent validity, and clarifies non-EU jurisdiction.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院推翻曼海姆地方法院关于德国和英国的侵权认定，但维持专利有效性。法院澄清了UPC对英国等非欧盟国家的管辖权行使规则。在德国部分，上诉法院认定先用权抗辩成立，即便专利权利要求经无条件修改缩小范围，只要先用行为落入授权时权利要求范围且修改未带来新教导，先用权仍延伸至修改后范围。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC框架下先用权抗辩在专利修改后的存续条件，即修改若无新教导则不阻断先用权。同时，判决厘清了UPC对非欧盟成员国的管辖边界，对跨国专利诉讼策略具有程序性参考意义，需关注后续类似案件的管辖权援引情况。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院推翻曼海姆分院对德、英两地的侵权认定，但维持涉案专利有效性", "法院确立先用权抗辩标准：若先用行为落入授权权利要求范围，后续缩小修改不消灭该权利", "UPC上诉法院就针对英国等非欧盟国家行使管辖权提供了详细法律指引"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["先用权抗辩在专利权利要求缩小修改后仍可能有效，关键在于修改是否引入新教导", "UPC对非欧盟国家（如英国）的管辖权行使规则得到进一步司法澄清", "需观察后续案件中当事人如何依据此判例构建先用权证据链及管辖权异议"]

items.title: Emotional Perception – the story continues - GJE
items.title_zh: GJE：Emotional Perception 案后 UKIPO 再发审查报告，英国软件专利性口径继续演化
items.title_en: UKIPO Issues New Examination Report Following Emotional Perception Supreme Court Decision
items.summary: Last week the UKIPO issued its latest examination report in the long-running Emotional Perception case.
items.ai_summary_zh: GJE 文章称，UKIPO 在长期受到关注的 Emotional Perception 案中发布了最新审查报告。文章回顾，英国最高法院 2026 年 2 月的判决放弃了沿用约 20 年的 Aerotel 方法，并使英国对计算机程序排除可专利性的分析更接近 EPO 的“any hardware”路径。最新审查报告显示，该案在最高法院判决后仍会继续影响英国软件、AI 和计算机实现发明的审查实践。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued its latest examination report in the long-running Emotional Perception case. This development follows the UK Supreme Court’s February decision, which abandoned the twenty-year-old Aerotel approach for assessing computer program patentability exclusions. By discarding this precedent, the Court aligned the UK framework with the European Patent Office’s “any hardware” approach. The new report indicates how examiners are applying these revised standards to pending applications. This marks a significant shift in UK practice, moving away from established domestic tests toward greater convergence with EPO methodology for software and AI-related inventions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这条动态对在英国和欧洲同步布局软件、AI 或计算机实现发明的申请人有直接参考价值。短期内，申请策略需要同时跟踪 UKIPO 审查报告、英国法院后续处理和 EPO 实务，以避免英国说明书与权利要求写法落后于新口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This update confirms the practical implementation of the Supreme Court’s shift toward EPO-aligned patentability standards. Rights holders should note that UK examination practice now diverges significantly from historical precedents. Portfolio managers must ensure that claim drafting and technical contribution arguments reflect the “any hardware” test rather than the former Aerotel framework. Monitoring ongoing UKIPO reports is essential to understand how broadly or narrowly examiners interpret this new alignment in complex AI and software cases.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 在 Emotional Perception 案后发布新的审查报告。", "英国最高法院此前放弃 Aerotel 方法，并向 EPO 的 any hardware 路径靠拢。", "该案继续影响英国对软件和 AI 相关发明可专利性的判断。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO issued a new examination report in the Emotional Perception case following recent Supreme Court rulings.", "The Supreme Court abandoned the Aerotel approach, aligning UK patentability tests with the EPO any hardware method.", "The updated report demonstrates how examiners apply the new standards to computer-implemented inventions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["英国软件专利性测试正在经历实质性重构。", "UKIPO 审查报告将影响申请撰写和审查答复策略。", "跨英国和 EPO 的申请组合需要重新校准技术贡献表述。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: UK patentability assessment for software and AI now aligns with EPO standards, requiring updated portfolio strategies.", "Practice note: Drafting and prosecution arguments must pivot from Aerotel precedents to the adopted any hardware approach.", "What to monitor: Subsequent UKIPO examination reports and guidance to clarify the scope of the new patentability test."]
core_points_en: UKIPO issued a new examination report in the Emotional Perception case following recent Supreme Court rulings.
The Supreme Court abandoned the Aerotel approach, aligning UK patentability tests with the EPO any hardware method.
The updated report demonstrates how examiners apply the new standards to computer-implemented inventions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: UK patentability assessment for software and AI now aligns with EPO standards, requiring updated portfolio strategies.
Practice note: Drafting and prosecution arguments must pivot from Aerotel precedents to the adopted any hardware approach.
What to monitor: Subsequent UKIPO examination reports and guidance to clarify the scope of the new patentability test.

items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭就长臂管辖权提供关键指引
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal provides crucial guidance on long-arm jurisdiction in landmark decision
items.summary: Kodak v Fujifilm overturns Unified Patent Court’s first UK injunction; gives detailed guidance on how long-arm jurisdiction should be exercised
items.ai_summary_zh: 在柯达诉富士胶片案中，统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭推翻了UPC发出的首个针对英国的禁令。该裁决就如何行使长臂管辖权提供了详细指引，是确立UPC跨境执法边界的关键判例。

items.title: New referral on claim interpretation and relevance of G1/24 to added matter confirmed (G1/26)
items.title_zh: IPKat：G 1/26 转介获确认，EPO 将审视 G 1/24 对新增内容判断的影响
items.title_en: EPO Board Refers Questions on G1/24 and Added Matter in New Case G1/26
items.summary: We now have confirmation of a new referral to the EBA on claim interpretation (G1/26). As previously hinted, The Board of Appeal in T 0873/24 has decided to refer questions on the application of G1/24 to the assessment of added matter. Following the decision of the EBA that the description should always be “consulted” for claim interpretation, the Boards of Appeal have struggled to find a uniform
items.ai_summary_zh: IPKat 报道称，EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 0873/24 中确认向扩大上诉委员会提出新的转介 G 1/26。该转介聚焦权利要求解释问题，并进一步追问 G 1/24 关于解释权利要求时应始终参考说明书的做法，是否以及如何影响新增内容审查。文章指出，G 1/24 之后，各上诉委员会在这一问题上尚未形成统一路径。
items.ai_summary_en: The EPO Board of Appeal in case T 0873/24 has referred new questions to the Enlarged Board of Appeal, designated as G1/26. This referral addresses the application of the recent G1/24 decision regarding claim interpretation to the assessment of added matter under Article 123(2) EPC. Following G1/24, which mandated that the description must always be consulted for interpreting claims, Boards of Appeal have reportedly struggled to establish a uniform approach. This new referral seeks to clarify how this interpretive principle interacts with the prohibition on adding subject-matter, aiming to resolve current inconsistencies in case law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这是一条对欧洲专利撰写、修改和异议策略都很重要的程序信号。如果 G 1/26 进一步强化说明书在权利要求解释中的作用，申请人在撰写说明书、处理中间概括和答复新增内容异议时都需要更谨慎地控制定义、实施例和技术效果之间的对应关系。
items.ai_insight_en: This referral highlights ongoing uncertainty in EPO practice following G1/24. Rights holders should note that the interaction between mandatory description consultation and added matter scrutiny remains unsettled. Until G1/26 provides clarity, practitioners may encounter divergent approaches across different Boards. Monitoring this referral is essential for understanding future examination and opposition standards, particularly regarding how description-based interpretation influences the admissibility of claim amendments.

Referral examines how G1/24 claim interpretation rules impact added matter assessments.
Boards of Appeal currently lack uniform practice applying G1/24 to added matter.

items.title: Europe’s next copyright reform moves a step closer to reality: what can we tell from the twin Commission consultations?
items.title_zh: Kluwer：欧盟版权改革进入新阶段，委员会双重咨询勾勒未来议题
items.title_en: EU Copyright Reform Advances via Twin Commission Consultations on CDSM Review
items.summary: With the launch of twin official consultations, we have entered into a new phase in the development of the EU’s future approach to copyright. Despite the Copyright in the Digital Single Market (CDSM) Directive allowing the Commission to delay a review indefinitely (‘no earlier than June 2026’), it has moved promptly to launch this process. In the absence of principles-based provisions such as fair use in EU law, this readiness to review is essential to keep up with changing patterns of productio
items.ai_summary_zh: Kluwer Copyright Blog 分析欧盟委员会围绕版权政策启动的两项咨询，认为这标志着欧盟未来版权改革进入新阶段。文章指出，虽然《数字单一市场版权指令》允许委员会不早于 2026 年 6 月才进行审查，但委员会已迅速启动相关程序。咨询材料显示，未来改革可能以“增强欧洲创造力和创新版权环境”的定向倡议形式推进，关注 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究等议题。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Commission has launched twin consultations to review the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, moving promptly despite provisions allowing delay until June 2026. This initiative signals a new phase in EU copyright policy, aiming to address evolving production and usage patterns without adopting broad fair use principles. The process includes an implementation survey and a Call for Evidence targeting specific issues such as artificial intelligence, sports event piracy, performer remuneration, and research exceptions. While the consultations primarily gather information rather than disclose final legislative intent, they frame the potential scope of future targeted reforms designed to enhance the copyright environment for creativity and innovation within the Union.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这条信号说明欧盟版权政策已从 AI 单点争议扩展到更广的制度校准。内容平台、权利人、研究机构和 AI 服务商都应关注咨询问题如何转化为立法文本，尤其是训练数据、授权透明度、体育转播保护和跨境报酬规则。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders and technology companies should note the Commission’s preference for targeted amendments over comprehensive copyright overhaul. The inclusion of AI and sports piracy indicates priority areas for regulatory adjustment. Stakeholders must engage with the Call for Evidence to shape upcoming legislative proposals, particularly regarding data training and cross-border remuneration mechanisms.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟委员会启动两项版权相关咨询，开启 CDSM 指令后续审查进程。", "潜在改革被描述为定向倡议，而非全面重写欧盟版权体系。", "咨询议题包括 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究使用。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Commission launches twin consultations to review CDSM Directive implementation and future reform needs.", "Reform approach remains targeted, addressing AI, sports piracy, performer pay, and research issues.", "Consultations prioritize data gathering, with clear legislative directions expected later this year or next."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟版权改革可能采取多议题、定向修补方式。", "AI 与版权的关系仍是核心，但不是唯一政策对象。", "企业应尽早准备咨询回应和政策影响评估。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies in AI, sports media, and content licensing face potential regulatory changes affecting data usage and revenue distribution models.", "Practice note: Legal teams should prepare evidence-based responses to the Call for Evidence, focusing on practical impacts of current CDSM Directive provisions.", "What to monitor: Track how consultation feedback influences the provisional ‘Directive enhancing the copyright environment’ and subsequent legislative drafts."]
core_points_en: Commission launches twin consultations to review CDSM Directive implementation and future reform needs.
Reform approach remains targeted, addressing AI, sports piracy, performer pay, and research issues.
Consultations prioritize data gathering, with clear legislative directions expected later this year or next.

Practice note: Legal teams should prepare evidence-based responses to the Call for Evidence, focusing on practical impacts of current CDSM Directive provisions.
What to monitor: Track how consultation feedback influences the provisional ‘Directive enhancing the copyright environment’ and subsequent legislative drafts.

items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
items.title_zh: Mondaq：UPC 专利调解与仲裁中心正式开放，或为 FRAND 和欧洲专利争议提供 ADR 路径
items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
items.summary: Patent holders of European patents and supplementary protection certificates now have a new option for dispute resolution in patent matters: On June 2, 2026, the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, formally opened. Three years after the successful launch of the Unified Patent Court (UPC), the PMAC is added to its framework.
items.ai_summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
items.ai_summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters, extending beyond strict UPC litigation scope.
items.ai_insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
items.ai_insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court proceedings and the enforceability of its outcomes across jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。", "其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。", "PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.", "Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.", "New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。", "FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。", "合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.", "Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.", "What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings."]
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
items.title_zh: 超越资格认证：新任商标律师的执业导航
items.title_en: CITMA Guidance on Transitioning from Qualification to Practice for New Trade Mark Attorneys
items.summary: You’ve studied hard and passed the exams; now it's time to embark on your career as a trade mark attorney. It’s a big transition and not always an easy one.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance also covers practical aspects of career development, such as managing supervisory responsibilities, networking, and maintaining personal wellbeing during this significant professional adjustment.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
items.ai_insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. Understanding the broader economic context of client instructions is presented as a critical competency for early-career development and long-term professional success.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持", "避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问", "良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉"]

items.title: Google must give publishers opt-out choice from AI-driven search results
items.title_zh: 英国监管要求 Google 为 AI 驱动搜索结果提供出版商退出选项
items.title_en: UK CMA Requires Google to Offer Publishers Opt-Out from AI Search Results
items.summary: The UK’s Competition and Markets Authority imposes a new requirement on Google that will help “secure a fairer deal for publishers and consumers”.
items.ai_summary_zh: World IP Review 报道称，英国竞争与市场管理局对 Google 提出新要求，要求其为出版商提供退出 AI 驱动搜索结果使用的选项。该措施被描述为有助于为出版商和消费者争取更公平的交易条件，反映出生成式 AI 搜索与新闻、出版内容之间的许可和平台治理争议正在进入更具体的监管阶段。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Competition and Markets Authority has imposed a new requirement on Google, mandating that the tech giant provide publishers with an opt-out choice for their content in AI-driven search results. The regulator stated that this measure aims to secure a fairer deal for both publishers and consumers. This development marks a specific regulatory intervention in the ongoing debate regarding the use of published content within generative AI search tools, shifting the focus from general principles to actionable compliance obligations for major platforms operating in the United Kingdom.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这条动态虽然带有竞争监管色彩，但对版权许可和数字出版分发都很关键。若退出机制落地，平台、出版商与权利人之间关于抓取、摘要、展示和训练用途的谈判空间可能重新调整，英国也可能成为观察欧洲内容治理与 AI 搜索规则的先行样本。
items.ai_insight_en: This regulatory move highlights the increasing intersection of competition law and copyright management in the AI sector. For rights holders, it establishes a formal mechanism to control content inclusion in AI outputs. European and US practitioners should note the UK's approach as a potential model for future content governance, particularly where licensing frameworks remain unsettled. The requirement emphasizes transparency and choice, potentially influencing how platforms negotiate with media entities globally.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国 CMA 要求 Google 为出版商提供退出 AI 搜索结果使用的选项。", "监管目标之一是改善出版商与消费者所处的交易环境。", "该动态把 AI 搜索与内容使用争议进一步推向具体治理措施。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK CMA imposes a new obligation on Google regarding AI search results.", "Publishers must be given a clear option to opt out of AI usage.", "The measure aims to ensure fairer outcomes for publishers and consumers."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["AI 搜索治理正在从原则讨论走向可操作的选择机制。", "出版商需要同步评估流量、许可和品牌曝光之间的取舍。", "英国监管路径可能影响欧洲更广泛的内容与 AI 平台政策。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Publishers gain a regulatory-backed lever to control content presence in AI search features.", "Practice note: Rights holders should review current platform terms to align with the new opt-out mechanism.", "What to monitor: Implementation details of the opt-out process and potential ripple effects in other jurisdictions."]
core_points_en: The UK CMA imposes a new obligation on Google regarding AI search results.
Publishers must be given a clear option to opt out of AI usage.
The measure aims to ensure fairer outcomes for publishers and consumers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Publishers gain a regulatory-backed lever to control content presence in AI search features.
Practice note: Rights holders should review current platform terms to align with the new opt-out mechanism.
What to monitor: Implementation details of the opt-out process and potential ripple effects in other jurisdictions.

items.title: CoA, May 22, 2026, Order Concerning An Application Pursuant To R. 262A RoP, UPC_CoA_61/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭就R.262A程序申请作出命令
items.title_en: CoA, May 22, 2026, Order Concerning An Application Pursuant To R. 262A RoP, UPC_CoA_61/2026
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal addresses a procedural application under Rule 262A of the Rules of Procedure in a patent dispute between SharkNinja Operating LLC and multiple Groupe SEB entities concerning European Patent EP 3 689 198.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在SharkNinja与Groupe SEB关于EP 3 689 198号专利的纠纷中，处理了依据《程序规则》第262A条提出的程序申请。裁定指出，仅在内管系统点击“签署”不符合电子签名要求，但因缺乏先例，该错误可原谅并批准延期。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC程序中对电子签名形式要件的严格解释，同时确立了在缺乏明确判例时的宽容原则。实务中需确保文件签署符合规则4.1的形式要求，但也可关注法院对程序性错误的裁量空间。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["程序文件须具电子签名，仅在内管系统点击签署不足以保证真实性", "即使期限届满，法院仍可签发延期令；逾期申请延期亦可获准", "因缺乏关于内管系统签署效力的先例，当事人错误被视为可原谅"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["需严格遵循程序规则关于电子签名的形式要件，避免仅依赖系统操作", "关注上诉庭在缺乏先例情况下对程序性错误的宽容态度及适用条件", "后续观察法院对类似程序瑕疵是否继续适用可原谅错误的认定标准"]

items.title: New questions referred to the EPO Enlarged Board of Appeal – G 1/26 - GJE
items.title_zh: EPO 向扩大上诉委员会提交 G 1/26：聚焦权利要求解释与新增内容审查
items.title_en: EPO Enlarged Board Referral G 1/26 Addresses Claim Interpretation and Added Matter
items.summary: New questions have been referred to the European Patent Office's Enlarged Board of Appeal today under G 1/26 (“Coated steel strips”)
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会于 2026 年 6 月 3 日宣布，技术上诉委员会 3.3.05 已在 T 873/24 案中将问题提交扩大上诉委员会，案号为 G 1/26“Coated steel strips”。转介问题涵盖三个层面：在《欧洲专利公约》第 112(1) 条下何谓“需要”作出决定；在评估可专利性时，说明书和附图中的特征能否被读入已授权权利要求的含义；以及在审查第 123(2) 条新增内容合规性时，应如何处理仅基于权利要求文字或结合整份专利说明书得出的不同技术解释。
items.ai_summary_en: The Technical Board of Appeal in case T 873/24 has referred new questions to the EPO Enlarged Board of Appeal under reference G 1/26, concerning coated steel strips. While initial expectations suggested a narrow focus on claim interpretation regarding added subject matter, the scope appears broader. This referral follows the significant Enlarged Board Decision G 1/24, which addressed whether descriptions and drawings should inform claim interpretation during patentability assessments. The new questions likely examine the interplay between claim construction and compliance with Article 123(2) EPC, potentially clarifying how technical features from the description influence the assessment of unallowable extensions beyond the original application content.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该转介是 G 1/24 之后 EPO 在权利要求解释问题上的又一关键节点，可能同时影响授权程序、异议程序和上诉阶段对“说明书是否限缩权利要求”以及“新增内容如何对应不同解释”的处理方式。申请人和专利权人应更谨慎地管理说明书表述、备选定义和修改依据，因为这些内容未来可能更直接影响可专利性和有效性判断。
items.ai_insight_en: This referral signals continued judicial refinement of claim interpretation standards at the EPO. Following G 1/24, practitioners must anticipate further guidance on how descriptive elements affect both patentability and added matter objections. Rights holders should review portfolio consistency, as evolving interpretive rules may impact validity challenges and prosecution strategies across European jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["G 1/26 源自技术上诉委员会 3.3.05 在 T 873/24 中作出的转介。", "问题直接涉及授权后权利要求解释时说明书和附图的作用。", "转介还将第 123(2) 条新增内容判断与权利要求解释方法联系起来。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Technical Board T 873/24 refers new questions to the Enlarged Board of Appeal as G 1/26.", "Referral scope exceeds initial expectations, addressing claim interpretation beyond just added subject matter issues.", "Builds on G 1/24 by linking description-based claim interpretation to Article 123(2) EPC compliance."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["EPO 对权利要求解释与说明书关系的口径可能进一步统一。", "新增内容抗辩与解释争议之间的联动将更受关注。", "专利撰写和修改记录的精确性会变得更重要。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Outcomes may alter validity risks for existing patents where claims rely heavily on descriptive support.", "Practice note: Drafting teams should ensure clear alignment between claims and original disclosure to mitigate added matter risks.", "What to monitor: Track G 1/26 proceedings for shifts in how the EPO balances literal claim terms against contextual description."]
core_points_en: Technical Board T 873/24 refers new questions to the Enlarged Board of Appeal as G 1/26.
Referral scope exceeds initial expectations, addressing claim interpretation beyond just added subject matter issues.
Builds on G 1/24 by linking description-based claim interpretation to Article 123(2) EPC compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Outcomes may alter validity risks for existing patents where claims rely heavily on descriptive support.
Practice note: Drafting teams should ensure clear alignment between claims and original disclosure to mitigate added matter risks.
What to monitor: Track G 1/26 proceedings for shifts in how the EPO balances literal claim terms against contextual description.

items.title: Kodak and Freshfields turn long-arm jurisdiction case against FujiFilm around
items.title_zh: 柯达在富士胶片长臂管辖案中胜诉
items.title_en: Kodak and Freshfields turn long-arm jurisdiction case against FujiFilm around
items.summary: Kodak does not infringe FujiFilm’s EP 3 511 174 and can therefore continue to manufacture and sell its planographic and lithographic printing plates in Germany and the UK. This is the decision of the second panel of the Court of Appeal (case IDs: UPC_CoA_312/2025, UPC_CoA_880/2025, UPC_CoA_333/2025, UPC_CoA_882/2025). The judges around presiding judge Rian Kalden set […] The post Kodak and Freshfields turn long-arm jurisdiction case against FujiFilm around appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院第二合议庭裁定，柯达未侵犯富士胶片的EP 3 511 174号专利。因此，柯达可在德国和英国继续制造和销售其平版及石印印刷版。该判决涉及多个上诉案件编号，由Rian Kalden法官主持审理，扭转了此前的长臂管辖争议局面。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了UPC上诉法院在跨境专利侵权认定中的关键作用。需关注UPC对“长臂管辖”原则在专利侵权语境下的具体适用边界，以及该判决对后续类似跨国制造销售行为的先例影响。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院裁定柯达未侵犯富士胶片EP 3 511 174号欧洲专利", "柯达获准在德国和英国继续制造及销售相关平版和石印印刷版", "该案由Rian Kalden法官主持的UPC上诉法院第二合议庭作出判决"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院对欧洲专利侵权认定的终局性影响日益显著", "需观察UPC如何处理涉及多国市场的长臂管辖权异议", "关注该判决对印刷行业专利自由实施（FTO）评估的参考意义"]

items.title: Rapid Reaction: UPC Court of Appeal clarifies the approach to long-arm claims (Fujifilm v Kodak)
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院在 Fujifilm v Kodak 中澄清长臂管辖：受理不等于行使
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Long-Arm Jurisdiction in Fujifilm v Kodak
items.summary: Accepting jurisdiction is one question; exercising it is another. The UPC Court of Appeal’s 2 June 2026 decision in Fujifilm v Kodak1 provides extensive...
items.ai_summary_zh: 根据 Bristows 对 2026 年 6 月 2 日 Fujifilm v Kodak 上诉裁决的分析，UPC 上诉法院明确，《统一专利法院协定》第 34 条并不把 UPC 的权限限制在 UPC 成员国 territory 内。法院认为，在被告住所位于 UPC 缔约成员国时，可依据《布鲁塞尔 I bis 条例》第 4 条接受管辖；但在行使该管辖权时，需要区分受理与实体救济，并结合无效抗辩、国际礼让和国家法院潜在有效性裁判来管理非 UPC 地域的 EP 指定国侵权请求。该裁决还推翻了涉及英国和德国的禁令，但并非因为法院缺乏管辖权。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal’s 2 June 2026 decision in Fujifilm v Kodak clarifies the approach to long-arm claims based on national designations of European patents in non-UPC territories. The Court confirmed that Article 34 UPCA does not confine competence to UPC member states, distinguishing between accepting jurisdiction and exercising it. Relying on the Brussels I bis framework, the Court held that the UPC has jurisdiction where a national court would. While overturning injunctions in the UK and Germany, the ruling was not based on lack of jurisdiction. The decision establishes a structured framework for handling invalidity objections and comity in extra-territorial infringement claims.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决为 UPC 跨境专利执法提供了迄今最清晰的程序框架之一。对专利权人而言，这提高了在单一程序中纳入非 UPC 地域指定国请求的可操作性，但也意味着必须更精确地陈述长臂依据；对被告而言，无效抗辩、国家法院撤销程序和程序性拖延策略之间的协同将变得更关键。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment confirms the UPC’s capacity to hear claims involving non-UPC European patent designations when jurisdiction is established via Brussels I bis rules. However, the distinction between accepting jurisdiction and exercising it signals that relief for non-UPC territories may be constrained by comity and validity concerns. Rights holders must carefully structure cross-border claims, while defendants can leverage invalidity proceedings in national courts to influence UPC outcomes. This creates a complex interplay between UPC infringement proceedings and national validity decisions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 上诉法院认为第 34 条 UPCA 不是把权限限于 UPC territory 的地域性障碍。", "法院把被告在 UPC 缔约成员国的住所视为接受长臂管辖的重要连接点。", "判决提出处理非 UPC 地域 EP 指定国侵权请求的结构化框架，并区分受理管辖与实际行使救济。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 34 UPCA does not limit UPC jurisdiction exclusively to UPC member state territories.", "The Court distinguishes between accepting jurisdiction under Brussels I bis and exercising remedial powers.", "A structured framework addresses invalidity objections and comity for extra-territorial European patent designations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 对跨境 EP 指定国请求的开放度提高，但不会无条件给出救济。", "国家法院的有效性审理与 UPC 的侵权程序将更紧密互动。", "起诉状中的连接点和地域性主张需要更具体。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can consolidate cross-border disputes but face nuanced hurdles for non-UPC territories.", "Practice note: Pleadings must clearly distinguish jurisdictional basis from the requested scope of territorial relief.", "What to monitor: Interaction between UPC infringement stays and parallel national court validity proceedings in non-UPC states."]
core_points_en: Article 34 UPCA does not limit UPC jurisdiction exclusively to UPC member state territories.
The Court distinguishes between accepting jurisdiction under Brussels I bis and exercising remedial powers.
A structured framework addresses invalidity objections and comity for extra-territorial European patent designations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can consolidate cross-border disputes but face nuanced hurdles for non-UPC territories.
Practice note: Pleadings must clearly distinguish jurisdictional basis from the requested scope of territorial relief.
What to monitor: Interaction between UPC infringement stays and parallel national court validity proceedings in non-UPC states.

items.title: UPC clarifies long-arm jurisdiction with pivotal ruling in ‘Fujifilm v Kodak’
items.title_zh: UPC在富士胶片诉柯达案中澄清长臂管辖权
items.title_en: UPC clarifies long-arm jurisdiction with pivotal ruling in ‘Fujifilm v Kodak’
items.summary: In the first of two decisions following appeals heard last week, the Court of Appeal overturned an injunction against Kodak in the UK and Germany, and provides “welcome clarity” to the UPC’s role and reach over European patents in non-UPC territories.
items.ai_summary_zh: 在上周听证后的两项决定中，上诉法院推翻了针对柯达在英国和德国的禁令。该裁决为统一专利法院（UPC）在非UPC领土上对欧洲专利的角色和管辖范围提供了“受欢迎的清晰度”，明确了其长臂管辖权的界限。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需持续观察UPC后续判决如何界定跨境禁令效力，特别是涉及非缔约国时的司法克制原则。此动向关乎泛欧专利诉讼策略中管辖权选择的确定性，建议关注后续类似案件的裁判尺度是否保持一致。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉法院推翻了此前针对柯达公司在英国和德国发布的禁令", "该裁决澄清了UPC对非UPC成员国领土内欧洲专利的管辖角色与范围"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC在处理涉及非成员国（如英国、瑞士等）专利侵权时的管辖权边界认定", "观察此类推翻禁令的裁决是否成为后续类似跨境执行案件的先例参考", "监测权利人在非UPC领土寻求救济时，UPC裁决对其策略的实际影响"]

items.title: EUIPO calls time on Aldi beer in ‘Budvar’ row
items.title_zh: EUIPO在“Budvar”争议中驳回Aldi啤酒商标
items.title_en: EUIPO calls time on Aldi beer in ‘Budvar’ row
items.summary: European officials blocked supermarket’s ‘Buval’ after highlighting the consumer confusion risks in busy, noisy environments where partial similarities between short marks carry more weight.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟官员驳回了超市巨头Aldi的“Buval”商标申请。裁决重点指出，在繁忙且嘈杂的消费环境中，短商标之间的部分相似性会显著增加消费者混淆的风险，因此认定该商标与在先权利存在冲突风险。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了在特定零售环境下评估短商标相似性的严格标准。需持续观察EUIPO在处理简短字母组合商标时，对环境因素导致混淆可能性的举证要求及裁量倾向。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO以存在消费者混淆风险为由，正式驳回了Aldi的“Buval”商标申请", "裁决强调在繁忙嘈杂环境中，短商标的部分相似性对混淆判断具有更大权重"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["短商标在嘈杂环境下的部分相似性被认定为高混淆风险因素", "EUIPO在商标异议中对消费场景具体特征的考量权重较高", "后续需关注此类基于环境因素的混淆认定在上诉中的维持率"]

items.title: Munich Court orders arrest for Polytech general manager
items.title_zh: 慕尼黑法院下令逮捕Polytech总经理
items.title_en: Munich Court orders arrest for Polytech general manager
items.summary: It is the next stage of escalation in the long-running dispute between the Brazilian company Silimed and its German competitor Polytech. It is the kind of decision that makes compliance departments sit up and take notice. Anyone who violates a court injunction “particularly grossly” risks not only a fine but also personal imprisonment as a […] The post Munich Court orders arrest for Polytech general manager appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 巴西Silimed公司与德国竞争对手Polytech的长期专利纠纷升级。慕尼黑法院下令逮捕Polytech总经理，因其严重违反法院禁令。此举警示合规部门，严重违禁不仅面临罚款，还可能导致个人监禁。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案凸显德国法院在知识产权侵权禁令执行上的严厉态度。企业需关注违反禁令的个人刑事责任风险，特别是高管层面的合规义务。后续应观察该逮捕令的实际执行情况及对类似跨国专利纠纷威慑力的影响。

items.title: Düsseldorf Local Division adopts The Hague equivalence test and rejects infringement
items.title_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院采纳海牙等同测试并驳回侵权主张
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Adopts Hague Equivalence Test, Rejects Infringement in Stroller Case
items.summary: Wonderland Nurserygoods v. Cybex – Düsseldorf Local Division, 27 May 2026, UPC_CFI_807/2024, UPC_CFI_334/2025
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Wonderland诉Cybex案中，就婴儿车轮锁机制专利侵权作出判决。法院明确采纳海牙地方法院此前开发的四步等同测试法，驳回原告基于组件排列反转提出的等同侵权主张。法院强调需对每个替换特征进行单独功能分析，若被控方案需彻底重新设计，通常不构成等同。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division endorsed the four-part equivalence test from the Hague Local Division in Wonderland Nurserygoods v. Cybex. The Court rejected infringement by equivalence for a stroller wheel locking mechanism, ruling that reversing component arrangements required a complete redesign. It emphasized individual feature analysis over abstract functional similarity, establishing that equivalents demanding significant structural changes are generally not obvious to the skilled person. This decision aligns Düsseldorf with Hague precedents like Plant-e, providing a coherent framework for assessing technical equivalence while awaiting definitive guidance from the UPC Court of Appeal on a unified standard.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment signals growing consistency in UPC equivalence assessments, favoring the structured Hague approach. Rights holders should note that broad functional arguments fail if the accused product requires substantial redesign. Detailed, feature-by-feature technical evidence is now essential for successful equivalence claims across participating divisions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院正式采纳海牙地方法院的四步等同测试框架，作为评估技术等同性的连贯标准", "判定等同侵权需逐个分析替换特征的功能，仅关注整体目标或抽象层面不足够", "若被控侵权产品需要对权利要求装置进行彻底重新设计，通常不认定为等同侵权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Düsseldorf Local Division expressly adopts the four-part Hague equivalence test for assessing patent infringement by equivalence.", "Court rejects equivalence claims where alleged variants require a complete redesign of the claimed device structure.", "Patentees must analyze the function of each substituted feature individually rather than relying on overall similarity."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC内部正趋向于采用统一的等同侵权测试标准，杜塞尔多夫分院已明确追随海牙分院先例", "等同侵权举证责任加重，要求专利权人对每个替换特征进行具体的功能性解释和论证", "需持续观察上诉法院未来是否会对这一四步测试法给出全UPC适用的 definitive…"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Equivalence arguments face higher scrutiny; products requiring complete redesigns are unlikely to infringe under this new standard.", "Practice note: Draft infringement analyses that map each claim feature to the accused product’s specific technical function, avoiding abstract comparisons.", "What to monitor: Whether the UPC Court of Appeal will codify this four-part test as the definitive Union-wide standard for equivalence."]
core_points_en: Düsseldorf Local Division expressly adopts the four-part Hague equivalence test for assessing patent infringement by equivalence.
Court rejects equivalence claims where alleged variants require a complete redesign of the claimed device structure.
Patentees must analyze the function of each substituted feature individually rather than relying on overall similarity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Equivalence arguments face higher scrutiny; products requiring complete redesigns are unlikely to infringe under this new standard.
Practice note: Draft infringement analyses that map each claim feature to the accused product’s specific technical function, avoiding abstract comparisons.
What to monitor: Whether the UPC Court of Appeal will codify this four-part test as the definitive Union-wide standard for equivalence.

items.title: Steering FRAND and RAND towards arbitration
items.title_zh: 引导FRAND与RAND争议走向仲裁
items.title_en: Steering FRAND and RAND towards arbitration
items.summary: The English courts have long highlighted the lack of enforceable arbitration as the core reason for "dysfunctional" global FRAND dispute resolution, but Acer v Nokia creates a potential solution, says Robert Lundie Smith of Charles Russell Speechleys.
items.ai_summary_zh: Charles Russell Speechleys律所律师指出，英国法院长期强调缺乏可执行仲裁是全球FRAND争议解决“功能失调”的核心原因。Acer诉Nokia案为此提供了潜在解决方案，可能推动此类争议向仲裁机制转移。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注英国法院在SEP案件中对待仲裁条款的态度变化。Acer诉Nokia案的后续进展可能确立将FRAND费率争议提交仲裁的先例，影响跨国许可策略。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国法院认为缺乏可执行仲裁导致全球FRAND争议解决功能失调", "Acer诉Nokia案为通过仲裁解决FRAND争议提供了潜在方案"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注英国法院对FRAND仲裁可执行性的司法立场演变", "监测Acer诉Nokia案是否形成推动仲裁解决SEP争议的判例", "观察跨国企业在SEP许可谈判中对仲裁条款的采纳趋势"]

items.title: CoA, May 26, 2026, Security For Costs, UPC_CoA_74/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：未在一审提出的事实与论点通常不足以推翻诉讼费用担保裁定
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: New Arguments Insufficient to Overturn Security for Costs Order
items.summary: The claimant presented a number of reasons why, in its view, the impugned order is incorrect, including new arguments not raised at first instance. It failed, however, to demonstrate or even argue that the alleged errors are manifest.
items.ai_summary_zh: 该文概述 UPC 上诉法院在 UPC_CoA_74/2026 案中的处理思路。根据文中摘要，上诉方虽提出多项理由质疑一审关于诉讼费用担保的裁定，但未能证明相关错误达到“明显错误”门槛；同时，未在一审提出的新事实、新论点以及其他程序中的材料，通常不足以支持该类酌情审查上诉。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal dismissed an appeal against a security for costs order in case UPC_CoA_74/2026. The claimant argued the first instance decision was incorrect but failed to demonstrate manifest error. The Court held that new arguments, including facts from separate proceedings and unraised litigation insurance possibilities, cannot establish manifest error if not presented at first instance. This ruling reinforces the high threshold for discretionary review of procedural orders under Rule 220.3 RoP, emphasizing that appellate review is limited to correcting clear mistakes based on the existing record.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这类程序性裁定虽然不直接触及专利有效性或侵权实体判断，但对诉讼资源配置和跨境维权可诉性影响很大。实务上，这一要点强化了当事人在 UPC 一审阶段完整提交财务、担保和程序性抗辩材料的必要性，否则后续纠偏空间会明显收窄。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the strict limits of appellate review for procedural orders at the UPC. Parties must present all relevant financial and procedural arguments during first instance proceedings. Relying on new evidence or arguments on appeal is unlikely to succeed, as the Court focuses solely on whether the initial decision was manifestly erroneous based on the submitted record.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["案件涉及 UPC 上诉法院对诉讼费用担保裁定的酌情审查。", "文中强调上诉方需要证明一审裁定存在明显错误。", "未在一审提出的事实和论点一般不能在上诉中转化为明显错误。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Discretionary review requires demonstrating that the impugned order contains a manifest error.", "New arguments or facts not raised at first instance cannot constitute a manifest error.", "Materials from separate proceedings where defendants are not parties are excluded from review."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 对程序性上诉的门槛可能维持较高标准。", "费用担保争议中的证据和论点应尽量在一审一次性铺开。", "跨境专利诉讼当事人需更早评估成本暴露和担保安排。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Appeals against security for costs orders face a high barrier; success depends on proving manifest error in the original decision.", "Practice note: Ensure all arguments regarding financial status, litigation insurance, and cost exposure are fully developed and submitted at the first instance level.", "What to monitor: Future UPC Court of Appeal decisions to see if this strict approach to new evidence extends to other procedural challenges."]
core_points_en: Discretionary review requires demonstrating that the impugned order contains a manifest error.
New arguments or facts not raised at first instance cannot constitute a manifest error.
Materials from separate proceedings where defendants are not parties are excluded from review.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appeals against security for costs orders face a high barrier; success depends on proving manifest error in the original decision.
Practice note: Ensure all arguments regarding financial status, litigation insurance, and cost exposure are fully developed and submitted at the first instance level.
What to monitor: Future UPC Court of Appeal decisions to see if this strict approach to new evidence extends to other procedural challenges.

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal Invalidates Patent and Dismisses Infringement Action in Second-Instance Turnaround | Grünecker
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭推翻原判并宣告专利无效
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Invalidates Patent and Dismisses Infringement Action in Second-Instance Turnaround | Grünecker
items.summary: Taking over representation in second instance Grünecker succeeded turning around the case for our client Hefei.aking over the representation of Hefei Xinhu Canned Motor Pump Co., Ltd. only in the second instance, Grünecker succeeded in turning the case around.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭于2026年5月27日作出判决，撤销一审决定，宣告EP 2 778 423号专利在侵权相关范围内无效，并驳回全部侵权诉讼。该案由Grünecker在二审阶段代理合肥新沪屏蔽泵有限公司实现逆转。判决还澄清了权利要求解释规则及上诉阶段新证据的可采性标准，预计将影响慕尼黑中央分庭 pending 的无效程序。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了UPC上诉阶段证据提交与权利要求解释的重要判例。实务中需关注同一术语在不同权利要求部分的功能性差异解释风险，以及如何在一审基础上有效构建二审补充证据链以符合可采性要求。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉庭撤销一审判决，宣告涉案专利部分无效并驳回侵权诉讼", "明确权利要求中相同术语通常含义一致，但依功能不同可作不同解释", "裁定上诉阶段提交的补充证据若仅 substantiate 一审已提论点则具可采性"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC对权利要求术语一致性解释及其功能性例外规则的适用", "监测该判决对慕尼黑中央分庭 pending 无效程序的潜在既判力影响", "观察上诉庭对“新提交材料”与“既有论点实质化”界限的后续认定"]

items.title: Trademark News: What Flew Under the Radar in June 2026
items.title_zh: 2026年6月商标新闻综述：德国DPMA新规及其他
items.title_en: Trademark News: What Flew Under the Radar in June 2026
items.summary: Stay informed with our comprehensive roundup of the past month's headlines, all neatly compiled for you in one convenient post. Catch up on the latest news reported by the Kluwer IP Reporter.Argentina hikes IP fees by around 100 percentThe Argentine Patent and Trademark Office has recently issued Resolution No. 75/2026, significantly increasing official fees for industrial property procedures.Read the full story here
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文汇总2026年6月全球商标动态。欧洲方面，德国专利商标局（DPMA）修订电子法律交易条例并于3月生效，确立数字通信新框架。国际层面，WIPO通知指定土耳其的国际注册个别费用变更。此外涵盖阿根廷、伊拉克费用上涨，巴西高声誉商标认定规则，以及菲律宾加入电商备忘录和推出地理标志Logo等非欧洲资讯。
items.ai_insight_zh: 德国DPMA新规优化了数字通信流程，权利人需适应新的电子交互标准。土耳其作为马德里体系重要指定国，其费用调整直接影响国际注册成本预算。建议持续关注欧洲各国数字化程序更新及主要贸易伙伴国的官费政策变动，以合规管理全球商标组合。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["德国DPMA电子交易框架更新，需关注具体操作指引对商标申请及维护流程的影响", "土耳其国际注册费用变更，涉及马德里体系指定的成本核算与预算管理", "多国官费上涨趋势明显，需监测阿根廷、伊拉克等市场的最新缴费标准以避免权利丧失"]

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 27, 2026, Order On Confidentiality, UPC_CFI_779/2024
items.title_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院关于保密令的裁定
items.title_en: LD Düsseldorf, May 27, 2026, Order On Confidentiality, UPC_CFI_779/2024
items.summary: Where it is reasonably foreseeable that court-ordered disclosure may require revelation of confidential information, the defendant must raise confidentiality concerns during main proceedings. Failing to do so without adequate justification will typically result in denial of subsequent post-judgment requests
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Brita SE诉Wessper案中作出保密令裁定。若可合理预见法院命令披露将泄露机密信息，被告须在主要诉讼程序中提出保密关切。若无充分理由未在此阶段提出，后续判决后的请求通常会被驳回。针对尚未归入案卷信息的纯假设性保密申请不予受理。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定明确了UPC诉讼中提出保密异议的时间窗口与事实基础要求。当事人需在主要审理阶段积极评估披露风险并及时主张权利，避免程序失权。对于尚未提交法院的文件，过早申请保密令缺乏依据。这提示 litigants 需精确把握程序节点，平衡信息披露义务与商业秘密保护需求。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["若可预见披露需揭示机密，被告须在主要诉讼程序中提出保密关切，否则后续请求通常被拒", "涵盖尚未归入案卷信息的纯假设性保密命令不可受理，因缺乏事实基础必须被驳回", "本案依据《程序规则》第262A条及262.2条，涉及EP1748830B1专利诉讼中的…"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确被告在主要诉讼程序中提出保密关切的义务，逾期且无正当理由将导致失权", "确立纯假设性、无案卷事实基础的保密申请不可受理的规则，防止程序滥用", "需关注UPC各地方法院对《程序规则》第262条系列条款在具体案件中的适用尺度"]

items.title: CoA, May 26, 2026, Order To Produce Evidence, UPC_CoA_76/2026
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院：涉中国出口管制风险时，可延长证据提交期限
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Extends Evidence Deadline Citing Chinese Export Control Risks
items.summary: The defendants argued two-fold circumstances: (i) complying with the production order may violate Chinese export control regulations, while (ii) non-compliance with the production order would trigger penalties. The Court accepted, on a prima facie basis, these consequences and extended the time limit to comply with the production order.
items.ai_summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 的案例摘要称，在 UPC_CoA_76/2026 中，被告主张若遵守证据提交命令，可能违反中国出口管制法规；若不遵守，又可能面临程序制裁。UPC 上诉法院在初步层面接受这一双重后果的可能性，并延长了履行证据提交命令的期限。文章还称，法院认为当事人未在预期中主动启动出口许可程序并非当然不合理。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CoA_76/2026, the UPC Court of Appeal extended the deadline for defendants to comply with an evidence production order. The defendants argued that compliance risked violating Chinese export control regulations, while non-compliance would trigger procedural penalties. Accepting these consequences on a prima facie basis, the Court granted additional time. It rejected the claimant’s argument that defendants should have proactively sought export authorization before the ruling, deeming it reasonable to await judicial outcomes given associated costs. The Court also clarified that specifying delivery conditions is a mandatory procedural obligation, not an ultra petita ruling, and limited factual assessment to the time of the application.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这条裁定显示，UPC 在证据获取问题上开始正面处理与第三国合规义务的冲突。对跨境制造和供应链案件而言，证据保存、样品转移和出口管制评估不能等到最后一刻才做，否则程序时钟与境外监管时钟会直接碰撞。
items.ai_insight_en: This order highlights how third-country regulatory constraints, such as export controls, directly influence UPC procedural timelines. Rights holders and defendants must anticipate potential conflicts between court-ordered evidence production and foreign compliance obligations. Early assessment of cross-border transfer feasibility is essential to avoid procedural defaults or delays, as courts may grant extensions but expect timely notification of such regulatory hurdles.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["被告以中国出口管制风险为由，请求对证据提交命令给予缓冲。", "UPC 上诉法院初步接受该风险并延长了履行期限。", "法院未采纳原告关于被告应预先启动出口许可程序的主张。"]

items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Cross-border litigation strategies must account for potential delays caused by conflicting national export control regimes.", "Practice note: Document efforts to assess regulatory risks early, but note that proactive licensing before court orders is not strictly mandated.", "What to monitor: Future UPC case law on the threshold of proof required to establish prima facie foreign regulatory conflicts."]
core_points_en: Prima facie foreign regulatory conflicts can justify suspending or extending evidence production deadlines in UPC proceedings.
Parties are not required to proactively initiate export license applications before final judicial decisions on evidence requests.
Defining modalities for evidence delivery is a mandatory procedural duty, not a ruling beyond the parties' requests.

Practice note: Document efforts to assess regulatory risks early, but note that proactive licensing before court orders is not strictly mandated.
What to monitor: Future UPC case law on the threshold of proof required to establish prima facie foreign regulatory conflicts.
