items.title: CoA, May 27, 2026, Infringement Action, Counterclaim, UPC_CoA_622/2025
items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭裁决：上诉补充证据与权利要求解释规则
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Admissibility of Evidence and Claim Construction Rules
items.summary: The appellant argued at first instance that circulation pumps are typically implemented as centrifugal pumps. On appeal, additional textbook excerpts were submitted to substantiate this point. The Court held this as concretization of already conclusive submissions. In addition, this submission was not contested by the respondent, beyond mere arguing late-filing. Uncontested submissions generally cannot be rejected as late-filed.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭就Grundfos诉合肥新沪案作出裁决。法院认定，上诉阶段提交的教科书摘录若仅用于具体化一审已 conclusive 的主张且对方未实质抗辩，不应视为逾期新证据而被驳回。同时明确，即使现有技术文档已在一审提交，若特定论点未在一审主张，上诉时仍属新论点。此外，诉讼语言版本的权利要求具有权威性，译文不一致时以诉讼语言为准。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal ruled that textbook excerpts submitted on appeal to concretize conclusive first-instance submissions are admissible if uncontested. However, specific prior art arguments not raised at first instance remain new and inadmissible, even if the document was previously filed. The Court confirmed that claim construction relies on the language of proceedings, rendering conflicting translations irrelevant. Additionally, appellants lack legal interest in challenging dependent claims when the independent claim is upheld. This judgment in Grundfos v. Hefei Xinhu provides key procedural guidance for infringement and revocation counterclaims within the Unified Patent Court system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC上诉程序中证据“具体化”与“新论点”的界限，强调诉讼语言在权利要求解释中的绝对权威。实务中需确保一审主张的完整性，并注意多语言专利文本在诉讼中的效力层级，避免因依赖非诉讼语言译文而导致解释偏差。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the importance of comprehensive first-instance pleading in UPC litigation. Parties must distinguish between clarifying existing arguments and introducing new prior art critiques. Reliance on non-proceeding language translations for claim construction carries significant risk, as the authentic text governs interpretation regardless of translation discrepancies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉阶段对一审已充分主张的具体化补充，若未被对方实质抗辩，通常不因逾期被驳回", "即使现有技术文档已在一审查明，若特定技术信息未在一审主张，上诉提出即视为新论点", "权利要求解释以诉讼语言（德语）版本为准，专利英文译文若支持不同解读则不具决定性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Uncontested appellate evidence concretizing first-instance submissions is generally admissible despite late filing.", "Prior art arguments are new on appeal if specific technical points were not previously argued.", "Claim construction follows the language of proceedings, overriding conflicting translations in other languages."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["上诉证据策略：区分对既有主张的具体化补充与全新论点，前者更易被接纳", "语言权威性：在多语言专利诉讼中，必须严格依据诉讼语言版本的权利要求进行构建", "程序效率：未受实质争议的程序性抗辩（如单纯指责逾期）难以阻止证据被采纳"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Multilingual patent portfolios require careful alignment of claim terms with the designated language of proceedings to avoid interpretive disadvantages.", "Practice note: Ensure all specific prior art arguments are fully developed at first instance, as mere document submission does not preserve unargued points for appeal.", "What to monitor: Future UPC cases applying the distinction between admissible concretization of evidence and inadmissible new arguments in complex technical disputes."]
core_points_en: Uncontested appellate evidence concretizing first-instance submissions is generally admissible despite late filing.
Prior art arguments are new on appeal if specific technical points were not previously argued.
Claim construction follows the language of proceedings, overriding conflicting translations in other languages.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Multilingual patent portfolios require careful alignment of claim terms with the designated language of proceedings to avoid interpretive disadvantages.
Practice note: Ensure all specific prior art arguments are fully developed at first instance, as mere document submission does not preserve unargued points for appeal.
What to monitor: Future UPC cases applying the distinction between admissible concretization of evidence and inadmissible new arguments in complex technical disputes.

items.title: [Blog] L’OEB renforce l’usage de l’IA dans l’examen des brevets
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局加强人工智能在专利审查中的应用
items.title_en: EPO Strengthens AI Use in Patent Examination Under Strategic Plan 2028
items.summary: Novagraaf positions itself as a comprehensive partner for intellectual property strategy, protection, and defense. The firm offers expert guidance through monthly newsletters...
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）在其2028年战略计划框架下，持续推进人工智能在现有技术检索和专利申请审查中的部署。EPO确认使用AI工具辅助审查员，旨在提高检索质量、加速案件处理并增强可专利性决定的一致性。该举措遵循“以人为本的AI”原则，强调AI仅作为决策辅助工具，不取代审查员，审查员仍对法律和技术分析承担最终责任，以确保在案件量增加和技术复杂化背景下维持高授权质量。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) is progressively deploying artificial intelligence tools within its prior art search and patent examination processes, aligned with its Strategic Plan 2028. The EPO confirms that these AI systems are designed to assist examiners by enhancing the quality of state-of-the-art searches, accelerating case processing, and improving consistency in patentability decisions. This initiative follows a human-centric approach, where AI serves strictly as a decision-support tool without replacing the examiner. The examiner retains full responsibility for the legal and technical analysis of applications. The EPO emphasizes that this transformation aims not only at procedural efficiency but also at maintaining high grant quality amidst rising filing volumes and increasing technological complexity.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development signals the structural integration of AI into the EPO examination framework, normalizing advanced search assistance. While efficiency may improve, the human-centric mandate ensures that traditional prosecution strategies remain relevant, as examiners maintain ultimate discretion. Rights holders should anticipate potentially broader or more precise prior art citations while recognizing that AI-generated insights undergo mandatory human legal validation before influencing outcomes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO在2028战略计划下推进AI用于现有技术检索及专利审查，以提升效率与一致性", "采取“以人为本的AI”模式，AI仅作辅助，审查员保留对法律和技术分析的最终责任", "目标不仅是程序效率，更在于应对申请量增长及技术复杂性，维持高水准的专利授权质量"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO integrates AI tools into prior art searches and examination to boost quality and consistency.", "Human-centric model ensures examiners retain final responsibility for all legal and technical analyses.", "Strategic goal balances procedural efficiency with high grant standards amid growing application complexity."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["AI成为EPO审查系统的结构性工具，可能改变现有技术检索的覆盖广度与精准度", "审查员保留最终法律责任，意味着AI生成的初步结论仍需经过人工法律逻辑校验", "需持续观察AI工具在复杂技术案件中的实际表现及其对审查周期缩短的具体影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Applicants may face more comprehensive prior art citations, requiring robust differentiation strategies in responses.", "Practice note: Examiners retain final liability, meaning AI-assisted findings must still withstand standard legal and technical scrutiny.", "What to monitor: Observe how AI tools impact examination timelines and the consistency of patentability assessments in complex technical fields."]
core_points_en: EPO integrates AI tools into prior art searches and examination to boost quality and consistency.
Human-centric model ensures examiners retain final responsibility for all legal and technical analyses.
Strategic goal balances procedural efficiency with high grant standards amid growing application complexity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Applicants may face more comprehensive prior art citations, requiring robust differentiation strategies in responses.
Practice note: Examiners retain final liability, meaning AI-assisted findings must still withstand standard legal and technical scrutiny.
What to monitor: Observe how AI tools impact examination timelines and the consistency of patentability assessments in complex technical fields.

items.title: UPC Confirms Jurisdiction Over Foreign Manufacturers And Their European Distributors
items.title_zh: UPC确认对外国制造商及其欧洲分销商的管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Confirms Jurisdiction Over Foreign Manufacturers And Their European Distributors
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal has established groundbreaking precedent on international jurisdiction over non-EU manufacturers in two parallel patent infringement cases involving Abbott Diabetes Care, Chinese manufacturer Sinocare, and Italian distributor Menarini.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在两起平行案件中确立先例，确认对未在欧洲设立的中国制造商Sinocare及其意大利分销商Menarini拥有国际管辖权。法院驳回管辖权异议，认定制造商积极参与营销需承担责任，并基于价格侵蚀风险维持初步禁令。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了UPC对境外制造商行使管辖权的重要先例，强调通过分销商网络积极营销即可能触发连带责任。权利人利用价格侵蚀论证紧急性获支持，提示跨境供应链中的专利合规与诉讼风险显著增加，需关注UPC程序规则适用。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院确认对非欧盟制造商Sinocare及意大利分销商Menarini拥有国际…", "法院认定中国制造商因积极参与侵权产品营销，作为教唆者或同谋需承担法律责任", "分销商进入报销市场导致的价格侵蚀风险，是支持授予初步禁令的关键因素"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC明确对非欧盟实体行使管辖权的条件，强化了对跨境侵权链条的打击力度", "制造商若深度参与分销商营销活动，将被视为共同侵权人并承担相应法律责任", "需持续观察UPC在类似跨境案件中关于紧急性认定及临时措施授予的裁判标准"]

items.title: When a strap is not enough: General Court upholds invalidity of Crocs' iconic clog design
items.title_zh: 后跟带不足够：欧盟法院维持Crocs洞洞鞋设计无效
items.title_en: When a strap is not enough: General Court upholds invalidity of Crocs' iconic clog design
items.summary: Can the addition of a heel strap to a clog design be enough to produce a different overall impression on the informed user when that strap belongs to one of the most recognisable shoes in the world? The General Court's judgment in Crocs v EUIPO - Gor Factory (Chaussure) (T-228/25) sheds light on this question. BackgroundCrocs, Inc. owns the following EU design registered on 22
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院在Crocs诉EUIPO及Gor Factory案（T-228/25）中作出判决。核心争议在于，在全球知名洞洞鞋设计基础上增加后跟带，是否足以对知情用户产生不同的整体印象。法院最终维持了该外观设计无效的裁定，认定仅增加后跟带不足以改变整体视觉效果。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了在高度知名基础设计上进行微小改动（如增加后跟带）难以满足外观设计独特性要求。权利人需注意，对于具有极高辨识度的现有设计，简单的附加特征可能无法确立新的整体印象，从而面临无效风险。需持续关注此类判例对后续近似设计确权的指引作用。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟普通法院审理Crocs诉EUIPO案，案件编号为T-228/25", "法院认定在知名洞洞鞋设计上增加后跟带，不足以产生不同整体印象", "判决结果维持了涉案欧盟外观设计的无效宣告决定"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["微小改动难以对抗高知名度现有设计的整体印象判定", "外观设计独特性评估中，知情用户对显著特征的认知权重较高", "需观察该判决对后续类似鞋类或消费品外观设计确权的影响"]

items.title: Regional Court Munich issues ex parte PIs on SPC for parkinson drug Xadago
items.title_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院就帕金森药Xadago SPC颁发单方禁令
items.title_en: Regional Court Munich issues ex parte PIs on SPC for parkinson drug Xadago
items.summary: The ex parte PIs are a particularly heavy blow for Vivanta Generics, Stadapharm and Aliud Pharma. They already market their generics of drug Xadago with the active ingredient safinamide in Germany. The dispute revolves around a new Parkinson’s therapy. These drugs attempt to slow down the changes in the brain of Parkinson’s patients, which progress […] The post Regional Court Munich issues ex parte PIs on SPC for parkinson drug Xadago appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院就帕金森药物Xadago（活性成分safinamide）的补充保护证书（SPC）颁发了单方初步禁令。该禁令对Vivanta Generics、Stadapharm和Aliud Pharma构成重大打击，这些公司此前已在德国市场销售该药物的仿制药。争议围绕一种旨在延缓帕金森患者脑部病变的新疗法展开。

items.summary: Een Nederlandse autohandelaar en reparateur heeft op haar website en op www.marktplaats.nl een advertentie geplaatst met als titel ‘Ferrari Turbo F355’. Op het eerste gezicht lijkt het dat u voor € 59.995,- eigenaar kunt worden van een Ferrari...

items.title: UPC Inventive Step: Closest Prior Art Falls Short | EIP | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC判例：最接近现有技术虽为起点但仍具创造性
items.title_en: UPC Inventive Step: Closest Prior Art Falls Short | EIP | EIP
items.summary: In WIRPLAST v VILPE, the UPC held that the closest prior art can be a realistic starting point yet still support an inventive step where it solves a different problem.
items.ai_summary_zh: 在WIRPLAST诉VILPE案中，UPC慕尼黑地方法院裁定，即使某篇现有技术文献被视为现实的出发点，若其涉及不同种类设备并解决不同技术问题，仍可认定具备创造性。法院强调，无效请求人需证明本领域技术人员有动机结合已知特征，而不仅是可能结合。该案涉及屋顶通风管道专利，争议焦点在于从屋顶风扇现有技术出发是否显而易见。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在创造性判断中对“技术问题”差异的重视程度。实务中需注意，即便找到结构相似的现有技术，若其解决的技术问题与涉案专利截然不同，仍难以成功挑战创造性。这要求无效请求人在构建显而易见性论证时，必须提供更强的动机证据，而不仅仅是结构上的相似性比对。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["即使现有技术是现实起点，若解决不同技术问题且设备种类不同，仍可认定创造性", "无效请求人必须证明本领域技术人员有动机结合已知特征，而非仅证明其可能性", "法院认定屋顶风扇与穿顶管道属根本不同的安装概念，缺乏结合动机"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC倾向于严格审查技术问题的差异性，防止事后诸葛亮式的创造性否定", "无效程序中，证明结合动机比证明结合可能性更为关键，举证责任较重", "需持续观察UPC后续判例是否维持这一对“不同技术问题”的高权重认定标准"]

items.title: Rapid reaction: Amazon v InterDigital at the UPC Court of Appeal
items.title_zh: 快讯：亚马逊诉InterDigital案在UPC上诉法院开庭
items.title_en: Rapid reaction: Amazon v InterDigital at the UPC Court of Appeal
items.summary: A much anticipated showdown in front of the UPC’s Court of Appeal took place in Luxembourg today in front of a panel of judges comprising Ulrike Voss (p...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在卢森堡审理亚马逊诉InterDigital案。法院对临时许可声明的实际影响表示关切，质疑若因拒绝 interim licence 而在英国被认定为非善意实施人，是否构成事实上的禁诉令。上诉源于曼海姆地方法院授予InterDigital的单方反临时许可禁令。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注UPC上诉法院如何协调跨国SEP诉讼中的临时救济与FRAND认定。法院对“事实禁诉令”效应的关切，可能影响未来SEP持有人在欧盟寻求禁令的策略及与被控侵权人的谈判地位。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院质疑拒绝临时许可导致在英国被认定非善意，是否构成事实禁诉令", "本案上诉针对曼海姆地方法院于2025年9月30日授予InterDigital的反临时许…", "法院初步认为其依据UPC协定第32条有权发布该禁令，因侵权包含干扰专利权执行"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC对临时许可声明潜在反竞争效果的司法审查倾向", "跨国SEP诉讼中，英国FRAND判决与欧盟禁令救济的冲突协调机制", "后续需观察法院最终裁定对SEP持有人申请单方禁令门槛的影响"]

items.title: Working together to tackle fakes: how Vinted and government are strengthening trust online
items.title_zh: 携手打击假货：Vinted与政府加强在线信任
items.title_en: Working together to tackle fakes: how Vinted and government are strengthening trust online
items.summary: This month, the Intellectual Property Office (IPO) has launched ‘Second Hand, Not Second Best’ a campaign highlighting the benefits of shopping second hand, and why choosing pre-loved goods offers an affordable and sustainable alternative to buying fakes.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发起“二手非次选”活动，倡导购买二手正品以替代假冒商品。UKIPO强调与Vinted等电商平台合作，共享检测与预防假货销售的最佳实践。此举旨在通过公私部门协作，应对网络零售增长带来的假冒风险，保护消费者及英国企业免受侵害，并提升二手市场的信任度。
items.ai_insight_zh: 英国监管机构正强化对二手电商平台的合规期待，重点在于建立假货预防机制而非事后移除。平台需展示其在身份验证、商品真实性审核方面的主动措施。对于在英运营的电商业者，应关注此类公私合作模式下的最佳实践标准，确保证据共享机制畅通，以维持市场信任并降低监管风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO发起活动，强调二手正品是假冒商品的可持续且实惠的替代方案", "UKIPO与Vinted等平台合作，共享检测和预防在线假货销售的工具与流程", "政府、执法机构与企业需协作分享证据，从供需两端打击网络知识产权犯罪"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["监管机构倾向于通过公私合作伙伴关系，推动电商平台建立主动的假货预防体系", "二手交易平台需强化商品真实性审核流程，以回应政府对消费者信任保护的关切", "后续应观察UKIPO是否将此类合作模式扩展至其他主要电商平台或形成正式指导方针"]

items.title: Pirelli wins against Chinese tyre makers Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber and Tianjin Kingtyre at UPC
items.title_zh: 倍耐力在统一专利法院胜诉中国轮胎制造商
items.title_en: UPC Milan Division Rules for Pirelli in Patent Infringement Case Against Two Chinese Tyre Makers
items.summary: Last November’s International Two-Wheeler Exhibition (EICMA) has had repercussions for two Chinese tyre manufacturers. This week, the Milan local division ruled that both had infringed a patent held by the Italian company Pirelli Tyre. The proceedings between Pirelli and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber concern the infringement of EP 3 519 207. The patent protects a specific […] The post Pirelli wins against Chinese tyre makers Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber and Tianjin Kingtyre at UPC appeared first on JUVE Pa
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院裁定，两家中国轮胎制造商四川远星橡胶和天津金宇轮胎侵犯了意大利倍耐力公司持有的专利。该诉讼源于去年国际两轮车展览会后的纠纷，涉及专利EP 3 519 207的侵权行为。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Milan Local Division has ruled that Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber and Tianjin Kingtyre infringed a patent held by Italian tyre manufacturer Pirelli. The decision follows proceedings linked to the International Two-Wheeler Exhibition (EICMA) held last November. The litigation specifically concerns European patent EP 3 519 207, which protects a specific technical feature relevant to tyre manufacturing. This judgment marks a significant enforcement action by Pirelli against these two Chinese entities within the new unitary patent litigation framework. The ruling underscores the active role of the Milan division in handling cross-border intellectual property disputes involving non-EU manufacturers exhibiting or distributing products in the European market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment illustrates the UPC’s capacity to adjudicate infringement claims against non-EU entities efficiently. For rights holders, it confirms the Milan division as a viable forum for enforcing patents against exhibitors and distributors. Companies should note the court’s willingness to engage with cases stemming from trade fair activities. Monitoring subsequent procedural steps, including potential appeals or validity challenges, will be essential to understand the final impact on market access and the precedential value of this decision within the unitary patent system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["统一专利法院米兰地方法院裁定两家中国轮胎商侵犯倍耐力专利权", "涉案专利为EP 3 519 207，争议起因于去年国际两轮车展览会", "被告方确认为四川远星橡胶和天津金宇轮胎两家中国企业"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Milan Local Division found Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber and Tianjin Kingtyre liable for patent infringement.", "The dispute centers on alleged infringement of Pirelli’s European patent EP 3 519 207.", "Proceedings were triggered by activities connected to the previous year’s EICMA trade exhibition."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["统一专利法院米兰分院正积极审理涉及非欧盟实体的专利侵权案件", "需监测针对EP 3 519 207专利的后续无效宣告请求或上诉程序进展", "观察该判决是否成为轮胎行业在统一专利体系下的典型判例"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Demonstrates effective enforcement avenues at the UPC against non-EU manufacturers involved in European trade exhibitions.", "Practice note: Highlights the Milan Local Division’s active docket and its role in resolving cross-border patent disputes under the new system.", "What to monitor: Track any appeals or counterclaims for invalidity regarding EP 3 519 207 to assess the judgment's stability and broader industry impact."]
core_points_en: UPC Milan Local Division found Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber and Tianjin Kingtyre liable for patent infringement.
The dispute centers on alleged infringement of Pirelli’s European patent EP 3 519 207.
Proceedings were triggered by activities connected to the previous year’s EICMA trade exhibition.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates effective enforcement avenues at the UPC against non-EU manufacturers involved in European trade exhibitions.
Practice note: Highlights the Milan Local Division’s active docket and its role in resolving cross-border patent disputes under the new system.
What to monitor: Track any appeals or counterclaims for invalidity regarding EP 3 519 207 to assess the judgment's stability and broader industry impact.

items.title: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen
items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：电池技术专利申请大幅增长
items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Annual Report: Battery Technology Patent Filings Surge Significantly
items.summary: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen - DPMA-Jahresbericht bietet Statistik-Highlights 2025 und nützliche Informationen zu Patenten, Gebrauchsmustern, Marken und Designs – Innovationstrends: Asiaten dominieren Batterie-Anmelderankings für den deutschen Markt, Deutschland mit deutlichem Plus auf Rang 4, Patentanmeldungen zur Windkraft legen zu - DPMA-Präsidentin: Schutz geistigen Eigentums zentral für Fortschritt und Wohlstand - Deutschland bei Solartechni
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度报告，重点统计了专利、实用新型等申请数据。报告显示，2025年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增长25.8%至9090件。尽管德国本土申请显著增加并排名第四，但亚洲申请人仍主导德国市场的电池专利排名。此外，风能专利申请量亦有所上升。报告强调知识产权保护对进步至关重要。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has published its 2025 Annual Report, highlighting statistical trends in patents, utility models, trademarks, and designs. A key finding is a 25.8 percent year-on-year increase in published patent applications for battery technology, totaling 9,090 filings. While Asian applicants continue to dominate the rankings for the German market, domestic filings from German companies and research institutions have risen substantially, securing fourth place. The report also notes an increase in wind power patent applications. Available in digital HTML and PDF formats, the document addresses current intellectual property questions, including brand protection in the digital sphere and the intersection of design rights with copyright.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This data underscores the intensifying competitive landscape in energy storage within the German jurisdiction. Rights holders should note the strong presence of Asian entities and the growing domestic activity. Monitoring these publication trends is essential for understanding technological evolution and assessing the density of prior art in battery and renewable energy sectors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速", "亚洲国家主导德国市场电池专利申请排名，德国本土申请大增位列第四", "DPMA发布2025年报，涵盖专利统计及数字时代知识产权保护趋势分析"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.", "Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.", "The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["亚洲申请人在德国电池技术专利布局中保持主导，需持续监控其公开专利组合", "德国本土电池专利申请显著增长，反映国内研发活跃度提升，值得行业关注", "建议结合DPMA年报中的细分技术分类数据，跟踪风能及储能技术的演进路径"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.", "Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.", "What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees."]
core_points_en: Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.
Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.
The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.
Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.
What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees.

items.title: Shop second-hand with confidence
items.title_zh: 放心购买二手商品：避免假冒时尚新品指南
items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Avoiding Counterfeit Goods in Second-Hand Fashion Market
items.summary: New government guidance to help avoid fake fashion. This will support shoppers to make the most of the UK's thriving pre-loved market, after 1 in 4 bought a fake without knowing.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，旨在帮助消费者在蓬勃发展的二手市场中避免购买到假冒时尚商品。此前数据显示，四分之一的消费者曾在不知情的情况下买到假货。该指南支持购物者充分利用英国二手市场，同时提升对假冒产品的识别能力。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued new government guidance designed to help consumers avoid purchasing counterfeit fashion items. This initiative supports shoppers in navigating the UK's growing pre-loved market, addressing concerns that one in four buyers previously acquired fake goods unknowingly. The guidance aims to enhance consumer confidence and awareness regarding product authenticity in second-hand transactions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This publication highlights official attention to trademark infringement risks within the expanding second-hand economy. For rights holders, it signals a continued focus on consumer education as a complement to enforcement. Stakeholders should observe if this guidance leads to updated platform obligations or specific compliance expectations for resellers.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品", "背景数据显示，此前有四分之一的消费者曾在不知情下购买了假冒时尚产品", "指南旨在支持购物者安全利用英国繁荣的二手（pre-loved）消费市场"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.", "Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["英国官方针对二手市场假冒问题出台具体指导，显示执法重心向消费端延伸", "需监测该指南是否转化为平台审核义务或后续针对卖家的执法案例", "关注二手交易中品牌方与平台在防伪责任上的政策演变趋势"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.", "Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.", "What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks."]
core_points_en: New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.
Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.
Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.
What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks.

items.title: Rebalancing imbalances in the Digital Economy. The CJEU judgment in Meta C-797/23: a new boost for press publishers?
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院Meta案判决：重塑数字经济平衡
items.title_en: Rebalancing imbalances in the Digital Economy. The CJEU judgment in Meta C-797/23: a new boost for press publishers?
items.summary: Introduction
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月12日，欧盟法院大法庭就Meta C-797/23案作出判决，解释《数字单一市场版权指令》第15条及欧盟基本权利宪章相关条款。案件核心在于成员国实施新闻出版者邻接权时的裁量范围，特别是意大利立法要求信息平台支付公平补偿并赋予监管机构确定费率权力的合法性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案澄清成员国在实施新闻出版者权利时的立法边界，特别是行政干预定价的合规性。实务中需关注判决对各国现有补偿机制的影响，以及平台与出版者后续谈判框架的调整方向。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟法院审理Meta挑战意大利实施版权指令第15条的合法性，涉及公平补偿机制", "意大利立法规定信息平台需支付公平补偿，授权通信管理局制定标准并裁定金额", "案件争议焦点包括公共机构介入谈判是否超出指令范围及是否侵犯企业经营自由"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确成员国在版权指令转化中的裁量权限边界", "评估行政定价机制在欧盟法下的合规风险", "观察判决对平台内容可见性及数据提供义务的影响"]

items.title: Court of Appeal to rule on major points even if missing from first instance decision (UPC_CoA_302/2025, UPC_CoA_305/2025)
items.title_zh: 上诉院即使初审未决亦将对关键点作出裁决
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules on Final Decisions and Legal Interest in Rematec v Europe Forestry
items.summary: Court docket: Court of Appeal
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中推翻曼海姆分院判决，认定专利有效且侵权。裁决明确：若独立权利要求无效导致撤销反诉失败，无需审查从属权利要求充分性；上诉院通常应自行作出终局裁决而非发回重审，除非例外情况；发布判决需证明原告存在合法利益。
items.ai_summary_en: In Rematec v. Europe Forestry, the UPC Court of Appeal clarified procedural standards under the UPCA. It held that assessing sufficiency for dependent claims is unnecessary if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim due to lack of legal interest. Under Article 75(1) UPCA, the Court of Appeal generally issues a final decision when setting aside a first instance judgment, including ruling on infringement. Referral back to the first instance is exceptional; the lower court’s prior omission of infringement findings, based on invalidity, does not typically justify remand. Additionally, ordering publication of the decision under Article 80 UPCA requires demonstrating the claimant’s legitimate interest.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces the UPC Court of Appeal’s role in delivering final resolutions, minimizing referrals back to the first instance even when infringement was not previously examined. Rights holders should anticipate comprehensive appellate rulings covering both validity and infringement. Furthermore, parties seeking publication of decisions must proactively substantiate their legitimate interest, as such orders are not automatic upon finding infringement.

items.title: Guidance: How to spot fake fashion when shopping second-hand

items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Identifying Counterfeit Fashion in Second-Hand Markets
items.summary: Understand how to identify counterfeit products sold on resale platforms and steps to report listings.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布指南，旨在帮助消费者理解如何识别在转售平台上销售的假冒产品，并提供举报相关 listings 的具体步骤。该文件属于官方发布的操作指引，聚焦于二手市场中的知识产权侵权识别与应对流程。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published guidance to assist consumers in identifying counterfeit fashion items sold through second-hand resale platforms. The document outlines practical steps for recognizing fake products and provides instructions on how to report suspicious listings. This resource aims to enhance awareness of trademark infringement risks within the secondary market, offering a structured approach for rights holders and buyers to address potential counterfeiting issues on digital marketplaces.

For brand owners, it underscores the importance of clear consumer education and accessible reporting mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms integrate these identification tips into their compliance frameworks may reveal evolving standards for intermediary liability and user-generated content moderation in the UK.

items.title: A Blind Spot at the Heart of EU Copyright and AI Policymaking?
items.title_zh: 欧盟版权与AI政策制定中的盲点？
items.title_en: European Commission Launches Targeted Copyright Initiative Addressing Generative AI Challenges
items.summary: Earlier this month the European Commission published a call for evidence relating to the "Report on the review of the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive" and a "Targeted initiative for a better copyright environment for European creativity and innovation".
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟委员会发布证据征集令，确认计划对欧盟版权框架进行新的立法干预，重点解决生成式AI带来的挑战。该举措独立于正在进行的《数字单一市场版权指令》审查，后者预计不会重新开放文本。新倡议涵盖AI挑战、在线盗版、录音制品及研究例外等四个领域，旨在改善欧洲创意与创新环境。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Commission has published a call for evidence confirming plans for new legislative intervention in the EU copyright framework. This targeted initiative, distinct from the ongoing review of the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, aims to address challenges linked to artificial intelligence and other specific areas. The Commission expects measures to tackle market and technological developments associated with generative AI. While the Directive review proceeds in parallel without reopening its text, this new initiative covers four domains: AI-related creator challenges, online piracy of live events, sound recordings of third-country nationals, and research exceptions. The move signals a significant shift in EU copyright policy, focusing on adapting legal frameworks to technological disruption rather than revising existing directives.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development indicates that EU policymakers prefer targeted legislative fixes over comprehensive directive revisions to address generative AI. Rights holders and technology developers should anticipate new rules governing training data usage and opt-out mechanisms. The separation from the CDSM review suggests a faster, albeit potentially fragmented, regulatory approach to emerging AI copyright issues.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟委员会确认计划进行新的立法干预，以应对生成式AI对版权框架造成的破坏", "此次针对AI的措施独立于《数字单一市场版权指令》的平行审查，后者预计不修改原文", "现有文本挖掘例外未能平衡技术发展与控制权，退出机制未成为有效的许可杠杆"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Commission confirms new legislative intervention targeting AI challenges, separate from the ongoing CDSM Directive review process.", "Initiative covers four areas: AI impacts, live event piracy, third-country sound recordings, and research exception harmonization.", "Existing text and data mining exceptions failed to balance technology development with rightholder control and value participation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟倾向于通过新增针对性立法而非修订旧指令来应对AI版权挑战", "需观察新立法如何解决权利保留技术标准缺失及跨境AI开发者管辖问题", "关注研究例外澄清及二级出版权引入对学术与商业数据使用的潜在影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders and AI developers must prepare for new compliance obligations regarding training data and creator compensation models outside the current CDSM fra…", "Practice note: The initiative’s broad scope beyond AI suggests potential legislative bundling, which may complicate negotiations and extend timelines for final adoption.", "What to monitor: Watch for specific proposals on clarifying the InfoSoc research exception and introducing an EU-level secondary publication right alongside AI measures."]
core_points_en: Commission confirms new legislative intervention targeting AI challenges, separate from the ongoing CDSM Directive review process.
Initiative covers four areas: AI impacts, live event piracy, third-country sound recordings, and research exception harmonization.
Existing text and data mining exceptions failed to balance technology development with rightholder control and value participation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and AI developers must prepare for new compliance obligations regarding training data and creator compensation models outside the current CDSM fra…
Practice note: The initiative’s broad scope beyond AI suggests potential legislative bundling, which may complicate negotiations and extend timelines for final adoption.
What to monitor: Watch for specific proposals on clarifying the InfoSoc research exception and introducing an EU-level secondary publication right alongside AI measures.

items.title: LD The Hague, May 19, 2026, Order On Preliminary Objection, UPC_CFI-2228/2025, UPC_CFI-1546/2026
items.title_zh: 海牙地方法院就UPC管辖权初步异议作出裁定
items.title_en: LD The Hague, May 19, 2026, Order On Preliminary Objection, UPC_CFI-2228/2025, UPC_CFI-1546/2026
items.summary: The application of the Brussels I Regulation’s (BR) rules to defendants who are not domiciled in a Member State of the UPCA is limited to situations where this is appropriate, regardless of domicile (cf. 71b(2) BR). A prerequisite for accepting jurisdiction is that there must be a connection to the addressed court, which follows from Recitals 13-15 of the BR.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院海牙地方分院就比亚迪系列被告的管辖权初步异议作出裁定。法院指出，《布鲁塞尔条例I》对非UPCA成员国住所被告的适用受限，需存在与受诉法院的充分连接点。仅涉及英国等非UPCA领土且与UPC领土无连接的行为，不能依据该条例第71b条及第8(1)条确立UPC管辖权。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案澄清了UPC在处理跨国被告时的管辖权边界，强调地域连接点的重要性。对于混合住所结构的跨国企业，需关注侵权行为地与法院地的实质联系，以评估UPC诉讼风险及管辖权异议的成功可能性。

items.title: CoA, May 19, 2026, Order On Request For A Discretionary Review, UPC-CoA-67/2026
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭就自由裁量复审申请作出命令
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Order on Discretionary Review in Advanced Standard Communication v Xiaomi
items.summary: When deciding whether to allow a discretionary review, the Court of Appeal must consider whether the impugned order of the Court of First Instance is manifestly erroneous and whether the impugned order raises a fundamental question of law and its review is necessary to ensure a consistent application and interpretation of the Rules of Procedure or any other objective of the discretionary review (CoA, UPC_CoA_489/2024, order of 6 September 2024, Motorola v. Ericsson, para. 4; UPC_CoA_805/2025, or
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭于2026年5月19日发布命令（案号UPC-CoA-67/2026），处理Advanced Standard Communication LLC诉小米公司的侵权诉讼中关于自由裁量复审的请求。法院重申，批准复审需考量一审命令是否明显错误，或是否涉及确保程序规则一致适用的根本法律问题。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal issued an order on May 19, 2026, regarding a request for discretionary review in case UPC-CoA-67/2026. The proceedings involve Advanced Standard Communication LLC and several Xiaomi entities concerning patent EP 3 016 464. The Court reaffirmed the strict criteria under Rule 220.3 of the Rules of Procedure for granting such reviews. It emphasized that leave is only appropriate if the first instance order is manifestly erroneous or raises a fundamental question of law necessary for consistent application of the Rules. This decision aligns with prior precedents, including Motorola v Ericsson and Centripetal v Keysight, reinforcing the high threshold for appellate intervention in interim procedural matters.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This order underscores the limited scope for challenging first instance procedural decisions at the UPC Court of Appeal. Rights holders and defendants should note that discretionary review is not a general appeal mechanism but a safeguard for significant legal errors. Understanding these narrow grounds is essential for managing expectations and resources during ongoing infringement proceedings before the Unified Patent Court.

items.title: LD Hamburg, May 20, 2026, Order On Penalty Payments, UPC_CFI_553/2025
items.title_zh: 汉堡地方法院就UPC案件发布罚款支付令
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Order Clarifies Active Compliance Duties and Third-Party Control in Penalty Proceedings
items.summary: An obligation to refrain from an act also requires a permanent compliance with effective measurements to ensure that the compliance is uninterrupted and permanent, R. 354.4 RoP.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）汉堡地方法院在Occlutech诉Lepu Medical案中发布罚款支付令。裁定指出，不作为义务要求采取有效措施确保持续合规。若仅靠不作为无法消除持续干扰，该义务还包含采取合理措施补救此前造成的干扰。被告需管控受托第三方以确保合规。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division Hamburg issued an order on penalty payments in Occlutech GmbH v Lepu Medical Technology. The court interpreted Rule 354.4 RoP, establishing that an obligation to refrain from infringing acts requires permanent compliance through effective measures. This duty extends beyond mere inaction to include feasible and reasonable acts necessary to remedy continuing disturbances caused by prior infringement. Furthermore, defendants remain liable for controlling third parties assigned tasks or granted authority to execute changes. The ruling emphasizes that uninterrupted compliance is mandatory, and failure to implement adequate monitoring or remedial actions can trigger penalty payments under Article 82(4) UPCA.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies that UPC injunctions impose affirmative duties to dismantle infringing states, not just cease activity. Rights holders can leverage this to demand specific remedial actions, while defendants must audit supply chains and internal processes to prevent indirect breaches via third-party vendors or subsidiaries.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["不作为义务不仅限于静止，还包括采取可行合理措施以补救已造成的持续干扰", "被告必须实施有效措施确保持续合规，并管控受其委托或获权执行变更的第三方", "本案涉及EP专利，程序性质为侵权诉讼中的罚款支付程序，案号为UPC_CFI_553/2…"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Refraining obligations require active, effective measures to ensure permanent and uninterrupted compliance with court orders.", "Defendants must perform reasonable acts to remedy continuing disturbances if mere inaction is insufficient to stop infringement.", "Liability extends to controlling third parties authorized to execute changes or perform tasks on the defendant's behalf."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC裁定强化了禁令持有人的积极作为义务，需主动消除侵权状态而非仅停止行为", "被告对供应链或外包方的管控不力可能导致违反禁令，需将第三方纳入合规监控体系", "后续应关注UPC各地方法院在认定“有效措施”及“合理补救行为”时的具体标准差异"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Injunctions may require active steps to remove infringing products or systems from the market, increasing operational compliance burdens.", "Practice note: Drafting settlement or compliance protocols should explicitly define remedial acts and third-party oversight mechanisms to avoid penalty exposure.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the scope of 'feasible and reasonable' remedial acts and the extent of required third-party due diligence."]
core_points_en: Refraining obligations require active, effective measures to ensure permanent and uninterrupted compliance with court orders.
Defendants must perform reasonable acts to remedy continuing disturbances if mere inaction is insufficient to stop infringement.
Liability extends to controlling third parties authorized to execute changes or perform tasks on the defendant's behalf.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Injunctions may require active steps to remove infringing products or systems from the market, increasing operational compliance burdens.
Practice note: Drafting settlement or compliance protocols should explicitly define remedial acts and third-party oversight mechanisms to avoid penalty exposure.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the scope of 'feasible and reasonable' remedial acts and the extent of required third-party due diligence.

items.title: Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle
items.title_zh: 德国专利局2025统计：申请量增长及司法效率提升
items.title_en: Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle
items.summary: L’Office allemand des brevets et des marques (DPMA) a enregistré une croissance en 2025, en particulier dans les domaines des brevets et des modèles d’utilité, après une baisse observée ces dernières années. Le nombre de dépôts de brevets a atteint 62 050, soit une hausse de 4,7 % par rapport à 2024, tandis que les (suite) L’article Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle est apparu en premier sur Lavoix - Propriété
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利和商标局（DPMA）2025年数据显示，在经历近年下滑后，专利和实用新型领域出现增长。专利申请量达62,050件，较2024年增长4.7%。标题亦提及司法效率有所改善，但正文片段未提供具体细节。

items.title: JUB : confirmation de l’approche COMVIK pour l’activité inventive
items.title_zh: UPC：确认评估创造性时适用COMVIK方法
items.title_en: JUB : confirmation de l’approche COMVIK pour l’activité inventive
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has issued a significant ruling confirming the application of the COMVIK approach for assessing inventive step in patent cases. This decision provides crucial guidance on how technical and non-technical features are evaluated in determining patent validity. The ruling has important implications for patent practitioners and rights holders operating under the UPC system.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院于2026年4月17日作出裁决（UPC_COA_901/2025），确认在评估专利创造性时适用COMVIK方法。裁决指出，尽管用户界面特征可能属于信息呈现，但若改善人机交互可产生技术效果并贡献创造性。该决定明确了技术与非技术特征在专利有效性判定中的评估方式。
items.ai_insight_zh: 此裁决为UPC体系下软件及人机交互类专利的创造性评估提供关键指引。实务中需关注非技术特征与技术特征结合产生的额外技术效果，这对涉及GUI或医疗设备的专利有效性抗辩及撰写策略具有直接参考意义，建议持续追踪后续类似案件的法律适用一致性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院确认COMVIK方法用于评估包含非技术特征的专利创造性", "改善人机交互的用户界面特征可产生技术效果，从而支持创造性认定", "涉案专利涉及血糖仪，其特定UI交互被认定具有技术贡献而非单纯信息呈现"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确COMVIK方法在UPC诉讼中的主导地位，影响技术/非技术特征划分", "GUI特征若改善人机交互效率，可能被认定为具有技术贡献而非排除对象", "需观察UPC后续案件中对“额外技术效果”认定的具体尺度与证据要求"]

items.title: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln
items.title_zh: 智能球门、护腿板及捡球机器人：DPMA更新足球技术画廊
items.title_en: DPMA Expands Football and Technology Gallery for 2026 World Cup
items.summary: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln - Der Ball bleibt rund zur Fußball-Weltmeisterschaft – und die technischen Innovationen gehen rasant weiter. Das Deutsche Patent- und Markenamt hat anlässlich der WM in Kanada, Mexiko und den USA seine Onlinegalerie „Fußball und Technik“ erweitert. Zu entdecken gibt es neben viel diskutierten Innovationen wie Torlinientechnik und Videobeweis auch etliche weniger bekannte Erfindungen, die das Spiel zukünftig verbessern sol
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）借2026年美加墨世界杯之机，扩展其“足球与技术”在线画廊。该画廊收录了全球范围内过去125年间与足球相关的专利文献，涵盖门线技术、视频助理裁判、生物数据监测传感器及AI驱动设备等创新。DPMA旨在通过展示这些发明，强调知识产权保护在挖掘足球领域经济潜力中的重要作用。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has expanded its online gallery, Football and Technology, to coincide with the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico, and the USA. The updated collection features patent documents spanning 125 years of innovation, ranging from early mechanical equipment like screw-in studs to modern digital solutions. New additions include AI-controlled safety nets, ball-collecting robots, smart goals, and intelligent shin guards. The gallery also details established technologies such as goal-line technology and video assistant refereeing. DPMA President Eva Schewior emphasizes that the archive illustrates how intellectual property protection has long served as a crucial instrument for leveraging the economic potential of inventions in both professional and amateur sports.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This update serves primarily as a public awareness initiative rather than a legal precedent. For rights holders, it underscores the DPMA’s view of IP as a key driver for commercializing sports technology. Practitioners may find value in reviewing how the office categorizes emerging fields like wearable sensors and AI-assisted officiating within historical patent contexts.

items.title: CoA, May 22, 2026, Judgement By Default, UPC_CoA_21/2026
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭就缺席判决作出裁决
items.title_en: CoA, May 22, 2026, Judgement By Default, UPC_CoA_21/2026
items.summary: A decision by default against the defendant of the claim or counterclaim may only be given where the facts put forward by the claimant justify the remedy sought and the procedural conduct of the defendant does not preclude giving such decision. R. 355.2 RoP thus only applies when a decision by default is sought “against the defendant of the claim or counterclaim”.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在Suinno诉微软案中作出缺席判决。裁定指出，《程序规则》第355.2条仅适用于针对索赔被告的缺席判决。若上诉人未提供诉讼费用担保且缺席，被上诉人无需举证支持原判，以保护其免受成本无法回收的风险。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了UPC上诉程序中缺席判决与诉讼费用担保的关联。实务中需关注：若对方作为上诉人未履行费用担保义务，被上诉人在程序应对上可主张免除额外的实质举证责任，从而降低诉讼成本风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["《程序规则》第355.2条仅适用于针对索赔或反诉被告的缺席判决情形", "上诉人未提供诉讼费用担保时，被上诉人无需为维持原判而提交事实证据", "此规则旨在保护被上诉人免受因上诉人缺席导致的额外成本无法回收风险"]

items.title: The Price Of Literary Fame – EUIPO Grand Board Refuses Registration Of “GEORGE ORWELL” As A Trademark
items.title_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝注册“GEORGE ORWELL”商标
items.title_en: EUIPO Grand Board Refuses GEORGE ORWELL Trademark for Content-Related Goods
items.summary: In a major decision dated December 19, 2025 (R 2248/2019-G), the Grand Board of Appeal of the EUIPO ruled that the word mark “GEORGE ORWELL” cannot be registered as an EU trade mark (EUTM) for goods and services such as books, films, recorded media, and entertainment, cultural, and educational services. The decision provides important clarification on the registrability of famous persons’ names in cases where such names may be perceived by the relevant public as describing the content or subject
items.ai_summary_zh: 2025年12月19日，EUIPO大上诉委员会裁定，“GEORGE ORWELL”文字商标不得在书籍、电影及相关娱乐教育服务上注册为欧盟商标。委员会认定，相关公众会将该名称视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示，因此依据《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(c)条关于描述性的规定予以驳回。
items.ai_summary_en: The EUIPO Grand Board of Appeal refused registration of the word mark GEORGE ORWELL for books, films, and related services. In decision R 2248/2019-G, the Board ruled that the relevant public perceives the name as describing the subject matter or content of the goods, rather than indicating commercial origin. Consequently, the mark was rejected under Article 7(1)(c) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation for lack of distinctiveness due to descriptiveness. This ruling clarifies that famous persons’ names can constitute descriptive signs when applied to content-oriented products, addressing previous inconsistencies in Office practice regarding the registrability of such names.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision establishes that famous names are not automatically distinctive for content-related goods. Rights holders must demonstrate that the public views the name as a brand identifier, not merely a topic description. Applicants should anticipate heightened scrutiny under Article 7(1)(c) and prepare robust evidence of acquired distinctiveness if pursuing similar marks in publishing or entertainment sectors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”在书籍及娱乐服务上的欧盟商标注册", "委员会认定名人姓名可被视为描述相关商品或服务的内容或主题，而非仅指代人物", "该裁决澄清了《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(c)条中“其他特征”下描述性的适用范围"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["名人姓名在书籍、影视等内容产品上易被认定为描述性标志，缺乏固有显著性", "申请人需准备证据证明商标已通过使用获得显著性，以克服描述性驳回", "后续需关注EUIPO对其他类似名人姓名商标申请的一致性及审查标准变化"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Famous names face higher refusal risks for content-based goods like books and films.", "Practice note: Prove acquired distinctiveness to overcome descriptiveness objections under Article 7(1)(c).", "What to monitor: Future EUIPO consistency in applying this standard to other historical figures."]

Registration refused for GEORGE ORWELL on books, films, and educational services.
Public perception focused on subject matter rather than commercial origin of goods.

What to monitor: Future EUIPO consistency in applying this standard to other historical figures.

items.title: How To File An Opposition At The European Patent Office (EPO)
items.title_zh: 如何在欧洲专利局提起异议
items.title_en: Procedural Guide to Filing Oppositions at the European Patent Office
items.summary: An opposition is a central way for third parties to challenge a granted European patent at the EPO. Understanding the specific legal grounds and procedural requirements is essential for anyone...
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文介绍向欧洲专利局提起专利异议的程序。异议须书面或电子提交并缴费，仅限依据《欧洲专利公约》第100条规定的理由，包括缺乏可专利性、公开不充分及新增主题。明确排除清晰度、单一性等非独立异议理由。
items.ai_summary_en: This guidance outlines the procedural requirements for filing oppositions against granted European patents at the EPO. Opponents must submit a notice in writing or electronically via Online Filing 2.0, ensuring the official fee is paid simultaneously. Challenges are strictly limited to grounds under Article 100 EPC: lack of patentability, insufficient disclosure, or added subject matter. The text clarifies that exclusions such as mathematical methods or medical treatments fall under patentability checks. It emphasizes that each ground must be clearly identified during filing, reinforcing that opposition is a centralized mechanism for third parties to contest validity based on specific statutory criteria rather than general grievances.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This overview reinforces the strict statutory limits of EPO opposition proceedings. Practitioners must ensure arguments align exclusively with Article 100 EPC grounds, avoiding inadmissible issues like clarity. Proper fee payment and clear ground identification are critical procedural steps to maintain admissibility and effectively challenge patent validity in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["异议须向欧洲专利局书面或电子提交，并在提交时缴纳官方费用", "异议理由限于公约第100条：缺乏可专利性、公开不充分或新增主题", "清晰度、单一性或优先权无效等问题不得作为独立异议理由提出"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.", "Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.", "Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["异议程序具有严格的法定理由限制，非任意挑战工具", "需准确识别第100条规定的三类核心异议 grounds", "注意审查阶段争议点与异议阶段可受理理由的差异"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.", "Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.", "What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure."]
core_points_en: Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.
Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.
Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.
Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.
What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure.

items.title: Court of Appeal clarifies signature requirements and permits retroactive extensions under the UPC
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭澄清签名要求并允许追溯延期
items.title_en: Court of Appeal clarifies signature requirements and permits retroactive extensions under the UPC
items.summary: SharkNinja v Groupe SEB (CoA, 22 May 2026) addresses UPC signature requirements and the scope of Rule 9.3(a) RoP on time extensions.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在SharkNinja诉Groupe SEB案中裁定，通过案件管理系统提交的文件必须包含电子签名，仅登录认证不足。同时确认程序规则允许真正的追溯性期限延长，即使申请在截止后提出。此外，就涉及第三方敏感市场数据的保密俱乐部提供了指导。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了统一专利法院对文件形式要件的严格标准，强化了法律确定性要求。同时，确认追溯延期的可行性为当事人补救程序瑕疵提供了空间。实务中需关注电子签名嵌入的具体操作规范，以及保密俱乐部在敏感数据披露中的适用边界，以确保程序合规。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["程序文件本身须含电子签名，仅系统登录认证不足以确立文件内容的法律归属", "程序规则允许真正的追溯性期限延长，包括在原始截止日期届满后提出的延期请求", "就涉及商业敏感第三方市场数据的情形，提供了关于保密俱乐部适用的实务指导"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确电子签名需嵌入文件本身，而非仅依赖系统身份验证，影响文件准备流程", "确认逾期申请延期的可能性，为程序失误提供补救路径，但需符合规则条件", "需持续观察上诉庭在保密俱乐部及敏感数据处理上的后续判例倾向"]

items.summary: Plusieurs nouvelles extensions de noms de domaine (TLDs) sont actuellement ouvertes à l’enregistrement, offrant aux titulaires de marques l’opportunité de sécuriser leurs noms stratégiques avant leur ouverture au grand public.

items.title: 'Touch your boobs' not contrary to accepted principles of morality
items.title_zh: “Touch your boobs”不违反公序良俗原则
items.title_en: EUIPO Board of Appeal Rules 'Touch Your Boobs' Not Contrary to Morality
items.summary: On 7 May, the Fifth Board of Appeal (BoA) of the EUIPO held that the word mark “TOUCH YOUR BOOBS” is not contrary to public policy or to accepted principles of morality under Article 7(1)(f) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation (EUTMR). Contrary to the examiner, the BoA found that the mark would not be perceived as an unduly sexual or offensive phrase.BackgroundIn July 2025, Katjes Fassin GmbH and Co.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局第五上诉委员会于5月7日裁定，文字商标“TOUCH YOUR BOOBS”不违反《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(f)条规定的公共政策或公认道德准则。上诉委员会认为该标志不会被感知为过度色情或冒犯性短语，推翻了审查员的反对意见。申请人背景涉及Katjes Fassin公司。
items.ai_summary_en: The EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal ruled that the word mark “TOUCH YOUR BOOBS” does not violate Article 7(1)(f) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation. Issued on 7 May, the decision overturns an examiner’s refusal based on public policy and accepted principles of morality. The Board determined that the relevant public would not perceive the phrase as unduly sexual or offensive. The application was filed by Katjes Fassin GmbH and Co. This judgment highlights the Board’s assessment of contemporary social standards when evaluating potentially controversial verbal marks for registration within the European Union trademark system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling illustrates the EUIPO’s contextual approach to morality refusals, emphasizing current social perceptions over rigid prohibitions. For practitioners, it suggests that colloquial or provocative terms may survive examination if they lack explicit vulgarity. Rights holders should monitor how Boards evaluate evolving linguistic norms and public tolerance for non-traditional branding expressions in the EU market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟知识产权局第五上诉委员会裁定该商标不违反公序良俗条款", "委员会认定该短语不会被相关公众视为过度色情或具有冒犯性", "该裁决推翻了审查员此前基于道德理由提出的驳回意见"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal rejected the Article 7(1)(f) refusal for the mark.", "The Board found the phrase not unduly sexual or offensive to the public.", "The decision overturns the examiner’s initial objection based on accepted morality principles."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟商标审查中对“公序良俗”的认定倾向于结合当下社会语境进行动态评估", "需持续观察上诉委员会对带有性暗示但非直接淫秽词汇的容忍度变化趋势", "申请含争议性词汇商标时，应准备关于社会接受度及非冒犯性感知的论证材料"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands using provocative or colloquial language may face lower registration hurdles if perceived as humorous rather than obscene.", "Practice note: Arguments against Article 7(1)(f) refusals should focus on contemporary social acceptance and lack of undue offensiveness.", "What to monitor: Future Board decisions assessing the threshold for 'unduly sexual' content in verbal marks across different product classes."]
core_points_en: EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal rejected the Article 7(1)(f) refusal for the mark.
The Board found the phrase not unduly sexual or offensive to the public.
The decision overturns the examiner’s initial objection based on accepted morality principles.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands using provocative or colloquial language may face lower registration hurdles if perceived as humorous rather than obscene.
Practice note: Arguments against Article 7(1)(f) refusals should focus on contemporary social acceptance and lack of undue offensiveness.
What to monitor: Future Board decisions assessing the threshold for 'unduly sexual' content in verbal marks across different product classes.

items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
items.summary: Update on ISO certifications for quality, information security, occupational health & safety, and environment management systems. ISO certifications for quality, information security, environmental management systems.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
items.ai_summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls within a unified framework, the EPO aims to ensure the consistent delivery of high-quality services and support continuous improvement across all operational domains.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
items.ai_insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While this does not alter immediate filing strategies or enforcement options, it reinforces confidence in the continuity and integrity of EPO services.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核", "维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健", "通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.", "Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.", "The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障", "Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响", "What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…", "Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.", "What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards."]
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

items.title: Highlights from the latest meeting of the SACEPO Working Party on Quality
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局SACEPO质量工作组最新会议亮点
items.title_en: EPO SACEPO Quality Meeting Highlights: 2026 Plan and AI Integration
items.summary: The EPO hosted a lively SACEPO Working Party on Quality meeting on 8 May 2026. Key topics included the Quality Action Plan for 2026, how AI can improve quality at the EPO, and how SACEPO members are currently employing AI.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局于2026年5月8日举办第16届SACEPO质量工作组会议，71名代表参会。会议重点讨论2026年质量行动计划进展、人工智能在提升审查质量中的应用及风险管控。局长强调质量为核心优先事项，并介绍了AI辅助起草工具等内部开发项目，旨在增强效率同时确保人类决策责任。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office hosted the 16th SACEPO Working Party on Quality meeting on 8 May 2026, with 71 global representatives. Discussions centered on the 2026 Quality Action Plan, reviewing 2025 achievements in prior art access and examination harmonization. The EPO detailed its integration of artificial intelligence tools to enhance quality and efficiency, including applications in pre-search, oral proceedings minutes, and stakeholder queries. A new AI-supported drafting assistant for examiners was also highlighted. Participants acknowledged progress in consolidating best practices within Active Search Divisions and strengthening opposition division learning. The EPO emphasized structured dialogue and announced the forthcoming 2026/2027 user satisfaction survey, reinforcing quality as the core priority of the European patent system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The EPO is actively embedding AI into examination workflows to support, not replace, human decision-making. For practitioners, this signals potential shifts in the speed and structure of office actions. While efficiency gains are anticipated, maintaining rigorous argumentation remains critical as examiners utilize new drafting aids. Stakeholders should observe how these tools influence the consistency of examination outcomes and the clarity of reasoned decisions across different technical fields.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["会议回顾2025年质量成果，包括现有技术获取改善及审查实践协调进展", "推进2026年质量行动计划，巩固主动检索部门最佳实践并加强异议部门学习", "整合AI工具支持预检索及文书起草，坚持以人为本，确保审查员承担最终决策责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO reviewed 2025 quality results, highlighting improvements in prior art access and examination practice harmonization.", "The 2026 Quality Action Plan focuses on consolidating Active Search Division best practices and opposition training.", "AI tools are being integrated for pre-search, drafting assistance, and legal platform responses to boost efficiency."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧专局确立AI辅助审查的“人机协同”边界，强调人类对最终决定的全部责任", "质量行动计划持续推动审查实践协调，可能减少不同技术领域间的审查标准差异", "需持续观察AI工具在异议程序及用户互动平台中的具体应用效果及反馈机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: AI-assisted examination may accelerate procedural steps, requiring timely and precise responses to maintain prosecution momentum.", "Practice note: Examiners using AI drafting assistants may produce more standardized office actions; clear, distinct arguments remain essential for overcoming rejections.", "What to monitor: Track the impact of AI tools on examination consistency and the EPO’s future guidance on algorithmic transparency in decision-making."]
core_points_en: EPO reviewed 2025 quality results, highlighting improvements in prior art access and examination practice harmonization.
The 2026 Quality Action Plan focuses on consolidating Active Search Division best practices and opposition training.
AI tools are being integrated for pre-search, drafting assistance, and legal platform responses to boost efficiency.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: AI-assisted examination may accelerate procedural steps, requiring timely and precise responses to maintain prosecution momentum.
Practice note: Examiners using AI drafting assistants may produce more standardized office actions; clear, distinct arguments remain essential for overcoming rejections.
What to monitor: Track the impact of AI tools on examination consistency and the EPO’s future guidance on algorithmic transparency in decision-making.

items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
items.summary: Key changes in the Swiss Patent Act include a mandatory prior-art search, optional full substantive examination, the acceptance of English-language technical documents and a new appeal system. In March 2024, the Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing new features to the Swiss patent system. The Swiss government, as supported by […] The post Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
items.ai_summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.

core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

items.title: Obelix conquers Luxembourg

items.title_en: Obelix conquers Luxembourg
items.summary: Asterix and Obelix conquered the entire Roman Empire with their wits and fists by mastering twelve Herculean tasks. Since this does not work outside films and comics, someone thought it would be a good idea to protect "Obelix" as a trade mark for weapons. In Les Éditions Albert René v EUIPO (case T‑24/25), the General Court dealt with the question whether the reputation of the "Obelix" trade mark
items.ai_summary_zh: 在Les Éditions Albert René诉EUIPO案（T‑24/25）中，欧盟普通法院审理了“奥贝利克斯”商标声誉问题。该案涉及试图将知名漫画角色名称注册为武器类商标的争议，法院需判定该商标在相关类别上的声誉保护范围及有效性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了驰名商标跨类保护的边界问题，特别是当申请商品（武器）与原知名领域（漫画/娱乐）存在巨大差异时。需关注法院如何权衡商标声誉的辐射范围与公共利益，这对IP权利人进行品牌延伸策略具有参考意义。

items.title: SACEPO WP/G discusses outcomes of user consultation on the Guidelines 2026
items.title_zh: 欧专局讨论2026指南用户咨询结果及2027修订方向
items.title_en: EPO SACEPO Reviews 2026 Guidelines Consultation and Outlines 2027 Updates
items.summary: The SACEPO WP/G members met to discuss the responses to the public user consultation on the EPC, PCT-EPO, and the UP Guidelines
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧专局SACEPO工作组于5月12日会议讨论2026版审查指南（含EPC、PCT-EPO及统一专利指南）的用户咨询反馈。咨询共获307条意见，主要关注EPC指南。会议还展望2027版更新，包括支持无纸化流程的法律变更、可能强制要求指明修改依据，以及引入统一专利法院上诉法院判例。此外，讨论了G 1/24决定实施、抗体创造性、分案申请及异议程序等议题。
items.ai_summary_en: The SACEPO Working Party on Guidelines discussed feedback from the public consultation on the 2026 EPC, PCT-EPO, and Unitary Patent Guidelines. The consultation received 307 comments, primarily from European patent representatives focusing on the EPC Guidelines. The EPO outlined planned updates for the 2027 edition, supporting the transition to a fully paperless granting process by April 2027. Proposed changes include potential obligations to indicate the basis for amendments during European phase entry and opposition proceedings. Additionally, the EPO intends to incorporate references to Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal decisions into the EPC Guidelines. Discussions also covered the implementation of Enlarged Board of Appeal decision G 1/24 and ongoing considerations for G 1/25.
items.ai_insight_zh: 欧专局正通过指南修订强化程序简化与质量管控，特别是适应无纸化转型及统一专利法院判例体系。从业者需密切关注2027版指南关于修改依据指明的潜在义务，以及UPC判例对EPC审查实践的具体影响，同时留意抗体可专利性及分案异议程序的后续澄清。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should prepare for procedural shifts in the 2027 Guidelines, particularly regarding mandatory amendment bases and UPC case law integration. The inclusion of UPC decisions signals closer alignment between EPO practice and unitary patent jurisprudence. Monitoring the final text on amendment requirements is essential for drafting strategies in European phase entries and oppositions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["指南咨询获307条反馈，主要涉及EPC指南，反映用户积极参与", "版指南拟支持2027年4月全面无纸化，或强制要求指明修改依据", "计划在EPC指南中引用统一专利法院上诉法院判例，并持续讨论G 1/25实施"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["SACEPO reviewed 307 user comments on the 2026 Guidelines, with significant focus on EPC examination practices.", "The 2027 Guidelines will support full paperless processing and may mandate indicating amendment bases in specific proceedings.", "EPO plans to reference UPC Court of Appeal decisions in the EPC Guidelines and clarify G 1/24 implementation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注2027指南中关于进入欧洲阶段及异议程序中指明修改依据的潜在强制义务", "监测UPC上诉法院判例被纳入EPC指南后的具体引用方式及对审查标准的影响", "留意抗体创造性、分案申请及异议辅助请求准入等议题在收敛实践计划下的后续更新"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: The integration of UPC Court of Appeal decisions into EPO Guidelines may influence claim interpretation and validity assessments across both systems.", "Practice note: Anticipate stricter formal requirements for indicating amendment bases during European phase entry and opposition proceedings under the 2027 revisions.", "What to monitor: Final wording of the 2027 Guidelines regarding G 1/25 implementation and the specific scope of UPC case law references."]
core_points_en: SACEPO reviewed 307 user comments on the 2026 Guidelines, with significant focus on EPC examination practices.
The 2027 Guidelines will support full paperless processing and may mandate indicating amendment bases in specific proceedings.
EPO plans to reference UPC Court of Appeal decisions in the EPC Guidelines and clarify G 1/24 implementation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The integration of UPC Court of Appeal decisions into EPO Guidelines may influence claim interpretation and validity assessments across both systems.
Practice note: Anticipate stricter formal requirements for indicating amendment bases during European phase entry and opposition proceedings under the 2027 revisions.
What to monitor: Final wording of the 2027 Guidelines regarding G 1/25 implementation and the specific scope of UPC case law references.

items.title: UK court observes “evidentiary void” in withdrawn Qualcomm 'no licence, no chips' claim
items.title_zh: 英法院指出高通撤回索赔案存在“证据真空”
items.title_en: UK Tribunal Notes Evidentiary Void in Withdrawn Qualcomm Collective Action
items.summary: The Competition Appeal Tribunal has approved the scrapping of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim, flagging an absence of witnesses from Apple and Samsung and lacking evidence of refusal to supply
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销一项价值4.8亿英镑的退出制集体诉讼索赔。法庭指出该案存在“证据真空”，包括缺乏苹果和三星的证人证言，以及缺乏拒绝供应的证据。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Competition Appeal Tribunal has approved the discontinuance of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm. In its decision, the Tribunal highlighted a significant evidentiary void, specifically noting the absence of witness testimony from key industry players Apple and Samsung. Furthermore, the court observed a lack of concrete evidence demonstrating a refusal to supply chips. This procedural outcome underscores the challenges plaintiffs face in substantiating large-scale antitrust claims without direct corroborative evidence from major downstream manufacturers or clear proof of supply refusals.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling highlights the stringent evidentiary standards applied by the UK Competition Appeal Tribunal in complex collective actions. The explicit reference to an evidentiary void suggests that claims relying on broad market allegations may fail without specific testimony from major commercial partners. For rights holders and defendants, this reinforces the importance of scrutinizing the factual basis of collective certifications, particularly regarding supply chain dynamics and witness availability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销针对高通的4.8亿英镑集体诉讼索赔", "法庭指出案件缺乏苹果和三星的关键证人证言", "法庭认定现有材料缺乏证明高通拒绝供应芯片的证据"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Competition Appeal Tribunal approved withdrawal of £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm.", "Court identified absence of witness testimony from key downstream entities Apple and Samsung.", "Tribunal noted lack of sufficient evidence proving refusal to supply chips by Qualcomm."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["SEP反垄断诉讼中，原告需提供下游关键厂商的直接证言以支撑损害主张", "缺乏“拒绝供应”的直接证据是导致此类集体诉讼失败的关键因素", "需观察该裁决是否提高英国法院对SEP滥用市场支配地位指控的证据门槛"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Demonstrates the high burden for plaintiffs to secure direct witness evidence from major downstream customers in collective proceedings.", "Practice note: Tribunals may closely examine the completeness of evidence regarding refusal to supply before allowing claims to proceed to trial.", "What to monitor: Future CAT decisions to see if this evidentiary scrutiny becomes a standard threshold for certifying or maintaining opt-out collective actions."]
core_points_en: Competition Appeal Tribunal approved withdrawal of £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm.
Court identified absence of witness testimony from key downstream entities Apple and Samsung.
Tribunal noted lack of sufficient evidence proving refusal to supply chips by Qualcomm.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates the high burden for plaintiffs to secure direct witness evidence from major downstream customers in collective proceedings.
Practice note: Tribunals may closely examine the completeness of evidence regarding refusal to supply before allowing claims to proceed to trial.
What to monitor: Future CAT decisions to see if this evidentiary scrutiny becomes a standard threshold for certifying or maintaining opt-out collective actions.

items.title: Importance du contentieux des marques devant le Tribunal de l’Union
items.title_zh: 欧盟普通法院发布2025年商标诉讼统计数据
items.title_en: Importance du contentieux des marques devant le Tribunal de l’Union
items.summary: Le Tribunal de l’Union vient de publier ses statistiques 2025 accompagnées d’une présentation par son greffier : Statistiques 2025 du Tribunal . Le contentieux de la propriété intellectuelle, en particulier des marques de l’Union, représente l’un des blocs les plus importants et les plus intensifs d’activité du Tribunal. 1. Volume et poids du contentieux PI devant le Tribunal En 2025, 989 affaires ont été introduites devant le Tribunal, dont 257 en matière de propriété intellectuelle (marques, d
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院发布2025年司法统计，知识产权案件占新收案件的26%（257件），其中绝大多数为针对EUIPO上诉委员会决定的撤销之诉。IP案件平均审理周期约13-14个月，显著低于法院整体平均水平，显示此类案件处理流程相对标准化且高效。
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示欧盟商标诉讼具有高频、标准化的特征，审理效率较高。对于涉及EUIPO决定的当事人而言，司法审查周期相对可控，可作为评估维权或应诉时间成本的重要参考依据。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年新收IP案件257件，占总数26%；结案303件，期末未决276件", "IP案件主要源于对EUIPO上诉委员会关于欧盟商标及外观设计决定的不服", "IP案件平均审理时长约13-14个月，远低于法院所有案件平均的22个月"]
