items.title: CD Milan, April 10, 2026, Revocation Action, UPC_CFI_480/2025
items.title_zh: UPC米兰分院撤销诉讼判决要点分析
items.title_en: UPC Milan Revokes Patent: Novelty Mapping, Claim Construction, and Restructuring Requirements
items.summary: When assessing novelty, the Court will examine the disclosure of the prior art document overall and will compare this disclosure to the scope of the patent-in-suit. If one way of “mapping” leads...
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析UPC米兰分院在Fisher & Paykel案中的最终决定。法院指出，若现有技术映射破坏新颖性，专利须被撤销。法院独立进行权利要求解释，不受专家意见约束。专利权人需主动提交重构的权利要求组，法院不会依职权维持从属权利要求。辅助请求仅需满足最低可受理性门槛。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Milan revoked the patent-in-suit in Fisher & Paykel, establishing critical procedural and substantive standards. The Court held that if any legitimate mapping of prior art onto claim features destroys novelty under Article 54 EPC, the patent must be invalidated. Assessment focuses on the overall technical disclosure and function rather than component labels. Purpose-related features require only objective suitability, not mandatory inclusion. Crucially, the Court affirmed that claim construction is a matter of law, determined independently without binding expert opinions. Furthermore, the Court refused to maintain validity based on unamended dependent claims because the defendant failed to submit formally restructured claim sets or independently defend their validity. This highlights strict adherence to party requests under Article 76 UPCA.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC诉讼中专利权人的积极举证责任，特别是权利要求重构的程序要求。实务中需注意，仅依赖从属权利要求的依赖性不足以维持专利有效性，必须形式上重新构建。此外，辅助请求的可受理性标准较低，但实质性合规仍需在后续阶段证明。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies strict procedural requirements for defending patents at the UPC. Parties must proactively submit formally restructured claim sets rather than relying on the dependency of invalid independent claims. The Court’s independence in claim construction means expert opinions are persuasive but not binding. For auxiliary requests, meeting the admissibility threshold requires only minimal compliant explanations. Practitioners should ensure robust initial drafting with clear technical features to withstand rigorous novelty assessments focused on functional disclosure rather than semantic labels. Strategic preparation of alternative claim configurations is essential to avoid forfeiture of protection due to procedural oversights during litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院评估新颖性时整体考察现有技术披露，若任一映射方式破坏新颖性即撤销专利", "权利要求解释属法律问题，法院独立判定，不受当事人提交的专家意见约束", "专利权人须主动提交符合法律要求的重构权利要求组，法院不依职权维持未修改的从属权利要求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Novelty assessment examines overall technical disclosure; any valid mapping destroying novelty mandates revocation regardless of component labels.", "Claim construction is a legal matter determined independently by the Court, which is not bound by party-submitted expert declarations.", "Patentees must actively submit restructured claim sets; Courts will not maintain patents based solely on unamended dependent claims."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确专利权人在UPC程序中需主动重构权利要求，法院不代劳", "专家意见在权利要求解释中仅作为参考，不具法律约束力", "辅助请求的可受理性门槛较低，只需提供初步合规理由即可"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Proactive submission of restructured claim sets is essential; reliance on dependent claim dependency is insufficient for maintaining patent validity.", "Practice note: Prepare minimally compliant explanations for auxiliary requests to satisfy admissibility thresholds efficiently during UPC proceedings.", "What to monitor: Judicial emphasis on technical function over labels in novelty assessments, requiring precise drafting of purpose-related features."]
core_points_en: Novelty assessment examines overall technical disclosure; any valid mapping destroying novelty mandates revocation regardless of component labels.
Claim construction is a legal matter determined independently by the Court, which is not bound by party-submitted expert declarations.
Patentees must actively submit restructured claim sets; Courts will not maintain patents based solely on unamended dependent claims.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Proactive submission of restructured claim sets is essential; reliance on dependent claim dependency is insufficient for maintaining patent validity.
Practice note: Prepare minimally compliant explanations for auxiliary requests to satisfy admissibility thresholds efficiently during UPC proceedings.
What to monitor: Judicial emphasis on technical function over labels in novelty assessments, requiring precise drafting of purpose-related features.

items.title: UPC: Supplementing Expert Opinion After Inspection Not Possible
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分部裁定：检查后不得补充专家意见
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Division Denies Supplementary Expert Opinion Following Ex-Parte Inspection
items.summary: The Düsseldorf local division of the Unified Patent Court has ruled on a defendant's request for a supplementary expert opinion following an ex-parte inspection order.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在UPC_CFI_1325/2025案中裁定，驳回被告要求法院委任专家就单方证据保全出具补充意见的请求。法院指出，被告可通过《程序规则》第197.3条申请审查以保障程序权利，且该专家非第187条规定的“法院专家”，无法律依据支持补充报告。证据保全旨在快速获取信息以决定是否起诉，实质准确性异议应在后续主程序中提出。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf local division rejected a defendant’s request for a supplementary expert opinion after an ex-parte evidence preservation order. In case UPC_CFI_1325/2025, the panel held that no legal basis existed for such a supplement, distinguishing the court-commissioned inspector from a formal ‘court expert’ under Rule 187 of the Rules of Procedure. The court emphasized that evidence preservation aims to provide prompt information for assessing further action, with substantive accuracy challenges reserved for main proceedings. While denying the request, the judges noted specific technical questions regarding the expert’s sketches and access to protective letters, indicating these issues may be revisited during subsequent litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇单方证据保全时，应聚焦于利用Rule 197.3申请审查而非纠缠补充报告。需重视保全阶段的策略应对，因实质抗辩将延至主程序。建议提前准备技术对比分析，确保在主程序中有效反驳专家初步结论，避免程序被动。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the procedural boundaries between expedited evidence preservation and full merits adjudication at the UPC. Rights holders and defendants should recognize that ex-parte inspections are designed for speed, not finality. Challenges to technical findings must be strategically deferred to the main action. However, courts may still record specific factual queries during preservation, which can influence later stages if not adequately addressed in the primary litigation phase.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["驳回单方保全后补充专家意见请求，明确缺乏法律依据", "区分法院委任专家与法定法院专家，排除当事人评论权", "保全程序侧重效率，实体争议留待主程序解决"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The court denied the request for a supplementary expert report, finding no legal basis under the Rules of Procedure for such an addition post-inspection.", "The appointed expert was not classified as a 'court expert' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lacked the procedural right to comment on the initial report.", "Substantive objections to the detailed description or technical accuracy must be raised in subsequent main proceedings rather than during preservation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用Rule 197.3申请审查替代补充专家意见诉求", "将实质性技术抗辩保留至主程序阶段集中发力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties involved in ex-parte preservation orders cannot rely on supplementary expert reports to correct perceived inaccuracies immediately; strategic planning mu…", "Practice note: Focus procedural efforts on Rule 197.3 reviews for immediate relief, while preparing robust technical counter-arguments for the main proceedings where substantive a…", "What to monitor: How UPC panels handle recorded technical questions from preservation phases when they resurface in main actions, particularly regarding expert access to prior pro…"]
core_points_en: The court denied the request for a supplementary expert report, finding no legal basis under the Rules of Procedure for such an addition post-inspection.
The appointed expert was not classified as a 'court expert' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lacked the procedural right to comment on the initial report.
Substantive objections to the detailed description or technical accuracy must be raised in subsequent main proceedings rather than during preservation.

items.title: UPC Orders Infringer To Publish Decision On Their Website
items.title_zh: UPC责令侵权方在其网站公布判决
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Orders Infringer to Publish Judgment on Website to Correct Misleading Statements
items.summary: A landmark ruling from the Düsseldorf Local Division demonstrates the Unified Patent Court's willingness to compel defendants to publicly correct misleading statements about patent disputes on their own platforms.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫分院在案件UPC_CFI_351/2024中作出里程碑式裁决。依据《统一专利法院协议》第80条，法院责令被告在其企业网站发布判决主文一个月，以纠正其此前宣称产品不侵权造成的公众误解。此举旨在确保约8000名客户获知侵权事实，费用由侵权方承担。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf Local Division issued a significant ruling in case UPC_CFI_351/2024, emphasizing the court's authority to enforce transparency when defendants distort legal realities. Citing Article 80 of the Unified Patent Court Agreement (UPCA), the court ordered the infringing defendants to publish the operative part of the judgment on their corporate websites for one month. This measure aimed to rectify false public impressions created by the defendants' prior statements claiming non-infringement and legality of their distribution activities. By mandating this publication at the infringer's expense, the court sought to accurately inform approximately 8,000 customers about the infringement finding. The decision also permitted the claimant to publish the ruling in five industry journals, establishing a clear precedent for using public disclosure as a restorative remedy to counteract misleading corporate communications during patent disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了UPC利用公开判决作为矫正性救济措施的实践先例。当被告通过公开声明扭曲诉讼现实时，法院倾向于采取强制性披露手段恢复市场认知。实务中需关注此类“纠正性宣传”命令的适用门槛及其对被告商业声誉的具体影响，监测后续类似案件中法院对发布范围与期限的裁量标准。
items.ai_insight_en: Litigants involved in European patent disputes must carefully coordinate legal strategies with public relations efforts. Making explicit non-infringement claims or asserting confidence in product legality while litigation is pending carries significant risk if the court ultimately finds infringement. Courts may view such statements as creating misleading public impressions that require direct correction through mandatory publication of adverse judgments. Companies should establish robust internal protocols ensuring that all external marketing and communication materials are reviewed by legal counsel. Failure to align public messaging with legal realities can result in additional reputational damage and specific judicial sanctions, such as forced disclosure of unfavorable rulings on corporate platforms.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC杜塞尔多夫分院依据UPCA第80条，有权责令侵权方自费传播判决信息以消除误导", "被告曾在官网宣称产品合法非侵权，法院认定该行为造成公众误解需直接纠正", "法院除允许原告在行业期刊刊登判决外，更责令被告在官网发布判决主文一个月"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Düsseldorf Local Division mandates defendants to publish the judgment on their website to correct misleading non-infringement claims made during litigation.", "The court invoked Article 80 UPCA to order public dissemination of the decision as a restorative measure, ensuring accurate information reaches affected customers.", "This ruling reinforces the Unified Patent Court's judicial power to compel infringers to disclose information and rectify false public perceptions regarding patent validity."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC展现出利用公开判决纠正被告误导性公关声明的司法倾向，强化透明度要求", "依据UPCA第80条的纠正性措施不仅限于传统媒体，已延伸至被告自有数字平台", "需持续观察法院在判定“公众误解”程度及决定发布期限时的具体考量因素"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid issuing definitive non-infringement marketing claims during active litigation to prevent potential orders for mandatory publication of adverse judgments.", "Practice note: Implement strict coordination mechanisms between legal and marketing departments to ensure all public statements remain compliant with ongoing legal proceedings.", "What to monitor: Watch for further applications of Article 80 UPCA by UPC divisions, particularly regarding the scope of corrective measures for misleading corporate communication…"]
core_points_en: UPC Düsseldorf Local Division mandates defendants to publish the judgment on their website to correct misleading non-infringement claims made during litigation.
The court invoked Article 80 UPCA to order public dissemination of the decision as a restorative measure, ensuring accurate information reaches affected customers.
This ruling reinforces the Unified Patent Court's judicial power to compel infringers to disclose information and rectify false public perceptions regarding patent validity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid issuing definitive non-infringement marketing claims during active litigation to prevent potential orders for mandatory publication of adverse judgments.
Practice note: Implement strict coordination mechanisms between legal and marketing departments to ensure all public statements remain compliant with ongoing legal proceedings.
What to monitor: Watch for further applications of Article 80 UPCA by UPC divisions, particularly regarding the scope of corrective measures for misleading corporate communication…

items.title: Business and Professional Women Europe visits the EPO
items.title_zh: 欧洲职业女性协会代表团访问欧洲专利局
items.title_en: EPO and BPW Europe Discuss Gender Equality and Inclusive Innovation Strategies
items.summary: On 24 April 2026, members of the EU branch of the International Federation of Business & Professional Women (BPW) were welcomed at the EPO.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月24日，欧洲职业女性协会（BPW Europe）代表团访问位于慕尼黑的欧洲专利局（EPO）。双方就构建包容性创新生态系统进行交流，EPO重申支持STEM领域女性发展的措施，包括青年专业人才计划及2028年女性员工占比达40%的目标。会议期间，EPO还向代表团介绍了专利对初创企业及中小企业的益处及相关外展活动。
items.ai_summary_en: On 24 April 2026, a delegation from Business and Professional Women (BPW) Europe visited the European Patent Office in Munich. EPO Vice-President Nellie Simon and BPW Regional Coordinator Anu Viks discussed strategies to foster a more inclusive innovation ecosystem. The EPO highlighted its commitment to gender equality, including a target of at least 40 percent female workforce participation by 2028. Initiatives such as the Young Professionals Programme and Girl's Day were presented as key measures to support women in STEM. The meeting also featured an Observatory presentation on the study “Advancing women in STEM,” which tracks female career progression in patenting and research, emphasizing the need to address persistent gaps through policy engagement and mentorship.
items.ai_insight_zh: EPO持续将多样性政策融入机构战略，并通过具体指标（如女性员工比例）强化执行。对于关注欧洲专利生态的企业而言，EPO对中小企业及初创公司的专利支持政策是其近期对外沟通的重点，反映出机构在维持传统审查职能之外，正积极拓展其在创新扶持层面的角色。
items.ai_insight_en: This engagement underscores the EPO’s strategic focus on diversity as a driver for competitive innovation. For rights holders and corporate IP teams, understanding these institutional priorities may inform collaborations or participation in EPO-led diversity initiatives. Monitoring the outcomes of the “Advancing women in STEM” study could reveal emerging trends in female inventorship, potentially influencing future policy adjustments or targeted support programs for underrepresented groups in the European patent system.

items.title: LD Mannheim, April 20, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1291/2026, Anti-Anti Suit Injunction Against “Interim Licence” Application Before Chinese Court
items.title_zh: 曼海姆地院就UPC案发布针对中国临时许可申请的反反诉禁令
items.title_en: UPC Mannheim Issues Anti-Anti-Suit Injunction Against Chinese Court Interim Licence
items.summary: The UPC has jurisdiction to issue an AASI to secure pending patent infringement proceedings before the UPC (Art. 31, 32(1)(c), 33(1)(a) UPCA) (mn. 16 et seq.)
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）有权签发反反诉禁令以保全 pending 侵权诉讼。全球“临时许可”若旨在阻止专利权人在外国（含UPC）行使权利，实质构成反诉禁令。曼海姆地院认定此类措施违反国际民事诉讼基本原则，且非保护中国费率设定所必需，故支持签发禁令以维护UPC管辖权及专利执行权。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Local Division in Mannheim ruled that it possesses jurisdiction to issue an anti-anti-suit injunction (AASI) to protect pending patent infringement proceedings under Articles 31, 32(1)(c), and 33(1)(a) of the UPC Agreement. The Court determined that applying for a foreign injunction to prevent a patentee from enforcing rights within UPC Contracting States constitutes imminent infringement. Consequently, a worldwide 'Interim Licence' granted by a Chinese court was characterized as a de facto anti-suit injunction designed to block injunctive relief in foreign forums, including the UPC. This ruling reinforces the UPC’s authority to secure its judicial remedies against parallel foreign proceedings that undermine its jurisdiction in standard-essential patent disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确UPC将全球“临时许可”定性为变相反诉禁令，强调专利执行权是专利权核心。实务中需关注UPC与成员国法院在跨境SEP禁令冲突中的管辖权协调，以及对中国法院保全措施在欧洲的承认与执行界限。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision signals that reliance on foreign rate-setting orders or interim licences to halt UPC litigation is increasingly ineffective. Parties involved in cross-border SEP disputes should reassess strategies that directly challenge UPC jurisdiction through parallel foreign proceedings. Instead, focusing on robust FRAND compliance defenses and engaging in good-faith settlement negotiations may offer more viable pathways to resolve conflicts. Ignoring this shift risks severe financial sanctions and potential market access restrictions due to non-compliance with UPC orders, necessitating a recalibration of global litigation tactics.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC依据UPCA第31、32条有权签发反反诉禁令，以保全pending侵权诉讼中的专…", "旨在阻止专利权人在UPC等外国论坛寻求禁令的全球“临时许可”，实质构成反诉禁令", "平行向中国法院申请反反诉禁令不产生未决诉讼效力，因涉及不同知识产权主张"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC has jurisdiction to issue an AASI to safeguard pending infringement actions under Articles 31, 32, and 33 UPCA.", "Foreign applications aiming to block UPC enforcement constitute imminent infringement justifying interim relief measures.", "A Chinese global interim licence is substantively an anti-suit injunction violating international civil procedure principles."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC倾向于将阻碍其管辖范围内专利执行的境外保全措施视为侵权威胁", "需持续观察UPC在处理涉及中国法院费率设定或禁令时的司法礼让边界", "企业在多国并行诉讼时，需注意境外“临时许可”策略在欧盟境内的法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Global SEP holders must recognize that foreign interim licences will not automatically stay UPC infringement proceedings.", "Practice note: Avoid direct jurisdictional confrontations via foreign courts; prioritize substantive FRAND arguments within the UPC framework.", "What to monitor: Enforcement mechanisms for UPC AASIs and potential financial penalties for non-compliance with such orders."]
core_points_en: The UPC has jurisdiction to issue an AASI to safeguard pending infringement actions under Articles 31, 32, and 33 UPCA.
Foreign applications aiming to block UPC enforcement constitute imminent infringement justifying interim relief measures.
A Chinese global interim licence is substantively an anti-suit injunction violating international civil procedure principles.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Global SEP holders must recognize that foreign interim licences will not automatically stay UPC infringement proceedings.
Practice note: Avoid direct jurisdictional confrontations via foreign courts; prioritize substantive FRAND arguments within the UPC framework.
What to monitor: Enforcement mechanisms for UPC AASIs and potential financial penalties for non-compliance with such orders.

items.title: Rolls-Royce tops UK’s most iconic trade marks poll
items.title_zh: 劳斯莱斯当选英国最具标志性商标
items.title_en: Rolls-Royce Named UK's Most Iconic Trade Mark in UKIPO Anniversary Poll
items.summary: Rolls-Royce has been named the UK’s most iconic trade mark in a recent poll conducted by the UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO).
items.ai_summary_zh: 为庆祝英国商标注册150周年，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）开展民意调查，评选出塑造公众生活的十大标志性品牌。劳斯莱斯凭借百年工程工艺与品质象征荣登榜首，紧随其后的是Radio Caroline、Twinings和Cadbury等。此次调查旨在回顾商标如何塑造英国的文化与商业历史，目前英国受保护商标超250万件，彰显了其作为质量、信任与身份象征的重要地位。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has named Rolls-Royce the most iconic trade mark in a public poll celebrating the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register. Launched on January 1, 2026, the initiative invited the public to identify brands that have significantly shaped their lives and national culture. Rolls-Royce topped the list, recognized for its century-long legacy of engineering excellence and status as a global symbol of quality. Radio Caroline secured second place, followed by heritage brands such as Twinings and Cadbury. The UK IPO highlighted that over 2.5 million trade marks are currently protected in the UK, underscoring the register's role in documenting commercial history and consumer trust.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国品牌出海英国应重视商标的长期品牌建设与文化共鸣，而非仅关注注册数量。借鉴劳斯莱斯等案例，通过持续的品质输出建立“信任”与“身份”认同，有助于提升品牌在英市场的 iconic 地位及抗风险能力。
items.ai_insight_en: This milestone highlights the deep cultural resonance of established trade marks within the UK market. For rights holders, the results underscore that brand value extends beyond legal protection to encompass consumer perception, heritage, and trust. Understanding which brands resonate culturally can inform broader portfolio strategies and brand positioning efforts, particularly for entities seeking to establish or maintain a strong presence in the UK. The data serves as a reminder of the historical weight carried by marks that have become embedded in everyday life.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO举办百五十周年庆典，劳斯莱斯获评英国最具标志性商标", "Radio Caroline、Twinings等品牌入选前十，体现深厚文化积淀", "英国现存超250万注册商标，彰显其在商业与文化中的核心价值"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rolls-Royce was voted the UK's most iconic trade mark, reflecting its enduring reputation for quality and British engineering craftsmanship.", "Radio Caroline, Twinings, and Cadbury featured prominently in the top ten, illustrating the cultural impact of long-standing household brands.", "The poll coincides with the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, which now protects more than 2.5 million registered marks."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视品牌长期建设，通过品质输出建立消费者信任与身份认同", "借鉴本土成功案例，深化品牌文化内涵以提升在英国市场的影响力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Recognizing the cultural significance of iconic marks helps align brand strategy with consumer expectations of heritage and trust in the UK market.", "Practice note: Portfolio reviews should consider the longevity and cultural footprint of marks, as these factors contribute significantly to brand equity and recognition.", "What to monitor: Future UK IPO initiatives or reports may offer further insights into evolving consumer perceptions of trade marks and brand identity."]
core_points_en: Rolls-Royce was voted the UK's most iconic trade mark, reflecting its enduring reputation for quality and British engineering craftsmanship.
Radio Caroline, Twinings, and Cadbury featured prominently in the top ten, illustrating the cultural impact of long-standing household brands.
The poll coincides with the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, which now protects more than 2.5 million registered marks.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Recognizing the cultural significance of iconic marks helps align brand strategy with consumer expectations of heritage and trust in the UK market.
Practice note: Portfolio reviews should consider the longevity and cultural footprint of marks, as these factors contribute significantly to brand equity and recognition.
What to monitor: Future UK IPO initiatives or reports may offer further insights into evolving consumer perceptions of trade marks and brand identity.

items.title: Unified Patent Court Insights: Claim Construction
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院：打印机供墨容器权利要求解释与侵权判定
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Functional Language Defines Product Claim Scope Without External Apparatus
items.summary: A recent decision from the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 provides an interesting look at the Unified Patent Court's (UPC) evolving approach to claim construction and the role...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在UPC_CFI_351/2024案中裁定，描述为“可拆卸安装”的打印机供墨容器属于产品权利要求而非系统权利要求。法院认定“可安装”仅界定产品适用性，不要求外部设备存在。因此，被告单独销售的墨盒构成直接侵权。该判决明确了功能性语言在权利要求解释中的作用，区分了产品与系统权利要求的边界，对后续类似案件的侵权判定具有指导意义。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CFI_351/2024, the Düsseldorf Local Division clarified the distinction between product and system claims regarding a printer supply container. The court rejected the argument that the term 'detachably mountable' required the presence of the receiving apparatus (printer) for infringement. Instead, it ruled that such functional language defines the product's suitability for intended use. Consequently, standalone toner bottles were found to directly infringe the patent as product claims, establishing that external components need not be present to realize the invention's boundaries.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业需警惕单一零部件在UPC被认定为直接侵权的风险。在撰写欧洲专利时，应审慎使用“可安装”等功能性限定，避免将产品权利要求不当扩大至系统层面。建议针对核心组件进行独立权利要求布局，并在出口前进行FTO分析，评估单独销售行为在UPC体系下的侵权可能性，以规避高额赔偿风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling underscores the importance of precise claim drafting when using functional language in European patents. Rights holders should note that product claims with suitability-based limitations may offer broader enforcement potential against standalone components compared to system claims. Conversely, defendants must carefully assess whether functional terms imply a requirement for multi-part systems or merely describe interoperability features of a single article.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院裁定“可安装”界定产品适用性，无需外部设备存在即构成侵权", "明确区分产品权利要求与系统权利要求，单独销售组件可直接侵权", "确立UPC在功能性语言解释上的倾向，强化专利权人对配套产品的保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The court interpreted 'mountable' as defining product suitability rather than requiring the physical presence of an external apparatus.", "Standalone components sold separately can constitute direct infringement if they meet the functional criteria of a product claim.", "The decision clarifies the boundary between product and system claims under the Unified Patent Court's evolving jurisprudence."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕单一零部件在UPC被认定为直接侵权的法律风险", "优化欧洲专利权利要求布局，审慎使用功能性限定语言"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Standalone components may face direct infringement liability even if the final system is not assembled by the seller.", "Practice note: Drafters should distinguish clearly between product suitability and system integration requirements in claim language.", "What to monitor: Further UPC decisions refining the interpretation of functional limitations like 'capable of' or 'mountable' in mixed-type claims."]
core_points_en: The court interpreted 'mountable' as defining product suitability rather than requiring the physical presence of an external apparatus.
Standalone components sold separately can constitute direct infringement if they meet the functional criteria of a product claim.
The decision clarifies the boundary between product and system claims under the Unified Patent Court's evolving jurisprudence.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Standalone components may face direct infringement liability even if the final system is not assembled by the seller.
Practice note: Drafters should distinguish clearly between product suitability and system integration requirements in claim language.
What to monitor: Further UPC decisions refining the interpretation of functional limitations like 'capable of' or 'mountable' in mixed-type claims.

items.title: World Intellectual Property Day 2026: New WIPO Data Show IP Use Booming in Sports Industry
items.title_zh: 2026世界知识产权日：WIPO数据显示体育行业专利使用激增
items.title_en: WIPO Data: Patent Activity Surges in Golf, Swimming and Racket Sports
items.summary: Golf, swimming and racket sports are the most patent-intensive areas of the sports industry, where use of intellectual property (IP) is rising at above-average rates, according to a new World Intellectual Property Organization report released to mark World IP Day.
items.ai_summary_zh: 为纪念2026年世界知识产权日，世界知识产权组织（WIPO）发布最新报告，揭示体育产业知识产权使用的显著增长趋势。数据显示，高尔夫、游泳和球拍类运动是专利最密集的细分领域，其知识产权使用率以高于平均水平的速度上升。这一动态反映了体育科技与装备创新的热度，表明相关领域的技术壁垒正在快速构建，全球市场竞争正从单纯的品牌营销向核心技术专利布局转移。
items.ai_summary_en: To mark World Intellectual Property Day 2026, the World Intellectual Property Organization released new data indicating that intellectual property use is rising at above-average rates within the sports industry. The report identifies golf, swimming, and racket sports as the most patent-intensive sectors, highlighting a significant increase in IP activity in these specific areas compared to the broader market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，国际后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This data release highlights shifting innovation dynamics within the sports equipment sector. For rights holders and portfolio managers, identifying high-growth patent clusters helps in understanding where technological development is currently concentrated. Monitoring these specific sub-sectors provides context for competitive landscape analysis and potential technology scouting efforts in the sporting goods market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["WIPO发布报告指出体育产业IP使用率呈高于平均水平的增长态势", "高尔夫、游泳及球拍类运动被确认为当前专利最为密集的核心领域", "体育行业技术创新加速，知识产权成为构建市场竞争优势的关键要素"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Golf, swimming, and racket sports are identified as the most patent-intensive segments of the global sports industry.", "Intellectual property usage in these specific sports sectors is increasing at rates significantly above the industry average.", "The World Intellectual Property Organization released this data specifically to coincide with the 2026 World IP Day observance."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦高尔夫等专利密集区，提前开展FTO分析以规避侵权风险", "强化核心技术与设计专利的海外布局，提升欧洲市场竞争力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders in sporting goods should note the concentration of patent growth in golf, swimming, and racket sports.", "Practice note: Use WIPO sectoral data to benchmark internal R&D intensity against emerging hotspots in the sports industry.", "What to monitor: Future WIPO reports for continued trends in patent density across different sports equipment categories."]
core_points_en: Golf, swimming, and racket sports are identified as the most patent-intensive segments of the global sports industry.
Intellectual property usage in these specific sports sectors is increasing at rates significantly above the industry average.
The World Intellectual Property Organization released this data specifically to coincide with the 2026 World IP Day observance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders in sporting goods should note the concentration of patent growth in golf, swimming, and racket sports.
Practice note: Use WIPO sectoral data to benchmark internal R&D intensity against emerging hotspots in the sports industry.
What to monitor: Future WIPO reports for continued trends in patent density across different sports equipment categories.

items.title: Nokia wins anti-suit injunction against Geely’s interim-licence application
items.title_zh: 诺基亚获禁诉令阻止吉利中国临时许可申请
items.title_en: Nokia Secures Anti-Suit Injunctions from UPC and Munich Court Against Geely
items.summary: The connected cars dispute between Nokia and Geely, which has been pending since last summer, came to a head this week. After Geely filed an application for an interim licence in China, Nokia successfully filed an anti-suit injunction against a Chinese interim licence with both the Munich Regional Court and the UPC. JUVE Patent does not […] The post Nokia wins anti-suit injunction against Geely’s interim-licence application appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 诺基亚与吉利的联网汽车SEP争议升级。针对吉利在中国申请的临时许可，诺基亚成功在慕尼黑地区法院和统一专利法院（UPC）获得禁诉令，禁止吉利推进该中国临时许可程序。
items.ai_summary_en: The long-standing connected cars patent dispute between Nokia and Geely has intensified following recent procedural developments. After Geely filed an application for an interim license in China, Nokia successfully obtained anti-suit injunctions from both the Munich Regional Court and the Unified Patent Court (UPC). These rulings effectively prevent the enforcement of any Chinese interim license within European jurisdictions. This strategic legal move aims to safeguard European judicial sovereignty and prevent Chinese courts from influencing global FRAND licensing negotiations through interim measures. The outcome marks a significant escalation in the standard-essential patent (SEP) licensing conflict, reinforcing the role of European courts in determining the appropriate forum for resolving cross-border FRAND disputes and maintaining jurisdictional balance.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案显示SEP权利人在欧洲法院（包括UPC）积极利用禁诉令对抗平行司法辖区的许可程序。需关注UPC在此类跨境管辖权冲突中的裁判倾向，以及其对全球FRAND费率确定的潜在影响。
items.ai_insight_en: This development highlights the increasing prevalence of anti-suit injunctions as a tactical tool in global SEP litigation. Parties engaging in cross-border FRAND negotiations must carefully assess the risk of conflicting judicial orders when seeking interim relief in non-European jurisdictions. A fragmented approach to licensing can lead to severe procedural setbacks, including injunctions that block foreign court decisions. Implementing a coordinated global litigation strategy is essential to manage jurisdictional conflicts effectively. Demonstrating good faith throughout negotiations remains critical to mitigating the risk of adverse rulings and ensuring compliance with evolving European standards for SEP enforcement and licensing conduct.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["吉利在中国提起临时许可申请后，诺基亚采取法律行动回应", "诺基亚在慕尼黑地区法院和UPC均成功获得针对中国程序的禁诉令"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Geely's application for an interim license in China triggered Nokia's counter-strategy seeking protective measures in Europe.", "Nokia successfully secured anti-suit injunctions from both the Unified Patent Court and the Munich Regional Court.", "European courts are asserting stronger jurisdictional control over global FRAND licensing negotiations and SEP disputes."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧洲法院正成为SEP全球许可博弈的关键战场，禁诉令使用频率增加", "需持续观察UPC在处理涉及中国法院平行程序时的管辖权立场", "跨国车企应监控不同法域间诉讼策略的互动及潜在冲突风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Seek coordinated global strategies to mitigate risks from conflicting international court orders during SEP disputes.", "Practice note: Evaluate the impact of European anti-suit injunctions before pursuing interim licenses in non-European jurisdictions.", "What to monitor: Track how UPC and national courts define the boundaries of their jurisdiction in global FRAND negotiation contexts."]
core_points_en: Geely's application for an interim license in China triggered Nokia's counter-strategy seeking protective measures in Europe.
Nokia successfully secured anti-suit injunctions from both the Unified Patent Court and the Munich Regional Court.
European courts are asserting stronger jurisdictional control over global FRAND licensing negotiations and SEP disputes.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Seek coordinated global strategies to mitigate risks from conflicting international court orders during SEP disputes.
Practice note: Evaluate the impact of European anti-suit injunctions before pursuing interim licenses in non-European jurisdictions.
What to monitor: Track how UPC and national courts define the boundaries of their jurisdiction in global FRAND negotiation contexts.

items.title: InterDigital/Avanci to face off against Tesla in UK Supreme Court – here’s what you need to know
items.title_zh: InterDigital/Avanci将在英国最高法院与特斯拉对峙
items.title_en: InterDigital/Avanci to face off against Tesla in UK Supreme Court – here’s what you need to know
items.summary: The UK Supreme Court’s first SEP hearing since Unwired Planet will begin on Monday
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国最高法院将于周一审理InterDigital和Avanci诉特斯拉的标准必要专利（SEP）案件。这是自Unwired Planet案以来，该院首次审理此类争议。案件核心在于确定全球FRAND许可费率及法院的管辖权范围。作为SEP领域的标志性诉讼，其判决结果将深刻影响未来通信行业在英国的许可谈判策略及司法实践，为权利人实施禁令与被诉方抗辩提供新的法律指引。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国通信企业应密切关注此案对全球FRAND费率认定的影响。若英国法院强化全球费率裁决权，可能增加中国出口企业的合规成本与诉讼风险。建议企业提前评估专利组合价值，优化许可谈判策略，并关注英国司法实践变化，以应对潜在的禁令威胁与高额赔偿诉求。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国最高法院重启SEP审理，系Unwired Planet案后首次重大听证", "争议焦点聚焦于全球FRAND许可费率的确定及司法管辖权边界", "判决将对通信行业SEP许可谈判及后续诉讼产生深远示范效应"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注全球FRAND费率裁决趋势，预判合规成本上升风险", "优化许可谈判策略，积极应对潜在禁令威胁与高额索赔"]

items.title: No hindsight allowed: the UPC rejects inventive step attacks that are based on fragmented analyses (UPC_CFI_337/2025)
items.title_zh: UPC裁定：创造性评估严禁基于碎片化分析的后见之明
items.title_en: UPC Rejects Hindsight in Inventive Step: No Fragmented Analysis of Prior Art
items.summary: Court docket: CD Munich
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑中央分部在TCL诉康宁案中裁定，评估创造性时不得仅因结构相似就孤立选取最接近现有技术的特定实施例作为起点，除非现有技术本身有指引，否则构成后见之明。法院强调必须将现有技术视为整体，且若权利要求特征相互依赖以解决客观问题，禁止将其人为拆分进行孤立显而易见性评估。该判决澄清了UPC与EPO实践的差异，要求从整体技术教导出发，避免碎片化分析导致的逻辑偏差。
items.ai_summary_en: In TCL Europe SAS v. Corning Incorporated, the UPC Central Division in Munich clarified inventive step assessment methodology under the Unified Patent Court framework. The Court held that selecting a specific embodiment from prior art as a starting point solely based on structural similarity risks hindsight bias, absent explicit pointers within the disclosure or common general knowledge. Furthermore, the decision prohibits artificially splitting interdependent claim features to assess obviousness in isolation. The skilled person must evaluate the prior art as a whole and consider the technical function of features within the overall teaching, ensuring the objective problem is not fragmented into separate issues without justification.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment highlights a methodological divergence between UPC practice and certain EPO approaches regarding the 'closest prior art' selection. For rights holders and challengers, it underscores the necessity of grounding inventive step arguments in the holistic technical context of prior art disclosures. Arguments relying on fragmenting complex technical solutions into isolated features face higher scrutiny under this precedent, requiring robust demonstration of interdependencies and functional coherence within the claimed invention.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["选取最接近现有技术需有内在指引，孤立选例易构成后见之明", "特征相互依赖时禁止拆分评估，须结合整体技术方案判断", "UPC强调从整体技术教导推导起点，区别于EPO常见实践"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Prior art must be assessed as a whole; isolating specific embodiments as starting points requires explicit pointers to avoid hindsight bias.", "Interdependent claim features solving an objective problem cannot be split for isolated obviousness assessments during inventive step evaluation.", "The UPC emphasizes deriving the starting point from the overall technical teaching rather than arbitrary selection based on feature count."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["主张创造性需论证特征依赖与整体协同，避免被拆分攻击", "抗辩时需证明现有技术存在明确指引，防范后见之明指控"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should ensure patent specifications clearly articulate functional interdependencies between features to defend against fragmented obviousness atta…", "Practice note: Challengers must identify explicit pointers in prior art when selecting specific embodiments as starting points to withstand hindsight objections at the UPC.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying this holistic assessment standard to complex chemical or mechanical claims with multiple interacting parameters."]
core_points_en: Prior art must be assessed as a whole; isolating specific embodiments as starting points requires explicit pointers to avoid hindsight bias.
Interdependent claim features solving an objective problem cannot be split for isolated obviousness assessments during inventive step evaluation.
The UPC emphasizes deriving the starting point from the overall technical teaching rather than arbitrary selection based on feature count.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should ensure patent specifications clearly articulate functional interdependencies between features to defend against fragmented obviousness atta…
Practice note: Challengers must identify explicit pointers in prior art when selecting specific embodiments as starting points to withstand hindsight objections at the UPC.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying this holistic assessment standard to complex chemical or mechanical claims with multiple interacting parameters.

items.title: [Blog] Innovation en Europe : les femmes toujours sous-représentées selon l’OEB
items.title_zh: EPO报告：欧洲创新中女性发明人代表性持续不足
items.title_en: EPO Study: Women Remain Underrepresented in European Innovation Ecosystem
items.summary: L’Observatoire des brevets et des technologies de l’Office européen des brevets (OEB) a publié, le 3 mars 2026, une étude consacrée à la place des femmes dans l’écosystème européen de l’innovation. Fondée sur une analyse de données relatives aux activités brevet et à l’entrepreneuriat technologique, cette étude met en évidence une sous-représentation persistante des femmes, tant parmi les inventeurs que parmi les fondateurs de start-up impliquées dans des démarches de propriété industrielle.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）于2026年3月发布研究，揭示欧洲创新生态中女性长期代表性不足。数据显示，活跃于工业产权的科技初创公司创始人中女性占比不足10%；女性发明人比例虽从2019年的13%微升至2022年的13.8%，但进展缓慢。大学等公共机构的女性发明人比例高于企业。报告指出存在显著的“漏管”现象，即女性在科研和创业路径中逐渐流失，并建议通过改善科学教育准入、消除结构性障碍及加强创业支持来缩小差距。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) published a study on March 3, 2026, analyzing gender representation within the European innovation ecosystem. Based on patent activity and technology entrepreneurship data, the report highlights persistent underrepresentation of women among both inventors and startup founders involved in industrial property processes. Less than 10% of tech startup founders active in IP are women, while female inventor share rose modestly from 13% in 2019 to 13.8% in 2022. Significant disparities exist across sectors and structures, with universities showing higher female participation than private companies. The study identifies a 'leaky pipeline' effect, where women drop out of scientific and technological career paths due to institutional and economic barriers.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This EPO analysis underscores structural imbalances in European innovation that extend beyond legal frameworks into corporate culture and funding access. For multinational entities operating in Europe, understanding these dynamics is relevant for talent retention strategies and aligning with regional diversity expectations. While not a direct regulatory change, the findings reflect broader policy priorities regarding inclusive growth, which may influence collaborative opportunities and public funding landscapes for technology ventures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["女性科技初创创始人占比不足10%，发明人比例仅微增至13.8%", "公共研究机构女性发明人比例高于私营企业，存在显著行业差异", "报告识别“漏管”效应，建议改善教育准入及消除职业结构障碍"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Female representation remains low, with under 10% of IP-active tech startup founders being women.", "Women inventors increased slightly to 13.8% in 2022, with public research institutions outperforming private firms.", "A 'leaky pipeline' persists as structural and economic factors limit women's transition from science to patenting."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视团队多样性，可能影响当地合作及政府资助申请资格", "优化女性人才保留机制，符合欧洲价值观以提升品牌竞争力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Awareness of gender disparity trends supports alignment with European corporate social responsibility and diversity standards.", "Practice note: Organizations should evaluate internal retention mechanisms for female technical talent to mitigate the identified 'leaky pipeline'.", "What to monitor: Future EPO reports or EU policy initiatives addressing structural barriers in scientific careers and technology entrepreneurship."]
core_points_en: Female representation remains low, with under 10% of IP-active tech startup founders being women.
Women inventors increased slightly to 13.8% in 2022, with public research institutions outperforming private firms.
A 'leaky pipeline' persists as structural and economic factors limit women's transition from science to patenting.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Awareness of gender disparity trends supports alignment with European corporate social responsibility and diversity standards.
Practice note: Organizations should evaluate internal retention mechanisms for female technical talent to mitigate the identified 'leaky pipeline'.
What to monitor: Future EPO reports or EU policy initiatives addressing structural barriers in scientific careers and technology entrepreneurship.

items.title: UKIPO updates graphic symbols, interfaces and animated designs practice - GJE
items.title_zh: UKIPO更新图形符号、界面及动画外观设计审查实践
items.title_en: UKIPO Issues Practice Notice on Graphic Symbols, GUIs and Animated Designs
items.summary: The UKIPO has issued a Designs Practice Notice, updating UK practice on registered designs relating to graphic symbols/icons and GUIs
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）发布罕见的外观设计实务通知DPN 1/26，更新了关于图形符号、图标、图形用户界面（GUI）及包含动画或动态效果的设计注册审查实践。该通知重点明确了动画GUI和序列设计的审查标准，为申请人和代理人提供了额外指导。尽管具体日常影响尚待观察，但此举旨在澄清审查方法，提升申请确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has issued Designs Practice Notice DPN 1/26, updating examination practice for registered designs covering graphic symbols, icons, and graphical user interfaces (GUIs). The guidance specifically addresses designs incorporating animation or movement, clarifying how the Office will assess animated GUIs and sequence designs. While the notice provides significant updates to examination approaches and additional guidance for applicants and representatives, questions remain regarding its alignment with global design systems and its practical day-to-day impact on UK design registration procedures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出海英国时，需密切关注GUI及动态交互界面的外观专利申请细节。建议提前优化设计视图与动态描述，确保符合UKIPO最新审查指引，以降低驳回风险并提升保护范围的有效性。
items.ai_insight_en: This practice notice represents a notable shift in how the UKIPO handles digital interface protections, offering clearer parameters for registering animated and dynamic design features. For rights holders managing portfolios in the UK, understanding these updated examination criteria is essential for ensuring that graphical user interfaces and icon sets meet current registrability requirements without unnecessary procedural delays.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO发布DPN 1/26通知，明确GUI及动画外观设计的审查新标准", "重点规范含动画或运动效果的图形界面及序列设计的注册要求", "提供额外申请指导以增强审查透明度，但全球协调性仍存疑问"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO released DPN 1/26 to update practice for graphic symbols, icons, and GUIs including animated elements.", "The notice clarifies examination standards for animated GUIs and sequence designs within the UK registered design system.", "Additional guidance aims to assist applicants, though global harmonization and daily operational effects remain uncertain."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI及动态设计视图以符合UKIPO最新审查指引", "关注动画序列描述的规范性以提升英国外观授权率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should review UK filing strategies for GUIs and animated icons to align with new examination clarity.", "Practice note: Representatives must ensure application representations accurately reflect motion sequences as per DPN 1/26 guidance.", "What to monitor: Observe future UKIPO decisions to gauge how strictly the new animated design standards are applied in practice."]
core_points_en: UKIPO released DPN 1/26 to update practice for graphic symbols, icons, and GUIs including animated elements.
The notice clarifies examination standards for animated GUIs and sequence designs within the UK registered design system.
Additional guidance aims to assist applicants, though global harmonization and daily operational effects remain uncertain.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should review UK filing strategies for GUIs and animated icons to align with new examination clarity.
Practice note: Representatives must ensure application representations accurately reflect motion sequences as per DPN 1/26 guidance.
What to monitor: Observe future UKIPO decisions to gauge how strictly the new animated design standards are applied in practice.

items.title: Win some, lose some: UPC upholds Dainese’s airbag patent but finds it not infringed
items.title_zh: UPC 维持 Dainese 气囊专利有效但裁定未侵权
items.title_en: UPC Milan Division Upholds Dainese Airbag Patent Validity but Rules No Infringement by Alpinestars
items.summary: Almost exactly a year after the UPC’s Milan local division asserted its jurisdiction for Spain, it has ruled that the patent-in-suit EP 4 072 364 is valid but not infringed by Alpinestars’ products (case IDs: UPC_CFI_472/2024, UPC CFI 792/2024, UPC CFI 831/2024 and UPC CFI 182/2025). Initially, the parties were fighting over Dainese’s two patents […] The post Win some, lose some: UPC upholds Dainese’s airbag patent but finds it not infringed appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）米兰地方分部在涉及西班牙管辖权的案件中作出裁决，确认 Dainese 拥有的 EP4072364 号气囊专利有效，但认定竞争对手 Alpinestars 的产品未构成侵权。该案历经多起诉讼合并审理，体现了 UPC 在专利确权与侵权判定上的分离裁判思路，对摩托车安全装备领域的专利布局具有参考意义。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court's Milan Local Division has ruled that European patent EP 4 072 364, owned by Dainese, is valid but not infringed by competitor Alpinestars' products. This decision follows proceedings consolidated under multiple case IDs (UPC_CFI_472/2024, UPC CFI 792/2024, UPC CFI 831/2024, and UPC CFI 182/2025). The ruling comes approximately one year after the division asserted its jurisdiction over Spain in this dispute. The court separated the assessment of patent validity from the infringement analysis, resulting in a split outcome where the patent rights were maintained while the infringement claims were dismissed.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This split decision highlights the distinct legal standards applied to patent validity and infringement within the UPC framework. For rights holders, maintaining a patent does not guarantee successful enforcement against specific competitor products. Practitioners should note the procedural efficiency of consolidated cases while recognizing that validity success does not automatically translate to infringement findings across different product configurations.

items.title: Paris local division revokes Michelin patent in Goodyear case
items.title_zh: 巴黎地方法院在固特异案中撤销米其林专利
items.title_en: UPC Paris Local Division Revokes Michelin Patent in Goodyear Infringement Case
items.summary: Michelin filed an infringement action at the Paris local division in February 2025. The patent was only valid in France at the time of the action. The company argued that its competitor Goodyear infringed its intellectual property rights with the car tyres Fuelmax D Endurance and the Fuelmax D GEN-2, which are offered and placed […] The post Paris local division revokes Michelin patent in Goodyear case appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 米其林于 2025 年 2 月在统一专利法院巴黎地方法院起诉固特异侵权，涉案专利当时仅在法国有效。米其林指控固特异 Fuelmax 系列轮胎侵权。然而，巴黎地方法院最终作出判决，撤销了米其林的该项专利，驳回了其侵权主张。此案凸显了 UPC 地方分院在专利有效性审查上的关键作用及诉讼风险。
items.ai_summary_en: Michelin initiated an infringement action against Goodyear at the Unified Patent Court's Paris local division in February 2025. The dispute concerned car tyres, specifically the Fuelmax D Endurance and Fuelmax D GEN-2 models. At the time of filing, the asserted patent held validity solely within France. The Paris local division subsequently issued a judgment revoking the patent, thereby dismissing Michelin's infringement claims regarding the specified tyre products.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision illustrates the immediate impact of central revocation proceedings within the UPC framework, even when initiated as a defense in national or local division actions. For rights holders relying on patents validated in single member states, the outcome underscores the vulnerability of such assets to centralized validity challenges before the Court, potentially nullifying enforcement efforts across participating jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["米其林在巴黎 UPC 分部起诉固特异轮胎专利侵权", "涉案专利在诉讼时仅具有法国国家效力", "巴黎地方法院最终裁定撤销米其林涉案专利"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Michelin sued Goodyear for patent infringement at the UPC Paris local division in February 2025.", "The asserted patent was valid only in France at the time the infringement action was filed.", "The Paris local division revoked the patent, ending the dispute over Goodyear's Fuelmax tyres."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用 UPC 机制挑战对手专利有效性以化解侵权风险", "针对仅具一国效力的专利，可集中资源进行无效抗辩"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders with single-state validations face heightened risk of total loss via UPC central revocation actions.", "Practice note: Defendants can leverage UPC counterclaims to challenge patent validity directly within infringement proceedings.", "What to monitor: Future rulings from the Paris local division regarding the interplay between national validity and UPC jurisdiction."]
core_points_en: Michelin sued Goodyear for patent infringement at the UPC Paris local division in February 2025.
The asserted patent was valid only in France at the time the infringement action was filed.
The Paris local division revoked the patent, ending the dispute over Goodyear's Fuelmax tyres.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders with single-state validations face heightened risk of total loss via UPC central revocation actions.
Practice note: Defendants can leverage UPC counterclaims to challenge patent validity directly within infringement proceedings.
What to monitor: Future rulings from the Paris local division regarding the interplay between national validity and UPC jurisdiction.

items.title: UPC update: Nokia claims anti-anti-suit win | French firm launches
items.title_zh: UPC动态：诺基亚获反反诉禁令胜利及法国企业起诉
items.title_en: UPC Update: Nokia Secures Anti-Anti-Suit Injunction as French Firm Initiates Litigation
items.summary: Abbott winning another round against Sinocare and Menarini, and 'long arm' clarification on the UK's position within the UPC, were also among major developments
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，统一专利法院（UPC）近期出现多项重大进展。诺基亚在反反诉禁令（anti-anti-suit）争议中获胜。此外，雅培在与Sinocare和Menarini的纠纷中赢得又一轮诉讼。同时，有关英国在UPC体系内地位的“长臂”管辖权问题获得进一步澄清。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has witnessed several significant developments impacting the European patent litigation landscape. Nokia successfully obtained an anti-anti-suit injunction, establishing a crucial procedural advantage in its ongoing cross-border patent disputes. Concurrently, Abbott secured another favorable ruling against Sinocare and Menarini, highlighting the court's active role in resolving complex pharmaceutical patent infringement matters. Furthermore, legal clarity has emerged regarding the 'long-arm' jurisdictional reach concerning the United Kingdom within the UPC framework. Although the UK is not a member state, recent clarifications define how its courts interact with UPC proceedings. Additionally, a French company has launched new litigation, signaling increased activity and confidence in the new system among rights holders across different jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息有限，仅能确认UPC在处理跨境禁令及成员国地位问题上的活跃度。需持续观察英国脱欧后其实体在UPC框架下的具体程序性权利界定，以及反反诉禁令对SEP全球许可谈判策略的潜在影响。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe must navigate an increasingly complex litigation environment characterized by sophisticated procedural maneuvers. The issuance of anti-anti-suit injunctions demonstrates that parties are actively using procedural tools to restrict opponents' global litigation strategies. Rights holders should closely monitor UPC case law to understand these evolving procedural dynamics. Additionally, despite the UK's non-membership, the clarified 'long-arm' jurisdictional interactions necessitate a careful assessment of cross-border risks. Companies should evaluate potential exposure in UK-related contexts and develop proactive litigation strategies to avoid being placed at a procedural disadvantage in multi-jurisdictional disputes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标题显示诺基亚在UPC相关的反反诉禁令争议中获得胜诉", "摘要指出雅培在与Sinocare及Menarini的诉讼中赢得新一轮胜利", "摘要提及关于英国在统一专利法院体系中地位的法律澄清取得进展"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Nokia secured an anti-anti-suit injunction, strengthening its strategic position in managing global patent dispute forums effectively.", "Abbott achieved consecutive victories against Sinocare and Menarini, reflecting the UPC's emerging tendencies in pharmaceutical patent adjudication.", "Clarification of 'long-arm' jurisdiction rules defines the interaction between non-member UK courts and the UPC system."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注UPC对反反诉禁令的裁决倾向及其对全球SEP诉讼格局的影响", "监测英国实体在UPC诉讼中的参与资格及管辖权连接点的最新司法解释", "追踪雅培案后续进展，以评估UPC在医药专利纠纷中的审理节奏与标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties must anticipate aggressive procedural tactics like anti-anti-suit injunctions that can constrain global litigation options.", "Practice note: Evaluate cross-border jurisdictional risks, particularly regarding the defined interactions between UK courts and the UPC.", "What to monitor: Emerging UPC precedents on procedural remedies and the practical application of long-arm jurisdiction involving non-member states."]
core_points_en: Nokia secured an anti-anti-suit injunction, strengthening its strategic position in managing global patent dispute forums effectively.
Abbott achieved consecutive victories against Sinocare and Menarini, reflecting the UPC's emerging tendencies in pharmaceutical patent adjudication.
Clarification of 'long-arm' jurisdiction rules defines the interaction between non-member UK courts and the UPC system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties must anticipate aggressive procedural tactics like anti-anti-suit injunctions that can constrain global litigation options.
Practice note: Evaluate cross-border jurisdictional risks, particularly regarding the defined interactions between UK courts and the UPC.
What to monitor: Emerging UPC precedents on procedural remedies and the practical application of long-arm jurisdiction involving non-member states.

items.title: FOI release: Manual of Trade Mark Practice in use during 1989 and 1992
items.title_zh: 信息公开：1989及1992年使用的商标实践手册
items.title_en: UKIPO Releases Historical Manual of Trade Mark Practice from 1989 to 1992
items.summary: Relevant pages of Manual of Trade Mark Practice in use during 1989 and 1992.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局通过信息公开请求，发布了1989年和1992年期间使用的《商标实践手册》的相关页面。该文档仅包含历史审查指南片段，用于展示当时的商标审查标准与操作流程，不涉及现行法律变更或具体案件裁决。
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has published relevant pages from the Manual of Trade Mark Practice that were in active use between 1989 and 1992, following a Freedom of Information request. This document provides critical primary source material detailing the specific operational standards and examination procedures applied by UK trademark examiners over thirty years ago. It serves as an essential reference for understanding the historical context of British trademark law. Legal professionals and researchers can utilize this archive to trace the evolution of the UK trademark system, address legacy issues involving early trademark rights, and conduct accurate retrospective legal analyses where historical administrative practices significantly influence current disputes or validity assessments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此发布属于历史档案披露，对当前商标申请无直接法律效力。实务中仅需关注其作为历史审查标准参考的价值，无需调整现有合规策略或诉讼立场。
items.ai_insight_en: This release offers vital context for practitioners handling disputes involving legacy trademarks registered under earlier statutory frameworks. Understanding the specific examination guidelines from 1989–1992 is crucial when assessing the validity or scope of older rights, particularly in opposition or cancellation proceedings where historical intent and practice are contested. Firms should consider integrating such historical manuals into their due diligence workflows to accurately evaluate cross-era legal applicability. Maintaining an organized archive of regulatory evolutions across major jurisdictions ensures that historical rights assessments remain robust and defensible against challenges based on changing administrative interpretations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO公开了1989年和1992年适用的《商标实践手册》相关页面", "发布内容为历史信息披露，旨在响应信息公开请求而非更新现行指南"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO discloses the specific Manual of Trade Mark Practice sections actively utilized during the 1989 to 1992 period.", "The released documentation covers the precise registration and examination standards applicable during that specific historical era.", "These records provide authoritative historical support for retrospective trademark cases and institutional research purposes."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["该文件为历史档案，不构成现行审查标准的依据", "主要用于学术研究或追溯特定历史时期的商标审查惯例", "无需针对此历史文件采取任何即时法律行动或策略调整"]

The released documentation covers the precise registration and examination standards applicable during that specific historical era.

items.title: Trademark Image: How To Protect And Search Your Visual Brand Assets
items.title_zh: 商标图像：如何保护与检索视觉品牌资产
items.title_en: Trademark Image: How To Protect And Search Your Visual Brand Assets
items.summary: A trademark image is one of the most valuable assets a business can have. Logos, icons, stylised lettering, and pictograms are all examples of visual marks that communicate brand identity and help consumers recognise your products or services.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文阐述商标图像（图形标志）作为核心商业资产的价值，区分其与文字商标及版权的保护差异。指南涵盖图形商标注册步骤、显著性要求、通过EUIPO等机构进行检索的策略，以及结合版权保护以最大化品牌权益的建议，旨在帮助企业规避注册风险并有效监控视觉品牌资产。
items.ai_insight_zh: 实务中应重视图形商标与版权的双重布局，以应对设计变更导致的重新注册需求。利用AI辅助检索可提升跨法域视觉相似度排查效率，但需注意各国审查标准差异，特别是欧盟层面的统一检索与成员国具体实践的衔接。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["图形商标注册需严格把控显著性，避免使用通用模板导致驳回", "建议结合版权保护艺术作品，以弥补商标保护在 design 变更时的局限", "关注AI视觉检索工具在EUIPO及UKIPO等跨辖区冲突排查中的应用效果"]

items.title: UPC CoA: EU Law trumps UPC Rules of Procedure
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院：欧盟法优于内部程序规则
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: EU Law Prevails Over Rules of Procedure on Jurisdiction
items.summary: In a recent decision handed down in UPC_CoA_420/2025 and its joined cases, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal addressed a...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉院在UPC_CoA_420/2025案中裁定，关于国际管辖权的确立，欧盟《布鲁塞尔条例I bis》优先于UPC程序规则。法院认定被告仅登录案件管理系统不构成应诉管辖，必须在首次实体答辩中明确提出异议，从而保护了被告挑战管辖权的权利。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CoA_420/2025, the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal ruled that Article 26(1) of the Brussels I bis Regulation supersedes Rule 19.7 of the Rules of Procedure regarding international jurisdiction. The court held that a defendant’s failure to lodge a preliminary objection within one month does not automatically constitute submission to jurisdiction if challenged in the first substantive defense. Crucially, merely logging into the Case Management System to access files is not an active step implying acceptance of jurisdiction. This decision prioritizes EU law standards over internal procedural deadlines, ensuring defendants retain the right to contest jurisdiction despite missing strict preliminary timelines.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies that formalistic procedural traps in the Rules of Procedure yield to superior EU law principles. Rights holders must recognize that technical access to case files does not waive jurisdictional defenses. Defendants should explicitly articulate jurisdictional challenges in their initial substantive pleadings to preserve rights, while claimants cannot rely solely on procedural defaults to establish international jurisdiction under the UPC framework.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉院裁定欧盟《布鲁塞尔条例I bis》第26(1)条优先于UPC程序规则第19…", "仅登录UPC案件管理系统查阅案卷不构成对应诉管辖的默示接受，需被告采取积极行动", "被告若在首次实体答辩中明确挑战管辖权，即便错过初步异议期限，该挑战依然有效"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Brussels I bis Regulation Article 26(1) takes precedence over UPC Rule 19.7 regarding deemed submission to jurisdiction.", "Logging into the UPC Case Management System to view files does not constitute voluntary appearance or acceptance of jurisdiction.", "Defendants may validly challenge international jurisdiction in their first substantive defense even after missing the one-month preliminary deadline."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确登录案件管理系统不等于接受管辖，降低了因技术操作导致的程序风险", "确立首次实体答辩中提出管辖权异议的有效性，为被告提供更宽裕的程序窗口", "后续需观察该判例对UPC其他程序性规则与欧盟法冲突时的解释倾向"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Defendants are protected from losing jurisdictional rights due to administrative delays or system access, provided they raise the issue in their first substantiv…", "Practice note: Legal teams must distinguish between passive system access and active procedural steps; jurisdictional objections should be clearly stated in the Statement of Defen…", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions on whether other internal procedural rules conflict with EU regulations and how strictly the court applies this hierarchy in different proced…"]
core_points_en: Brussels I bis Regulation Article 26(1) takes precedence over UPC Rule 19.7 regarding deemed submission to jurisdiction.
Logging into the UPC Case Management System to view files does not constitute voluntary appearance or acceptance of jurisdiction.
Defendants may validly challenge international jurisdiction in their first substantive defense even after missing the one-month preliminary deadline.

Practice note: Legal teams must distinguish between passive system access and active procedural steps; jurisdictional objections should be clearly stated in the Statement of Defen…

items.title: UPC: Security for costs not required where claimant is backed by appropriate litigation insurance
items.title_zh: UPC 裁定：适当诉讼保险下无需提供费用担保
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Security for Costs Unjustified Where Litigation Insurance Mitigates Enforcement Risk
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal has ruled that an order for security for costs is not justified where a claimant’s litigation insurance removes...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Syntorr 诉 Arthrex 案中推翻慕尼黑分部命令，裁定若原告拥有含“反规避条款”的适当诉讼保险，能消除费用执行风险，则无需依程序规则第 158 条提供费用担保。法院虽未明确保险可正式替代银行保函，但确认评估担保申请时必须考量此类保险，已下令释放原冻结的 200 万欧元担保。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal overturned a €2 million security for costs order issued by the Munich Local Division in Syntorr v. Arthrex (UPC_CoA_889/2025). The appellate court ruled that an order under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure was not justified because the claimant’s litigation insurance, featuring an anti-avoidance endorsement, eliminated any real concern regarding the enforceability of potential adverse costs orders. While the Court did not formally rule on whether insurance substitutes for bank guarantees under Rule 158, it established that such coverage must be considered when assessing financial risk. The prior security orders were set aside, and the release of the provided bank guarantee was ordered.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧发起专利诉讼时，应配置含反规避条款的高质量诉讼保险，以降低资金占用并规避费用担保令。同时需关注 UPC 对财务实力与保险覆盖范围的审查标准，优化诉讼融资结构。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the evidentiary weight of litigation insurance in UPC cost security proceedings. Rights holders can leverage comprehensive insurance policies with anti-avoidance clauses to mitigate the need for substantial cash deposits or bank guarantees, thereby preserving liquidity during infringement actions. Practitioners should ensure that insurance documentation explicitly addresses enforcement risks to satisfy the Court's standard for removing concerns about cost recoverability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院认定适当诉讼保险可消除费用无法执行的实质担忧", "推翻慕尼黑分部要求提供 200 万欧元费用担保的原审命令", "明确未来评估费用担保申请时须将诉讼保险纳入核心考量"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal found no legitimate concern that adverse costs orders would be unenforceable due to the claimant's specific litigation insurance coverage.", "The decision overturns the Munich Local Division's initial requirement for a €2 million deposit or bank guarantee under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure.", "Although the formal substitution of insurance for bank guarantees was left open, appropriate insurance policies must now be central to security assessments."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["配置含反规避条款的诉讼保险可有效替代高额现金担保", "利用该判例优化诉讼资金结构，降低在欧维权门槛"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Claimants may avoid tying up significant capital in bank guarantees by demonstrating that their litigation insurance adequately covers potential adverse costs or…", "Practice note: When opposing security for costs applications, parties should submit detailed evidence of insurance terms, specifically highlighting anti-avoidance endorsements tha…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretation of what constitutes 'appropriate' litigation insurance and whether this reasoning extends to other forms of third-party fundi…"]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal found no legitimate concern that adverse costs orders would be unenforceable due to the claimant's specific litigation insurance coverage.
The decision overturns the Munich Local Division's initial requirement for a €2 million deposit or bank guarantee under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure.
Although the formal substitution of insurance for bank guarantees was left open, appropriate insurance policies must now be central to security assessments.

items.title: UPC procedure – Intra-procedural condition permitted
items.title_zh: UPC 程序裁决：允许附条件的无效反诉请求
items.title_en: UPC Munich Division Rules Intra-Procedural Condition on Revocation Counterclaim Admissible
items.summary: In a recent dispute at the Munich Local Division (UPC_CFI_628/2024, UPC_CFI_125/2025), Emboline Inc. initiated infringement proceedings...
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院在 Emboline 诉 AorticLab 案中裁定，被告可提出以侵权成立为前提的附条件无效反诉。法院认定该做法不违反 UPC 协定及程序规则，且未损害原告利益。因最终判定不侵权，反诉无需审理，相关费用由被告承担。
items.ai_summary_en: In proceedings before the UPC Munich Local Division (UPC_CFI_628/2024, UPC_CFI_125/2025), Emboline Inc. sued AorticLab srl for patent infringement. The defendant filed a counterclaim for revocation, declaring it conditional upon a finding of infringement. The Court held that the UPCA and Rules of Procedure permit such intra-procedural conditions under Rule 263.3 RoP, provided the claimant is not disadvantaged. As the Court found no infringement, the conditional counterclaim required no decision. Consequently, costs associated with the counterclaim were deemed unnecessary and awarded against the defendant.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，需谨慎评估提起无效反诉的策略与时机。若侵权风险较低，盲目提起附条件反诉可能导致不必要的费用损失，应结合案件实质证据制定精细化诉讼方案。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies procedural flexibility within the Unified Patent Court, allowing defendants to manage litigation scope by linking validity challenges to infringement findings. For rights holders and alleged infringers, understanding how conditional counterclaims affect cost allocation and case management is essential. The ruling demonstrates that the Court will enforce strict cost consequences when conditional claims become moot due to non-infringement findings, influencing strategic decisions in multi-issue disputes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 允许被告提出附条件无效反诉，即以侵权成立为生效前提", "法院认定此类程序安排符合规则且未对专利权人造成不利影响", "若主诉侵权不成立，附条件反诉无需裁决，费用由提出方承担"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Munich Local Division confirmed that defendants may attach an intra-procedural condition to a revocation counterclaim.", "Rule 263.3 RoP allows limiting a counterclaim to take effect only if patent infringement is established during proceedings.", "Costs for a conditional counterclaim are considered unnecessary if the primary infringement claim is dismissed."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["评估侵权风险后再决定是否提起附条件无效反诉，避免费用浪费", "利用程序规则灵活性，优化欧洲专利诉讼中的攻防策略与成本控制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Defendants can mitigate validity dispute exposure by conditioning revocation claims on infringement findings.", "Practice note: Courts may deem costs for conditional counterclaims unnecessary if the main infringement action fails.", "What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply Rule 263.3 RoP regarding conditional pleadings and cost awards."]
core_points_en: The UPC Munich Local Division confirmed that defendants may attach an intra-procedural condition to a revocation counterclaim.
Rule 263.3 RoP allows limiting a counterclaim to take effect only if patent infringement is established during proceedings.
Costs for a conditional counterclaim are considered unnecessary if the primary infringement claim is dismissed.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants can mitigate validity dispute exposure by conditioning revocation claims on infringement findings.
Practice note: Courts may deem costs for conditional counterclaims unnecessary if the main infringement action fails.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply Rule 263.3 RoP regarding conditional pleadings and cost awards.

items.title: Nokia wins at UPC against Chinese EV maker over connected car patents
items.title_zh: 诺基亚在UPC诉中国车企互联汽车专利案中胜诉
items.title_en: Nokia Secures UPC Injunction Against Chinese EV Maker in Connected Car SEP Dispute
items.summary: In a dispute concerning wireless tech, the Finnish firm convinced the Unified Patent Court that the parent company of Volvo, Polestar and Lotus, was attempting to block Nokia from securing an injunction.
items.ai_summary_zh: 芬兰公司诺基亚在统一专利法院（UPC）涉及无线技术的争议中胜诉。法院认定，沃尔沃、极星和路特斯的母公司试图阻止诺基亚获得禁令。该案聚焦于互联汽车领域的标准必要专利执行问题。
items.ai_summary_en: In a significant ruling concerning wireless technology, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) granted Nokia an injunction against a major Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer. The defendant, part of the Geely group owning brands such as Polestar and Lotus, was found to have engaged in conduct aimed at obstructing Nokia’s ability to secure injunctive relief. This case centers on Standard Essential Patents (SEPs) relevant to connected car technologies. The decision underscores the UPC’s growing efficacy in resolving SEP disputes, particularly regarding the availability of injunctions. For multinational enterprises operating in Europe, this judgment reinforces the enforceability of intellectual property rights within the new court system. It also serves as a critical warning for implementers that passive negotiation strategies may lead to severe market access restrictions, highlighting the necessity of proactive engagement in FRAND licensing discussions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注UPC在SEP禁令救济上的裁判倾向，特别是针对“阻碍禁令”行为的认定标准。此裁决可能影响未来车企与SEP持有人的谈判策略及合规风险评估。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment confirms that the UPC is becoming an efficient forum for SEP holders seeking injunctive relief. Companies expanding into Europe must proactively assess patent risks rather than reacting defensively to litigation threats. Establishing robust FRAND compliance mechanisms is essential to mitigate the risk of sales bans or product removals. Stakeholders should prioritize early cross-licensing agreements or reasonable rate settlements to ensure supply chain stability and uninterrupted market access. Failure to engage constructively in negotiations may result in unfavorable judicial outcomes, emphasizing the need for strategic IP management in the connected vehicle sector.

items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: The UPC's efficiency in granting SEP injunctions increases litigation risks for EV manufacturers entering the European market.", "Practice note: Implementers should establish proactive FRAND compliance frameworks and pursue timely licensing negotiations to avoid market bans.", "What to monitor: Judicial trends regarding 'willing licensee' assessments and the speed of injunction grants in future SEP cases at the UPC."]
core_points_en: Nokia successfully sued Geely-owned EV brands for infringing wireless technology patents at the Unified Patent Court.
The court determined the defendant attempted to hinder Nokia from obtaining an injunction, supporting the plaintiff's claims.
The case highlights SEP licensing and injunction remedies, significantly impacting the European automotive market landscape.

Practice note: Implementers should establish proactive FRAND compliance frameworks and pursue timely licensing negotiations to avoid market bans.
What to monitor: Judicial trends regarding 'willing licensee' assessments and the speed of injunction grants in future SEP cases at the UPC.
