items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 16, 2026, Order, UPC_CoA_54/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定：上诉期自一审附理由判决作出之日起算
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Appeal Period Starts Upon Issuance of Reasoned Decision
items.summary: The Court of Appeal of the Unified Patent Court addresses procedural matters concerning time limits in an appeal case between Belkin International Inc., Belkin B.V., Belkin Limited and Koninklijke Philips N.V. The case involves European Patent EP 2 867 997 and concerns the application of Article 77(1) of the UPCA and various Rules of Procedure.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Belkin诉飞利浦案中发布程序令，澄清《统一专利法院协议》第77(1)条及程序规则。法院裁定，上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由的判决书后才开始计算。理由是上诉人需依据判决理由根据程序规则制定救济请求。该裁决明确了上诉时效的起算节点，解决了此前关于期限计算的争议，为UPC诉讼程序提供了明确的法律确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal issued a procedural order in Belkin v. Philips, clarifying when the time limit for lodging an appeal begins. The Court held that under Article 77(1) of the UPCA and Rule 224.1(a) of the Rules of Procedure, the appeal period only starts once the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision. The judges reasoned that the grounds of the decision are indispensable for an appellant to formulate the remedy sought pursuant to Rule 225(e). This ruling resolves uncertainty regarding whether the clock starts upon the initial judgment or the subsequent reasoning.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需严格监控一审判决送达与理由公布的时间差。上诉倒计时并非从判决主文下达即刻启动，而是以完整理由书为准。建议建立专门流程跟踪UPC案件文书状态，避免因误判期限导致失权，同时利用此窗口期充分准备上诉策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides critical legal certainty for litigation teams managing UPC portfolios. By establishing that the appeal clock does not start until the full reasoned decision is available, the Court prevents premature expiration of appeal rights. Rights holders must adjust their internal case management workflows to track the specific date of the reasoned decision's issuance rather than relying solely on the initial judgment date to avoid procedural default.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由判决后开始计算", "判决理由对上诉人制定救济请求不可或缺", "明确适用UPCA第77(1)条及程序规则相关条款"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.", "Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.", "The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格监控UPC一审判决理由书发布时间以确定上诉期", "利用期限起算规则优化上诉策略并避免程序失权"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.", "Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.", "What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court."]
core_points_en: The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.
Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.
The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.
Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court.

items.title: LD Paris, April 16, 2026, Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CFI_138/2025, UPC_CFI_522/2025
items.title_zh: UPC巴黎分院：米其林诉固特异侵权及无效反诉案判决要点
items.title_en: UPC Paris: Novelty of Structural Claims and Self-Cited Prior Art in Michelin v Goodyear
items.summary: Michelin has filed an infringement action against Goodyear entities in the Unified Patent Court's Paris Local Division, with Goodyear responding with a counterclaim for revocation of the patent in question. The case involves European Patent EP 2 323 858 and raises questions about patent validity and alleged infringement in France under the UPC Agreement's procedural rules.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC巴黎地方法院审理米其林诉固特异侵权案及无效反诉。法院认定涉案专利权利要求1因缺乏新颖性而无效，指出产品结构权利要求的新颖性判断独立于技术效果，且说明书自引的现有技术可破坏新颖性。此外，法院强调从属权利要求需独立论证有效性，并确认辅助请求数量应以“可管理性”而非固定上限评估。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Paris Local Division ruled on an infringement action by Michelin against Goodyear entities, alongside a counterclaim for revocation of European Patent EP 2 323 858. The Court held that novelty for structural product claims is assessed independently of technical effects, finding claim 1 invalid as all features were disclosed in prior art cited within the patent description. Party-affiliated affidavits were treated as witness statements with limited probative value compared to independent experts. Additionally, the Court accepted fourteen auxiliary requests as manageable due to clear tabular presentation, emphasizing that dependent claims require independent validity substantiation when the main claim fails.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC对结构性产品专利新颖性的严格审查标准，强调技术效果非新颖性必要条件。实务中需注意说明书自引文献的风险，以及从属权利要求必须独立 substantiate 其创造性与新颖性，不能仅依赖主权利要求。辅助请求的提交应注重逻辑清晰度以提升法院可管理性评估。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies that self-cited prior art poses significant validity risks for structural claims, regardless of differing technical problems. Rights holders must ensure dependent claims are independently substantiated, as they do not automatically survive if the independent claim is invalidated. Procedurally, presenting complex auxiliary requests in structured tables enhances judicial manageability and acceptance.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["纯结构特征产品权利要求的新颖性判断独立于技术效果，现有技术结构披露即破坏新颖性", "专利说明书中自引的现有技术文档，无论技术问题是否相同，均可用于评估结构特征新颖性", "主权利要求无效时，若未提供独立论证，从属权利要求亦因缺乏实质性辩护而被认定无效"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Novelty of structural product claims is assessed independently of technical effects or intended use under Article 54 EPC.", "Prior art expressly cited in the patent description can destroy novelty even if it addresses a different technical problem.", "Auxiliary request manageability depends on clear organization rather than fixed numerical caps under Rule 30.1(c) RoP."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["结构性产品专利维权需警惕说明书自引文献对新颖性的潜在致命打击", "从属权利要求在诉讼中必须提供独立的有效性论证，不可仅依附于主权利要求", "提交多项辅助请求时，应通过清晰表格整理组合特征，以符合法院“可管理性”要求"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Review patent specifications for self-cited prior art that may inadvertently disclose all structural features of current claims, creating vulnerability in UPC pr…", "Practice note: Draft dependent claims with distinct validity arguments and organize auxiliary requests in clear tables to meet the Court’s manageability standards under the Rules…", "What to monitor: How the UPC continues to weigh party-affiliated affidavits versus independent expert opinions in technically complex patent infringement and revocation cases."]
core_points_en: Novelty of structural product claims is assessed independently of technical effects or intended use under Article 54 EPC.
Prior art expressly cited in the patent description can destroy novelty even if it addresses a different technical problem.
Auxiliary request manageability depends on clear organization rather than fixed numerical caps under Rule 30.1(c) RoP.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review patent specifications for self-cited prior art that may inadvertently disclose all structural features of current claims, creating vulnerability in UPC pr…
Practice note: Draft dependent claims with distinct validity arguments and organize auxiliary requests in clear tables to meet the Court’s manageability standards under the Rules…
What to monitor: How the UPC continues to weigh party-affiliated affidavits versus independent expert opinions in technically complex patent infringement and revocation cases.

items.title: FRAND – How, Why, What? – Maiwald
items.title_zh: FRAND原则解析：方式、原因与内容
items.title_en: FRAND Licensing in Europe: Legal Foundations, Negotiation Duties, and Rate Determination
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文正文及摘要缺失，仅凭标题显示，该文章由Maiwald发布，主题聚焦于标准必要专利中的FRAND原则，探讨其实施方式、理论基础及具体定义。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the application logic of Fair, Reasonable, and Non-Discriminatory (FRAND) licensing principles within the European jurisdiction. It elucidates the legal origins of FRAND commitments, defines the boundaries of obligations for both negotiating parties, and outlines the consequences of non-compliance. By integrating case law from the Court of Justice of the European Union with recent developments at the Unified Patent Court, the article explores methodologies for determining appropriate royalty rates. The discussion aims to provide clear compliance guidance for both standard-essential patent holders and implementers operating in the European market, ensuring a balanced understanding of rights and duties.
items.ai_insight_zh: 因缺乏正文，无法评估具体法律观点。需关注该文章是否引用欧盟法院或德国法院最新判例，以判断其对FRAND合规性的实务指导意义。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should prioritize establishing robust FRAND compliance frameworks to mitigate injunction risks through structured negotiation processes. Proactive assessment of global rate-setting trends is essential, alongside leveraging new mechanisms at the Unified Patent Court to secure favorable jurisdictions and avoid reactive litigation strategies. Maintaining standardized negotiation records is critical to demonstrating good-faith status as a licensee. Stakeholders must closely monitor emerging UPC precedents to dynamically adjust European patent portfolios and licensing strategies, ensuring alignment with evolving judicial expectations and minimizing exposure to adverse rulings in cross-border disputes.

items.title: Grande Chambre de recours de l’OEB : pas de droit autonome pour l’intervenant en procédure de recours
items.title_zh: 欧专局大法庭：上诉程序中的介入方无独立诉讼权
items.title_en: EPO Enlarged Board Confirms Interveners Lack Independent Rights in Opposition Appeals
items.summary: Dans la décision G 2/24 (25 septembre 2025), la Grande Chambre de recours a confirmé sa jurisprudence antérieure issue de la décision G 3/04 : un tiers qui intervient au cours d’une procédure de recours en opposition sur le fondement de l’article 105 CBE ne peut pas poursuivre la procédure lorsque l’unique recours, ou (suite) L’article Grande Chambre de recours de l’OEB : pas de droit autonome pour l’intervenant en procédure de recours est apparu en premier sur Lavoix - Propriété intellectuelle
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会大法庭在G 2/24号决定（2025年9月25日）中确认了既往判例。依据《欧洲专利公约》第105条介入异议上诉程序的第三方，若唯一上诉被撤回或视为撤回，该介入方无权继续推进程序，不享有独立的程序维持权。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision G 2/24 issued on September 25, 2025, the EPO Enlarged Board of Appeal reaffirmed established jurisprudence from decision G 3/04. The ruling clarifies that a third party intervening in opposition appeal proceedings under Article 105 of the European Patent Convention cannot independently continue the procedure if the sole appeal is withdrawn or dismissed. This decision solidifies the subordinate procedural status of interveners during the appeal stage. It reinforces the primary parties' control over the progression of proceedings, thereby ensuring greater legal certainty and procedural efficiency within the EPO system. The outcome prevents interveners from sustaining appeals solely to maintain patent challenges after the original appellant has exited the case.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此决定明确了异议上诉中介入方的从属地位。实务中需关注主上诉人的策略变动对介入方的影响，介入方无法在主上诉退出后单独维持上诉程序，需评估早期独立行动或联合策略的必要性。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment significantly impacts litigation strategy for both patent proprietors and challengers at the EPO. For patent owners, withdrawing an appeal effectively terminates the entire opposition appeal, including any interventions by third parties, offering a decisive mechanism to end disputes. Conversely, challengers must ensure their own standing and evidence are robust, as they cannot rely on interveners to sustain proceedings if their own appeal fails. Parties should carefully evaluate the tactical implications of intervention and structure their appeals to avoid dependency on third-party participation for procedural continuity.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["大法庭在G 2/24号决定中重申G 3/04号决定的既定 jurisprudence", "依EPC第105条介入的第三方，在主上诉终止时无权独立继续程序"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Decision G 2/24 confirms G 3/04 precedent: interveners possess no independent right to continue opposition appeal proceedings.", "If the sole appeal is withdrawn or rejected, an intervener is procedurally barred from continuing the appeal alone.", "The ruling defines clear boundaries for third-party rights, emphasizing their dependent status relative to main parties in EPO appeals."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确介入方在主上诉终止后的程序权利受限，无独立维持权", "需监控主上诉人的撤诉或和解动向，以预判程序走向", "后续观察大法庭对此类程序性权利界限的进一步阐释"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent proprietors can utilize appeal withdrawal to definitively conclude opposition proceedings involving third-party interveners.", "Practice note: Challengers must secure independent procedural standing and comprehensive evidence, avoiding reliance on interveners to maintain appeal validity.", "What to monitor: Strategic assessment of third-party intervention risks and adjustments to opposition defense strategies based on this clarified procedural framework."]
core_points_en: Decision G 2/24 confirms G 3/04 precedent: interveners possess no independent right to continue opposition appeal proceedings.
If the sole appeal is withdrawn or rejected, an intervener is procedurally barred from continuing the appeal alone.
The ruling defines clear boundaries for third-party rights, emphasizing their dependent status relative to main parties in EPO appeals.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent proprietors can utilize appeal withdrawal to definitively conclude opposition proceedings involving third-party interveners.
Practice note: Challengers must secure independent procedural standing and comprehensive evidence, avoiding reliance on interveners to maintain appeal validity.
What to monitor: Strategic assessment of third-party intervention risks and adjustments to opposition defense strategies based on this clarified procedural framework.

items.title: 150 years on: the trade marks that mean the most to us
items.title_zh: 十五载历程：最具意义的英国商标盘点
items.title_en: UKIPO Marks 150 Years: Iconic Trademarks Reflecting Brand Trust and Cultural Heritage
items.summary: In January 2026, the IPO marked 150 years of the UK trade mark registry, the system that protects the names, logos and brands we see every day. From the first registered trade mark to more than 2.5 million today, it’s
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年1月，英国知识产权局庆祝英国商标注册体系成立150周年。该体系始于1876年，首个注册商标为Bass红三角。目前英国注册商标超250万件。局方发起公众投票选出最具标志性商标，劳斯莱斯、吉百利、川宁茶等品牌因承载传统与情感共鸣而高票当选，反映了商标在建立品牌信任与文化认同中的核心价值。
items.ai_summary_en: In January 2026, the UK Intellectual Property Office celebrated the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark registry. Established in 1876 with the registration of the Bass red triangle, the system now protects over 2.5 million registered marks. To commemorate this milestone, the IPO invited public participation to identify the most iconic trade marks. The Rolls Royce RR emblem topped the poll, recognized globally as a symbol of engineering excellence and reliability. In the food and beverage sector, Cadbury and Twinings tea received significant support, reflecting deep emotional connections and intergenerational nostalgia associated with their consistent visual identities. Other notable mentions included the BBC and Burberry, highlighting how established brands serve as enduring cultural symbols. This initiative underscores the vital role of stable trade marks in fostering consumer trust, preserving tradition, and maintaining brand equity within the UK market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了商标超越法律标识的功能，成为文化符号与情感载体。长期稳定的视觉识别系统（如川宁茶Logo）能积累深厚的消费者信任。企业应重视商标历史资产的传承，通过维持设计一致性强化品牌在传统与可靠性方面的认知，这在成熟市场中是重要的无形资产护城河。
items.ai_insight_en: This milestone highlights the strategic value of long-term brand consistency in building consumer trust and cultural resonance. For rights holders operating in the UK, maintaining stable visual identifiers over decades reinforces brand recognition and emotional loyalty. Companies should prioritize robust trade mark asset management to protect these historical investments. Leveraging heritage and local cultural connections can significantly enhance brand premium and market positioning. Avoiding frequent or disruptive rebranding helps prevent fragmentation of brand identity. Understanding how specific marks evoke collective memory offers valuable insights for effective brand strategy and legal protection planning in mature markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国商标注册体系于1876年建立，2026年迎来150周年，累计注册量超250万件", "公众投票显示劳斯莱斯徽标被视为卓越工程与可靠性的标杆，最具标志性", "食品饮料类商标如吉百利和川宁茶因关联家庭记忆与传统，获高度情感认同"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK trade mark registry celebrates its 150th anniversary, having grown from the first registration in 1876 to over 2.5 million active marks today.", "Public voting identified the Rolls Royce RR emblem as the most iconic trade mark, symbolizing enduring quality, reliability, and engineering pedigree.", "Food and drink brands like Cadbury and Twinings secured high votes due to strong associations with childhood memories, family traditions, and comfort."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["商标的情感价值：公众对劳斯莱斯等品牌的推崇表明，商标是传递工程质量与信任的关键媒介", "视觉一致性的长期红利：川宁茶等品牌凭借长期不变的标识获得认可，印证了设计稳定性的商业价值", "文化认同构建：BBC、伦敦地铁圆标等案例显示，融入国民生活的商标能形成极高的竞争壁垒"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Sustained visual consistency strengthens consumer trust and enhances long-term brand equity in the UK market.", "Practice note: Integrate heritage narratives into brand strategy to deepen emotional connections and justify premium positioning.", "What to monitor: Track public sentiment towards iconic marks to identify potential risks to brand integrity and cultural association."]
core_points_en: The UK trade mark registry celebrates its 150th anniversary, having grown from the first registration in 1876 to over 2.5 million active marks today.
Public voting identified the Rolls Royce RR emblem as the most iconic trade mark, symbolizing enduring quality, reliability, and engineering pedigree.
Food and drink brands like Cadbury and Twinings secured high votes due to strong associations with childhood memories, family traditions, and comfort.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Sustained visual consistency strengthens consumer trust and enhances long-term brand equity in the UK market.
Practice note: Integrate heritage narratives into brand strategy to deepen emotional connections and justify premium positioning.
What to monitor: Track public sentiment towards iconic marks to identify potential risks to brand integrity and cultural association.

items.title: Fresh data on AI related inventions at the EPO gives reason for optimism
items.title_zh: EPO人工智能发明新数据带来乐观预期
items.title_en: EPO Data Shows Positive Trends in AI Patent Examination
items.summary: In a complex and rapidly evolving field, new statistics show positive trends at the examination stage
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文仅提供标题与摘要片段，指出欧洲专利局发布了关于人工智能相关发明的最新统计数据。数据显示，在这一复杂且快速发展的领域，审查阶段呈现出积极的趋势，这为业界带来了乐观情绪。
items.ai_summary_en: New statistics from the European Patent Office indicate positive developments in the examination of artificial intelligence-related inventions. Despite the complexity and rapid evolution characterizing this technical field, recent data suggests improving trends at the examination stage. These findings offer a basis for optimism regarding the procedural handling of AI applications within the EPO framework. The release highlights that, even in such a dynamic area, the examination process is demonstrating favorable patterns. This update provides an early signal for rights holders and practitioners tracking the administrative progression of AI patent portfolios in Europe, though detailed metrics remain limited in this initial summary.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Given the limited detail in the source, these findings should be viewed as preliminary indicators rather than definitive shifts in practice. The mention of positive trends suggests potential improvements in examination efficiency or clarity for AI filings. Practitioners should await the full dataset to understand specific metrics such as grant rates or objection frequencies before adjusting portfolio expectations. Current evidence supports cautious optimism but does not yet justify changes in filing behavior without further substantiation from the complete report.

items.title: Welttag des geistigen Eigentums: Fairplay statt Fakes
items.title_zh: 世界知识产权日：公平竞赛而非假货
items.title_en: DPMA Launches Anti-Counterfeiting Resources for World Intellectual Property Day
items.summary: Welttag des geistigen Eigentums: Fairplay statt Fakes - DPMA-Präsidentin Eva Schewior ruft Verbraucherinnen und Verbraucher zum Welttag des geistigen Eigentums zu Vorsicht bei Einkäufen auf – Neue Informationsseiten des DPMA zu Produkt- und Markenfälschungen auf dpma.de – Welttags-Motto „Geistiges Eigentum und Sport“: DPMA-Informationsstand im Münchner Werksviertel, weitere Veranstaltungen in ganz Deutschland – Schutz geistigen Eigentums fördert Lösungen für gesellschaftliche Herausforderungen,
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）局长在世界知识产权日呼吁消费者警惕购买假冒体育商品。DPMA发布新网页指导识别假货，并指出假冒行为关联有组织犯罪及劳工剥削。今年主题为“知识产权与体育”，DPMA在慕尼黑设立信息展台，引用OECD与EUIPO研究强调假冒对经济和社会的危害。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) marks World Intellectual Property Day with a campaign against product piracy, focusing on the theme of intellectual property and sport. DPMA President Eva Schewior urges consumers to exercise caution when purchasing sports merchandise, warning that counterfeit goods support organized crime and pose health risks. To aid identification, the DPMA has published new informational pages detailing signs of fake products, such as unusual textile gloss or unrealistic pricing. The initiative also addresses the role of influencers promoting counterfeit items. These resources aim to clarify the economic and social damages caused by piracy, including job losses and reduced competitiveness, while highlighting enforcement efforts across Germany.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This initiative reflects a broader European regulatory trend linking IP enforcement to public interest concerns like consumer safety and fair competition. Rights holders should note the DPMA’s emphasis on digital channels, particularly influencer marketing, as a key vector for counterfeits. The provided identification guides offer practical benchmarks for brand protection teams to enhance consumer education materials. Monitoring how national offices leverage international data from bodies like the OECD and EUIPO can help anticipate shifts in enforcement priorities and public messaging strategies regarding IP infringement.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["DPMA局长呼吁消费者警惕假冒球衣鞋类，避免支持有组织犯罪", "DPMA上线专题页面，提供识别产品与商标假冒的具体指南", "引用OECD与EUIPO研究，揭示假冒生产与劳工剥削及儿童劳动的关联"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DPMA releases new online guides helping consumers identify counterfeit sports apparel and footwear.", "President Schewior links counterfeit purchases to organized crime, health risks, and economic damage.", "Campaign addresses influencer promotion of fakes and illegal streaming under the sport theme."]

items.title: LD Paris, April 10, 2026, Order On Provisional Measures, UPC_CFI_1594/2025
items.title_zh: 巴黎分院临时措施裁定：隐含公开与有效性标准
items.title_en: UPC Paris: Implicit Disclosure Destroys Novelty and High Validity Threshold Bars Provisional Measures
items.summary: Novelty may be destroyed by implicit disclosure where the skilled person would inevitably infer a feature from the prior art (Art. 54, Art. 138(1)(a) EPC).
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院巴黎分院在SharkNinja诉Groupe SEB案中发布临时措施裁定。法院指出，若本领域技术人员能从现有技术必然推断出特征，则隐含公开可破坏新颖性。申请临时措施需专利有效性具有足够确定性，即有效可能性大于无效。法院拒绝将说明书限制读入权利要求，并将 interim 费用赔偿上限设为可回收成本的50%。
items.ai_summary_en: In SharkNinja v. Groupe SEB, the UPC Local Division in Paris ruled that novelty is destroyed by implicit disclosure if a skilled person inevitably infers a feature from prior art. The court rejected the request for provisional measures, finding the patent-in-suit more likely invalid than valid. The judgment emphasizes that claim terms must not be unduly limited by reading restrictions from the description into the claims. Furthermore, the decision confirms that granting provisional measures requires a sufficient degree of certainty regarding validity, specifically that it is more likely than not that the patent is valid. Additionally, interim cost reimbursement was capped at 50% of the maximum recoverable costs, aligning with recent Court of Appeal precedents on cost allocation in provisional proceedings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC临时措施程序中关于新颖性隐含公开的认定标准及有效性举证门槛。实务中需注意法院严格区分权利要求与说明书，避免不当引入限制。同时， interim 费用赔偿 capped at 50% 的规则增加了申请人的成本风险，需在策略上予以考量。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners seeking or opposing provisional measures before the UPC should prioritize early validity assessments, as the threshold for securing interim relief remains high. Opponents can effectively challenge patents by demonstrating that prior art implicitly discloses claimed features through inevitable technical inference. Conversely, patentees must ensure claims are construed broadly, avoiding unnecessary limitations derived from the specification. Regarding costs, parties should anticipate that interim reimbursement is generally capped at 50% of recoverable fees, necessitating careful budgeting for potential full cost exposure during urgent provisional stages of litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["隐含公开可破坏新颖性，前提是技术人员能必然且无合理怀疑地推断出该特征", "授予临时措施要求专利有效性具备足够确定性，即有效可能性大于无效可能性", "法院拒绝将说明书中的“直接耦合”或“密封”等限制读入未包含该限制的权利要求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Novelty is destroyed by implicit disclosure where a skilled person inevitably infers a claimed feature from the prior art teaching without reasonable doubt.", "Provisional measures require the patent to be more likely valid than not; courts deny relief if invalidity appears probable on the balance of probabilities.", "Courts must not import limitations from the description into claims, ensuring independent interpretation of claim terms based on their ordinary meaning."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确隐含公开在新颖性判断中的适用条件，需证明技术人员必然推断", "临时措施申请需满足更高的有效性确定性标准，平衡概率倾向于有效", "关注 interim 费用赔偿上限规则对诉讼成本策略的影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Challenge patent validity early using implicit disclosure arguments to block provisional measures, as courts require high certainty of validity for interim relie…", "Practice note: Maintain strict separation between claims and description during construction to prevent undue narrowing of protection scope in urgent proceedings.", "What to monitor: Cost allocation trends, specifically the application of the 50% cap on interim cost reimbursement following recent Court of Appeal guidance."]
core_points_en: Novelty is destroyed by implicit disclosure where a skilled person inevitably infers a claimed feature from the prior art teaching without reasonable doubt.
Provisional measures require the patent to be more likely valid than not; courts deny relief if invalidity appears probable on the balance of probabilities.
Courts must not import limitations from the description into claims, ensuring independent interpretation of claim terms based on their ordinary meaning.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Challenge patent validity early using implicit disclosure arguments to block provisional measures, as courts require high certainty of validity for interim relie…
Practice note: Maintain strict separation between claims and description during construction to prevent undue narrowing of protection scope in urgent proceedings.
What to monitor: Cost allocation trends, specifically the application of the 50% cap on interim cost reimbursement following recent Court of Appeal guidance.

items.title: LD Paris, April 14, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_2070/2025
items.title_zh: 巴黎地方法院：UPC对纯境外侵权无管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Paris: No Jurisdiction Over Non-EU Defendants for Acts Exclusively in Third Countries
items.summary: The UPC lacks international jurisdiction over non-EU/UPC defendants when alleged infringing acts occur exclusively in a third country, as there is no connection to the UPC territory.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院巴黎分院裁定，若被控侵权行为仅发生在第三国（如英国），且被告非欧盟/UPC成员，法院缺乏国际管辖权。但为避免判决冲突，法院可将管辖权异议与实体审理合并。此外，法官有权基于书面材料驳回口头听证请求，且在管辖权未决时拒绝向欧盟法院提请初步裁决。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Paris ruled that it lacks international jurisdiction over non-EU defendants when alleged infringing acts occur exclusively in a third country, such as the UK. Citing Articles 4, 7(2), and 8(1) of the Brussels I bis Regulation, the Court found it inappropriate to extend jurisdiction under Article 71b(2) due to the absence of a connection to UPC territory. However, the Court held that jurisdiction over a non-EU defendant may be joined with claims against an EU-domiciled co-defendant if the matters are closely connected. This approach aims to avoid irreconcilable judgments by hearing related claims together. The procedural order is appealable under Rule 220.2 RoP. Additionally, the Court clarified its discretion to deny oral hearings on preliminary objections or requests for CJEU preliminary rulings if written submissions suffice or the referral is premature.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在处理跨国被告时的管辖权边界，特别是针对英国等非UPC成员国被告的处理逻辑。实务中需关注法院如何平衡“适当性”原则与诉讼效率，以及将管辖权异议推迟至实体审理对诉讼策略的影响。同时，确认了法官在程序控制上的裁量权，包括限制口头听证和推迟欧盟法院 referral。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the limits of UPC jurisdiction regarding non-EU entities, particularly where infringing activities are confined to third countries like the UK. For multinational groups, this highlights the strategic importance of distinguishing between local and cross-border conduct. Plaintiffs may attempt to anchor jurisdiction via EU subsidiaries, making early jurisdictional challenges critical for non-EU parent companies. Defending parties should assess whether claims are sufficiently distinct to resist joinder. Furthermore, the ruling underscores judicial discretion in managing procedural efficiency, suggesting that robust written arguments can effectively substitute for oral hearings in preliminary stages, potentially accelerating case resolution while managing litigation costs.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC对仅在第三国实施侵权的非欧盟被告缺乏国际管辖权，因缺乏地域联系", "为免判决冲突，法院可依布鲁塞尔条例将管辖权问题并入实体审理，此决定可上诉", "若书面材料充足，法官可拒绝口头听证请求；管辖权未决时提请欧盟法院裁决被视为过早"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC lacks jurisdiction over non-EU defendants for infringing acts occurring exclusively outside UPC member states.", "Claims against non-EU defendants may be joined with EU co-defendants to prevent irreconcilable judgments.", "Courts may deny oral hearings or CJEU referrals based on sufficiency of written submissions or prematurity."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确UPC对纯境外侵权行为的管辖权限制，尤其是涉及英国被告时", "关注法院将管辖权异议与实体合并审理的适用条件及上诉路径", "留意法官在程序管理上的裁量权，如书面审理优先及推迟初步裁决的实践"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Non-EU defendants with purely third-country operations may successfully challenge UPC jurisdiction to avoid unified patent litigation risks.", "Practice note: Monitor plaintiff strategies joining non-EU parents with EU subsidiaries; prepare early jurisdictional objections and appeals.", "What to monitor: How courts apply 'closely connected' criteria under Brussels I bis to determine joinder appropriateness in future cases."]
core_points_en: UPC lacks jurisdiction over non-EU defendants for infringing acts occurring exclusively outside UPC member states.
Claims against non-EU defendants may be joined with EU co-defendants to prevent irreconcilable judgments.
Courts may deny oral hearings or CJEU referrals based on sufficiency of written submissions or prematurity.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Non-EU defendants with purely third-country operations may successfully challenge UPC jurisdiction to avoid unified patent litigation risks.
Practice note: Monitor plaintiff strategies joining non-EU parents with EU subsidiaries; prepare early jurisdictional objections and appeals.
What to monitor: How courts apply 'closely connected' criteria under Brussels I bis to determine joinder appropriateness in future cases.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 14, 2026, Order On Suspensive Effect, UPC_CoA_48/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：UPCA第74条优先，可授予暂停执行效力
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Article 74 UPCA Prevails Over Rules, Allowing Suspensive Effect
items.summary: The Court of Appeal can grant suspensive effect to an order pursuant to R. 220.2 RoP as Art. 74 UPCA prevails over R. 223.5 RoP.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在UPC_CoA_48/2026案中裁定，当《统一专利法院协定》(UPCA)与《程序规则》(RoP)冲突时，UPCA第74条优先，法院可依RoP 220.2条授予暂停执行效力。仅在“特殊情况”下（如命令明显错误、不可逆后果或基本程序权受损）才予批准。保证金通常被视为可逆，故难满足条件。申请人仅以中小企业身份主张无力支付保证金无效，需提供具体证据。此类裁定非最终决定，不涉及费用裁决。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CoA_48/2026, the Court of Appeal confirmed that Article 74 of the Unified Patent Court Agreement (UPCA) prevails over Rule 223.5 of the Rules of Procedure (RoP). Consequently, the Court may grant suspensive effect to orders under Rule 220.2 RoP in exceptional circumstances, such as manifest legal error or irreversible consequences. The Court rejected an appellant's claim of financial inability based solely on SME status, requiring specific evidence for security deposit exemptions. As this order is not a final decision concluding the action, no costs were awarded.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中若面临不利临时措施，申请暂停执行难度极大。需重点论证“不可逆后果”或“明显法律错误”，而非仅依赖财务困难。应提前准备详尽的财务证据以应对保证金要求，并密切关注UPC对程序规则的严格解释，避免程序性失误导致权益受损。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the hierarchy between the UPCA and procedural rules regarding interim relief, establishing a high threshold for obtaining suspensive effect. For rights holders and defendants, it underscores that financial hardship arguments require rigorous substantiation beyond general corporate classifications. The decision also confirms that applications for suspensive effect are interlocutory in nature, meaning they do not trigger immediate cost decisions, which impacts litigation budgeting and strategic timing for appeals within the UPC system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPCA第74条优先于RoP 223.5，允许法院依RoP 220.2授予暂停执行效力", "暂停执行仅限特殊情况，如命令明显错误或造成不可逆后果，保证金通常可逆", "主张无力提供保证金需具体证据，仅引用中小企业身份不足；裁定不涉费用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 74 UPCA takes precedence over conflicting Rules of Procedure, enabling the Court of Appeal to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2 RoP.", "Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifestly wrong orders or irreversible consequences; reversible security deposits generally do not qualify.", "Appellants must provide specific evidence of financial inability to pay security; referencing SME status alone is insufficient to meet the burden of proof."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["论证暂停执行需聚焦不可逆后果或明显错误，财务困难证明门槛极高", "应对保证金要求需提交具体财务证据，不能仅凭中小企业身份抗辩"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties seeking to halt enforcement pending appeal must demonstrate irreversible harm or clear legal error, as financial constraints alone rarely suffice.", "Practice note: When challenging security for costs orders, applicants should prepare detailed, specific financial documentation rather than relying on general business status clai…", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'exceptional circumstances' by the Court of Appeal, particularly regarding what constitutes irreversible consequences in patent disputes."]
core_points_en: Article 74 UPCA takes precedence over conflicting Rules of Procedure, enabling the Court of Appeal to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2 RoP.
Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifestly wrong orders or irreversible consequences; reversible security deposits generally do not qualify.
Appellants must provide specific evidence of financial inability to pay security; referencing SME status alone is insufficient to meet the burden of proof.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties seeking to halt enforcement pending appeal must demonstrate irreversible harm or clear legal error, as financial constraints alone rarely suffice.
Practice note: When challenging security for costs orders, applicants should prepare detailed, specific financial documentation rather than relying on general business status clai…
What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'exceptional circumstances' by the Court of Appeal, particularly regarding what constitutes irreversible consequences in patent disputes.

items.title: UPC: Court of Appeal orders licensing bar on defendants’ employees
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定对被告员工实施许可禁令
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Replaces External-Eyes-Only With Licensing Bar For Defendants’ Employees
items.summary: In two separate decisions handed down on the same day, the Court of Appeal of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) imposed a licensing bar on...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在Sun Patent诉Vivo及爱立信诉华硕两案中，拒绝原告提出的“仅限外部人员”保密机制，转而裁定对接触机密信息的被告员工实施一定期限的许可谈判禁令。法院认为员工身份不足以剥夺其访问权，但可通过禁止参与特定第三方许可谈判来减轻潜在损害，以此平衡公平审判权与第三方利益保护。
items.ai_summary_en: In two separate decisions issued on the same day, the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal rejected claimants' requests for an external-eyes-only confidentiality regime in standard essential patent disputes involving Sun Patent Trust v Vivo and Ericsson v ASUS. The Court prioritized defendants' right to effective remedies and fair trial access over broad exclusion of employees. Instead, it upheld a licensing bar prohibiting specific named employees from participating in third-party licensing negotiations for a defined period. This approach balances trade secret protection with procedural fairness, establishing a new precedent for handling confidential information in FRAND litigation at the UPC.
items.ai_insight_zh: UPC确立了在SEP诉讼中处理机密许可协议的新程序标准：优先保障当事人员工的诉讼访问权，辅以行为限制（许可禁令）而非完全隔离。企业需关注此程序对内部合规及诉讼团队分工的影响，特别是在涉及多方许可谈判时的隔离措施有效性。
items.ai_insight_en: Litigants in European standard essential patent disputes should anticipate that courts will generally grant defendant employees access to core licensing data rather than imposing total isolation. Parties must proactively establish internal compliance mechanisms, including strict firewalls, to ensure designated personnel do not participate in relevant licensing negotiations. Violating these court-ordered bars may lead to adverse legal presumptions or sanctions. Consequently, strategic planning should focus on managing internal information flows and selecting appropriate non-negotiating staff for case coordination to mitigate regulatory risks while leveraging broader evidence disclosure opportunities.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院拒绝“仅限外部人员”保密机制，裁定对被告特定员工实施许可禁令", "法院认定员工访问机密信息对保障有效救济和公平审判至关重要，一般不应被剥夺", "通过禁止相关员工在一定期限内参与第三方许可谈判，以 mitigate 对第三方的潜在损害"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal ruled that employee status alone is insufficient grounds to deny access to confidential licensing evidence.", "A licensing bar restricting involvement in negotiations replaces total exclusion to protect third-party interests effectively.", "External-eyes-only regimes are reserved for exceptional cases, such as proven conflicts between patent and antitrust systems."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC倾向于通过行为禁令而非完全排除员工访问来处理机密信息，强调公平审判权", "许可禁令成为替代“仅限外部人员”机制的主要手段，期限依个案而定（如2年或5年）", "需持续观察该判例对未来SEP诉讼中保密俱乐部规则及反垄断交叉问题的具体适用影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Total isolation of opposing employees is no longer a viable default strategy in UPC FRAND proceedings.", "Practice note: Implement robust internal firewalls and designate non-negotiating staff to handle sensitive case materials safely.", "What to monitor: Future applications of licensing bars and potential exceptions where external-eyes-only regimes may still apply."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal ruled that employee status alone is insufficient grounds to deny access to confidential licensing evidence.
A licensing bar restricting involvement in negotiations replaces total exclusion to protect third-party interests effectively.
External-eyes-only regimes are reserved for exceptional cases, such as proven conflicts between patent and antitrust systems.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Total isolation of opposing employees is no longer a viable default strategy in UPC FRAND proceedings.
Practice note: Implement robust internal firewalls and designate non-negotiating staff to handle sensitive case materials safely.
What to monitor: Future applications of licensing bars and potential exceptions where external-eyes-only regimes may still apply.

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal: Accuracy of Ex Parte Applications
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：单方申请须确保事实披露准确完整
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Strict Duty of Full Disclosure in Ex Parte Applications
items.summary: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order on the basis...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Ecovacs 诉 Roborock 案中维持撤销单方检查令。法院认定申请人未遵守程序规则 192.3，未履行披露可能影响法院决定的重大事实义务。法院强调单方程序中申请人负有更高披露要求，申请时的遗漏或歪曲无法通过后续提交补救，事后补充理由不予采信，确立了严格的程序合规标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the UPC Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order. The Court found that the applicant failed to comply with Rule 192.3 of the Rules of Procedure, which mandates the disclosure of any material fact that might influence the Court's decision. Emphasizing the heightened duty of candor in ex parte proceedings, the Court ruled that omissions or distorted accounts cannot be remedied by subsequent submissions. Facts introduced later are disregarded, confirming that initial applications must contain complete and accurate disclosure to survive judicial scrutiny.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 提起单方申请时，务必确保首次提交材料的完整性与真实性。任何关键事实的遗漏或表述不成都可能导致命令被撤销且无法挽回，需建立严格的内部合规审查机制以应对高标准程序要求。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces the critical importance of procedural rigor in UPC ex parte applications. Rights holders must ensure that initial filings provide a comprehensive and undistorted account of all relevant facts, as the Court will not accept post-hoc justifications. This strict approach protects the integrity of proceedings where the defendant is not initially heard, placing the burden squarely on the applicant to demonstrate full transparency from the outset.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单方申请必须全面、准确披露所有重大事实，否则命令将被撤销", "申请时的披露缺陷无法通过后续审查请求中的补充材料进行补救", "法院重申单方程序中申请人承担完全依赖其陈述的更高举证责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 192.3 RoP imposes a strict duty to disclose all material facts known to the applicant in ex parte proceedings.", "Omissions or distorted accounts in the initial application cannot be cured by later submissions or review requests.", "The Court disregards facts introduced after filing, requiring full accuracy at the moment the application is made."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["单方申请首份文件决定成败，严禁依赖事后补充来修补事实漏洞", "企业需强化内部事实核查流程，确保披露内容与主案陈述高度一致"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Applicants must verify that ex parte disclosures align fully with factual accounts in parallel main proceedings to avoid revocation.", "Practice note: Conduct rigorous internal fact-checking before filing to ensure no material facts are omitted or misrepresented.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying what constitutes 'material fact' under Rule 192.3 in complex technical disputes."]
core_points_en: Rule 192.3 RoP imposes a strict duty to disclose all material facts known to the applicant in ex parte proceedings.
Omissions or distorted accounts in the initial application cannot be cured by later submissions or review requests.
The Court disregards facts introduced after filing, requiring full accuracy at the moment the application is made.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Applicants must verify that ex parte disclosures align fully with factual accounts in parallel main proceedings to avoid revocation.
Practice note: Conduct rigorous internal fact-checking before filing to ensure no material facts are omitted or misrepresented.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying what constitutes 'material fact' under Rule 192.3 in complex technical disputes.

items.title: UPC Orders Infringer to Publish Decision on their Website
items.title_zh: UPC 责令侵权方在其官网发布法院判决摘要
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Orders Infringer to Publish Judgment on Corporate Website
items.summary: A recent decision handed down by the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 underscores the Unified Patent Court's authority to...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院在案件中裁定，被告利用官网误导公众其产品未侵权。依据 UPCA 第 80 条，法院除允许原告在行业期刊发布判决外，更责令被告在其官网首页发布判决主文一个月。此举旨在纠正被告制造的虚假印象，确保其约八千名客户获知侵权事实，彰显了 UPC 强制透明度的权威。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court's Düsseldorf Local Division exercised its authority under Article 80 of the UPCA in case UPC_CFI_351/2024. The Court ordered defendants to publish the operative part of an infringement judgment on their corporate website for one month. This measure addressed false public impressions created by the defendants' prior statements claiming non-infringement. The ruling complements permission granted to the claimant to publish the decision in industry journals, aiming to rectify market misconceptions among approximately 8,000 customers supplied by the infringing party.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应诉时需谨言慎行，避免在官网或公关稿中过早断言不侵权。若败诉，可能面临被强制在自有渠道公示判决的风险，这将严重损害商业信誉并波及现有客户群，需提前评估舆情应对方案。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the UPC's willingness to use publication orders as a corrective tool against self-generated reputational damage during litigation. Rights holders should consider requesting such measures when opponents actively mislead the market about legal status. Conversely, companies facing proceedings must carefully manage public communications to avoid exacerbating liability or triggering mandatory transparency remedies that could impact commercial relationships.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院依据 UPCA 第 80 条行使裁量权，责令侵权方自费发布信息", "被告因在官网宣称产品合法而被判需在同一平台发布判决主文", "该救济措施旨在直接消除被告误导公众造成的错误市场认知"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 80 UPCA empowers the Court to order dissemination of decisions at the infringer's expense to correct misleading public narratives.", "Defendants were ordered to post the judgment's operative part on their own websites to directly counteract prior claims of product legality.", "The restorative measure ensures accurate information reaches the defendant's customer base regarding the confirmed patent infringement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["慎用企业官网发布涉诉产品合法性声明，以免败诉后遭反制", "需将“强制公示判决”纳入诉讼风险评估，制定危机公关预案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Publication orders can significantly impact brand reputation and customer trust, making them a critical risk factor in enforcement strategies.", "Practice note: Monitor opponent's public statements regarding ongoing disputes; evidence of misleading claims strengthens requests for Article 80 corrective measures.", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar approaches, establishing a precedent for mandatory digital disclosure of adverse judgments."]
core_points_en: Article 80 UPCA empowers the Court to order dissemination of decisions at the infringer's expense to correct misleading public narratives.
Defendants were ordered to post the judgment's operative part on their own websites to directly counteract prior claims of product legality.
The restorative measure ensures accurate information reaches the defendant's customer base regarding the confirmed patent infringement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Publication orders can significantly impact brand reputation and customer trust, making them a critical risk factor in enforcement strategies.
Practice note: Monitor opponent's public statements regarding ongoing disputes; evidence of misleading claims strengthens requests for Article 80 corrective measures.
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar approaches, establishing a precedent for mandatory digital disclosure of adverse judgments.

items.title: Nokia granted anti-interim-licence injunctions against Geely by UPC, German regional court
items.title_zh: UPC与德国法院授予诺基亚针对吉利反临时许可禁令
items.title_en: UPC and German Court Grant Nokia Anti-Suit Injunctions Against Geely in SEP Dispute
items.summary: Chinese carmaker sought interim licence order against Finnish SEP owner
items.ai_summary_zh: 中国车企吉利向芬兰SEP持有者诺基亚寻求临时许可令未果。统一专利法院（UPC）及德国地区法院均裁定支持诺基亚，授予其针对吉利的反临时许可禁令。此举旨在阻止吉利在FRAND谈判期间单方面强制获取许可，确立了SEP权利人在面临非善意被许可人时的防御性救济优势，强化了欧洲SEP诉讼中禁令策略的有效性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) and a German regional court have rejected Geely’s request for an interim license order against Nokia, instead granting anti-interim-licence injunctions to the Finnish standard-essential patent (SEP) holder. This ruling prevents the automotive manufacturer from unilaterally imposing licensing terms during ongoing FRAND negotiations. The decisions affirm that SEP owners can secure defensive remedies against implementers attempting to force licenses without demonstrating willingness to negotiate in good faith. By supporting Nokia’s position, the courts reinforce the strategic utility of injunctive relief in European SEP litigation, signaling a judicial preference for protecting patent holders’ rights against aggressive procedural tactics by alleged infringers.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决警示中国车企在欧洲SEP谈判中需展现更高诚意，避免激进诉讼策略。企业应建立更完善的FRAND合规体系，提前评估禁令风险。面对UPC及德国法院倾向保护权利人的趋势，建议加强早期许可谈判准备，避免因程序对抗导致市场准入受阻或高额赔偿。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment highlights a significant judicial trend within the UPC and German courts toward protecting SEP holders from bad-faith negotiation tactics. Market participants must demonstrate genuine willingness to license on FRAND terms to avoid injunctive relief. Companies should prioritize robust compliance frameworks and engage in early, substantive licensing discussions rather than relying on aggressive litigation strategies. Failure to align with these expectations risks market access restrictions and substantial financial liabilities, emphasizing the need for proactive risk assessment in European SEP disputes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC与德国法院驳回吉利临时许可请求，支持诺基亚禁令申请", "裁定确立SEP权利人可获反临时许可禁令以对抗单方许可企图", "强化欧洲SEP诉讼中权利人利用禁令施压FRAND谈判的法律地位"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Courts dismissed Geely's interim license application while upholding Nokia's request for anti-interim-licence injunctions.", "Ruling establishes that SEP holders may obtain defensive injunctions to counter unilateral licensing attempts by implementers.", "Decisions strengthen the legal standing of patent owners using injunctions to pressure fair, reasonable, and non-discriminatory negotiations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["中国车企需提升FRAND谈判诚意，规避激进诉讼引发的禁令风险", "应完善合规体系并加强早期谈判，应对UPC及德国法院的保护倾向"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implementers must demonstrate clear willingness to license on FRAND terms to mitigate the risk of injunctive relief and market exclusion.", "Practice note: Establish comprehensive FRAND compliance protocols and initiate early, good-faith negotiations to counter potential defensive injunction strategies.", "What to monitor: Evolving UPC and German case law regarding the threshold for 'willingness' and the availability of anti-suit measures in SEP conflicts."]
core_points_en: Courts dismissed Geely's interim license application while upholding Nokia's request for anti-interim-licence injunctions.
Ruling establishes that SEP holders may obtain defensive injunctions to counter unilateral licensing attempts by implementers.
Decisions strengthen the legal standing of patent owners using injunctions to pressure fair, reasonable, and non-discriminatory negotiations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implementers must demonstrate clear willingness to license on FRAND terms to mitigate the risk of injunctive relief and market exclusion.
Practice note: Establish comprehensive FRAND compliance protocols and initiate early, good-faith negotiations to counter potential defensive injunction strategies.
What to monitor: Evolving UPC and German case law regarding the threshold for 'willingness' and the availability of anti-suit measures in SEP conflicts.

items.title: Rolls-Royce tops UK’s most iconic British brands list, reveals UKIPO
items.title_zh: 劳斯莱斯领衔英国最具标志性品牌榜单
items.title_en: UKIPO Reveals Rolls-Royce as Top Iconic British Brand in 150th Anniversary Poll
items.summary: The luxury car brand is joined by the likes of Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini and the BBC, in a poll to celebrate the 150-year anniversary of trademark registration in the UK.
items.ai_summary_zh: 为庆祝英国商标注册制度建立 150 周年，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）公布了一项民意调查结果。豪华汽车品牌劳斯莱斯荣登“英国最具标志性品牌”榜首，与川宁、博柏利、Calpol、Mini 及英国广播公司（BBC）等知名品牌共同入选。该活动旨在回顾并彰显商标在英国商业历史与文化传承中的核心价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has published a poll identifying the most iconic British brands to mark the 150th anniversary of trademark registration in the United Kingdom. Luxury car manufacturer Rolls-Royce topped the list, joining other long-standing entities such as Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC. This initiative highlights the historical significance of trademarks within the UK commercial landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This publication underscores the enduring cultural and commercial value associated with long-established trademarks in the UK market. For rights holders, it serves as a reminder of the importance of maintaining brand heritage and public recognition over extended periods, which can contribute to overall brand equity and distinctiveness in a mature jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["劳斯莱斯获评英国最具标志性品牌第一名", "UKIPO 发布榜单庆祝商标注册 150 周年", "川宁、博柏利等经典品牌共同入选名单"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rolls-Royce was named the most iconic British brand in a UKIPO poll celebrating 150 years of trademark registration.", "Other notable brands included in the list are Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴百年品牌建设经验，深化品牌文化内涵", "重视商标在英国市场的长期声誉积累与维护"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Long-standing brand recognition remains a key asset for trademark owners operating in the UK market.", "Practice note: Historical continuity and public perception are significant factors in assessing iconic brand status.", "What to monitor: Future UKIPO initiatives or reports regarding trademark history and brand valuation metrics."]
core_points_en: Rolls-Royce was named the most iconic British brand in a UKIPO poll celebrating 150 years of trademark registration.
Other notable brands included in the list are Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Long-standing brand recognition remains a key asset for trademark owners operating in the UK market.
Practice note: Historical continuity and public perception are significant factors in assessing iconic brand status.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO initiatives or reports regarding trademark history and brand valuation metrics.

items.title: Tesla’s 5G tech case may be ‘most significant since Unwired Planet’
items.title_zh: 特斯拉5G案或成继Unwired Planet后最重要案件
items.title_en: Tesla’s 5G tech case may be ‘most significant since Unwired Planet’
items.summary: Tech lawyers wait to see if UK courts will cement their role as global arbiter of FRAND rates, in the car brand’s dispute with tech giant InterDigital and licensing firm Avanci.
items.ai_summary_zh: 科技法律界关注英国法院是否将在特斯拉与InterDigital及Avanci的争端中，巩固其作为全球FRAND费率仲裁者的角色。该案被视为自Unwired Planet案以来最具意义的SEP诉讼。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案核心在于英国法院对全球FRAND费率的管辖权确认。需持续监控诉讼进程，观察其是否延续Unwired Planet案先例，进而影响跨国SEP许可策略及司法管辖选择。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["原文摘要显示特斯拉正与InterDigital及Avanci发生5G技术争端", "法律界观察英国法院能否借此案确立全球FRAND费率仲裁地位", "标题指出该案可能成为自Unwired Planet案以来最重大的SEP案件"]

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Transfer of Costs Application in Rematec v Europe Forestry | EIP
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉法院驳回Rematec案费用移送申请
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Transfer of Costs Application to First Instance
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal confirms that costs applications must be filed at the Court of First Instance, rejecting transfer in Rematec v Europe Forestry and clarifying Rules of Procedure on costs assessment.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉法院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中裁定，其无权直接评估诉讼费用，亦拒绝将费用申请移送至一审法院。法院明确，依据《程序规则》第150条，费用评估须作为独立程序在一审法院启动，即便涉及上诉阶段费用。此举旨在保障当事人依第157条享有的上诉权利。原告因逾期向一审法院重新提交申请而面临程序障碍。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal confirmed it lacks jurisdiction to assess costs applications, rejecting a request to transfer such an application from the appeal level to the Court of First Instance in Rematec v Europe Forestry. The Court clarified that cost assessment is a distinct procedure under Rule 150 of the Rules of Procedure, which must always commence at the Court of First Instance. This requirement applies even when the costs relate to appeal proceedings. The Court reasoned that starting at the first instance preserves the right to appeal the costs decision under Rule 157. Consequently, the claimant’s attempt to resubmit the application to the lower court faced procedural deadlines.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案澄清了UPC费用评估的程序路径，强调即使上诉法院作出实体判决，费用评估仍须回归一审法院启动。实务中需严格遵循第150条及第151条的时限要求，避免因程序错位或逾期导致权利丧失，凸显了UPC程序规则的严格性与独立性。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies the mandatory procedural path for cost assessments at the UPC, emphasizing that all such requests must originate at the Court of First Instance. Rights holders must ensure strict adherence to filing deadlines when redirecting applications, as procedural errors may lead to time-bar issues. The decision reinforces the structural separation between substantive appeal judgments and subsequent cost quantification procedures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉法院确认无管辖权直接评估费用，且拒绝将申请移送至一审法院", "费用评估须依程序规则第150条在一审法院启动，以保留后续上诉权", "该规则同样适用于针对上诉法院决定所产生的费用评估申请"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Court of Appeal lacks jurisdiction to assess costs and refused to transfer the application to the Court of First Instance.", "Cost assessment under Rule 150 must begin at the Court of First Instance to preserve appeal rights under Rule 157.", "This procedural requirement applies equally to costs arising from Court of Appeal decisions or orders."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确UPC费用评估必须从一审法院启动的程序刚性要求", "警示当事人需严格遵守程序规则中的时限，避免逾期风险", "观察后续类似案件中法院对程序瑕疵的容忍度及补救措施"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties prevailing on appeal must file for cost assessment at the Court of First Instance, not the Court of Appeal, to avoid jurisdictional rejection.", "Practice note: Strictly observe Rule 151 deadlines when submitting cost applications to the Court of First Instance, even if correcting a prior filing error at the appellate level.", "What to monitor: Future UPC guidance on whether minor procedural missteps in cost filings can be remedied without prejudicing the right to recovery."]
core_points_en: Court of Appeal lacks jurisdiction to assess costs and refused to transfer the application to the Court of First Instance.
Cost assessment under Rule 150 must begin at the Court of First Instance to preserve appeal rights under Rule 157.
This procedural requirement applies equally to costs arising from Court of Appeal decisions or orders.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties prevailing on appeal must file for cost assessment at the Court of First Instance, not the Court of Appeal, to avoid jurisdictional rejection.
Practice note: Strictly observe Rule 151 deadlines when submitting cost applications to the Court of First Instance, even if correcting a prior filing error at the appellate level.
What to monitor: Future UPC guidance on whether minor procedural missteps in cost filings can be remedied without prejudicing the right to recovery.

items.title: Law and practice snippets: April 2026
items.title_zh: UKIPO发布数字设计审查新指南并上调官费
items.title_en: UK IPO Raises Fees and Issues New Guidance on Digital Design Registration
items.summary: An update on recent practice points by our Law and Practice Committee, including a new Designs Practice Notice, certificate issuance and tribunal timescales.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）于2026年4月1日实施平均25%的官费上调，商标申请及续展费用均有增加。同时发布DPN 01/26号外观设计实践通知，明确图标、GUI及网页等数字设计的审查标准，特别规范含动画或运动元素的设计视图提交要求，强调单一整体印象及免责声明的作用，旨在提升注册清晰度与确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office implemented an average 25% fee increase effective 1 April 2026, raising online trademark application and renewal costs. Concurrently, the Office published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing updated examination guidance for registered designs covering icons, graphical user interfaces (GUIs), web pages, and digital assets. The notice clarifies requirements for static and animated designs, emphasizing the need for multiple views to demonstrate movement and ensuring a single, unitary overall impression. It also addresses the role of written disclaimers in defining the scope of protection for these digital representations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国需关注GUI及动态外观设计合规成本上升。建议提前优化设计视图布局，利用免责声明规避非保护部分争议，以应对更严格的审查标准。同时需预算调整，评估官费上涨对海外IP组合维护的影响，确保持续竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: The new DPN 01/26 establishes immediate procedural expectations for protecting digital interface elements in the UK, requiring precise visual disclosures to satisfy the unitary overall impression test. Rights holders managing portfolios of GUIs and animated icons should review existing and pending applications against these clarified examination practices. The concurrent fee adjustment necessitates a review of budget allocations for trademark maintenance and new filings within the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO自2026年4月1日起实施平均25%官费上调，商标在线申请增至205英镑", "发布DPN 01/26指南，细化图标、GUI及含动画数字外观设计的视图提交规范", "强调通过多视图展示静态与动态设计，确保注册体现单一整体印象"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25% on 1 April 2026, with online trademark filing rising to £205 per class.", "Designs Practice Notice 01/26 clarifies examination standards for GUIs, icons, and animated digital design applications.", "Applicants must use multiple views to clearly show animation or movement, ensuring a single overall impression on the register."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI及动态设计视图，利用免责声明规避审查风险", "评估官费上涨影响，调整英国IP组合维护预算策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Portfolio managers should assess the impact of the 25% fee increase on upcoming trademark renewals and new application budgets.", "Practice note: Ensure digital design submissions include sufficient views to depict animation or movement, complying with DPN 01/26 requirements.", "What to monitor: Observe how the UK IPO applies the new guidelines to borderline cases involving complex animated user interface elements."]
core_points_en: UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25% on 1 April 2026, with online trademark filing rising to £205 per class.
Designs Practice Notice 01/26 clarifies examination standards for GUIs, icons, and animated digital design applications.
Applicants must use multiple views to clearly show animation or movement, ensuring a single overall impression on the register.

Practice note: Ensure digital design submissions include sufficient views to depict animation or movement, complying with DPN 01/26 requirements.
What to monitor: Observe how the UK IPO applies the new guidelines to borderline cases involving complex animated user interface elements.

items.title: The UK IPO issues new Designs Practice Notice
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布数字外观设计审查新指南
items.title_en: UK IPO Issues New Guidance on Protecting Digital Designs and GUIs
items.summary: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has issued new guidance on protecting digital designs, including graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages and graphic symbols/icons.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UK IPO）发布首份2024年外观设计实践通知（DPN 01/26），旨在澄清图形用户界面、网页及图标等数字外观设计的审查标准。鉴于此类申请量上升，新规强调注册簿需清晰无歧义地展示设计整体印象。指南详细规定了静态与动态设计的提交要求，允许使用最多12个视图展示动画序列，并明确了书面免责声明在界定保护范围时的作用，若解释过于复杂可能引发异议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing immediate guidance on registering digital designs such as graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages, and icons. This is the first DPN issued since 2024, addressing a rise in applications for these assets. The notice clarifies that the register must clearly show the design's overall impression without ambiguity. It details examination standards for static and moving designs, permitting up to 12 views to depict animation sequences. The guidance also outlines acceptable practices for written disclaimers, emphasizing clarity to avoid objections based on complex interpretation requirements.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国时，应严格遵循新指南优化GUI及UI设计的外观专利申请策略。建议充分利用12个视图上限完整呈现动态交互效果，确保视觉表达清晰无歧义。同时，谨慎使用免责声明，避免因表述模糊导致审查异议，以保障数字资产在英国市场的知识产权保护强度与稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This practice notice provides essential clarity for rights holders managing portfolios of digital assets in the UK market. By specifying how static and dynamic interfaces should be represented, the UK IPO aims to reduce uncertainty during examination. Practitioners should ensure that visual representations and any accompanying disclaimers align strictly with these new standards to maintain robust protection for GUIs and interactive elements.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UK IPO发布DPN 01/26，明确GUI及数字外观设计的审查原则与整体印象标准", "规范动态设计提交，允许使用最多12个视图清晰展示动画 progression", "确认书面免责声明的效力，但要求清晰易懂，避免过度复杂的解释需求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.", "Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.", "Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI专利视图提交策略，利用多视图清晰呈现动态交互细节", "审慎使用免责声明，确保界定清晰以避免因解释复杂引发的审查异议"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.", "Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.", "What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance."]
core_points_en: DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.
Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.
Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.
Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.
What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance.

items.title: Hamburg Local Division clarifies universal jurisdiction under Art. 4 Brussels I Recast
items.title_zh: UPC 汉堡分部澄清布鲁塞尔条例下的普遍管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Confirms Universal Jurisdiction Under Brussels I Recast for Non-UPC Acts
items.summary: Dyson v Dreame – Hamburg Local Division, 7 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 汉堡分部在戴森诉追觅案中裁定，对住所地在成员国的被告拥有普遍管辖权，涵盖西班牙等非 UPC 区及英国侵权。但法院限制了共同被告管辖权，认为欧盟授权代表不足以作为锚定被告追究英国分销商责任，最终驳回针对英国的禁令请求。
items.ai_summary_en: In Dyson v Dreame, the UPC Hamburg Local Division granted a preliminary injunction for EP 3 119 235, confirming that the UPC exercises universal jurisdiction under Article 4 of the Brussels I Recast Regulation over defendants domiciled in UPC Member States. This jurisdiction extends to infringements occurring in non-UPC territories, including Spain and the United Kingdom. However, the Court significantly restricted the application of Article 8(1) regarding co-defendants. It ruled that an EU authorized representative could not serve as an anchor defendant for a UK distributor, as the regulatory framework did not establish sufficient foreseeability for joint liability. Consequently, while relief was granted for UPC states and Spain, claims concerning the UK were dismissed.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕 UPC 普遍管辖权带来的跨境诉讼风险，即便在非 UPC 国家也可能被卷入。同时，单纯设立欧盟代表处未必能覆盖英国法律责任，应针对英欧市场分别构建合规与抗辩体系，避免管辖连接点误判。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the extraterritorial reach of the UPC for rights holders seeking pan-European enforcement, particularly against entities with a domicile in a participating Member State. It simultaneously establishes important boundaries for joinder strategies, indicating that mere regulatory compliance roles in the EU do not automatically create jurisdictional links for distinct UK market activities. Parties must carefully structure their European and UK distribution entities to manage litigation exposure and ensure that jurisdictional anchors are legally robust and factually distinct across these markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["确认 UPC 对成员国被告拥有涵盖非 UPC 领土的普遍管辖权", "限制共同被告管辖权，要求侵权行为关联具有合理可预见性", "欧盟授权代表角色不足以构成英国法下的共同侵权或中间人责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.", "Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.", "Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用普遍管辖权规则评估在欧整体诉讼风险敞口", "区分英欧法律主体角色，避免单一架构导致责任落空"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…", "Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities."]
core_points_en: The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.
Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.
Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…
Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26: Practice in respect of graphic symbols/icons, graphical/web user interfaces and animated designs
items.title_zh: UKIPO 发布 DPN 01/26：图形符号、图形化界面与动态图样审查指引
items.title_en: UKIPO Issues DPN 01/26 on Graphic Symbols, GUIs and Animated Designs
items.summary: This provides information on the examination of applications which consist of graphic symbols/icons, graphical web user interfaces and animated designs.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布 Designs Practice Notice 01/26，说明图形符号、图形化或网页用户界面以及动态图样申请的审查处理方式。该文件为设计申请人在提交 GUI、图标及动态设计时提供更明确的审查口径。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26. This statutory guidance outlines the examination practice for design applications consisting of graphic symbols, icons, graphical or web user interfaces, and animated designs. The notice provides official information on how these specific types of digital and interface-related designs are assessed during the registration process. It serves as a reference for applicants and practitioners regarding the formal requirements and examination standards applied to non-traditional design representations in the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这是一项具有直接实务意义的设计审查更新。涉及软件界面、图标库、车载界面或动态图样的企业，应结合该通知重新检查申请图示、动态表现方式和保护范围表述，以降低形式和审查层面的不确定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This notice clarifies the UKIPO's approach to examining digital design assets. Rights holders should review the guidance to ensure application materials align with current examination expectations for interface and animated elements. Monitoring future updates to this practice notice is advisable as digital design conventions evolve.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 发布 DPN 01/26 说明特定设计申请的审查实践。", "适用对象包括图形符号、图形化或网页用户界面以及动态图样。", "该通知为相关设计申请的表达和提交提供官方操作口径。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO publishes DPN 01/26 covering examination of graphic symbols and icons.", "Guidance addresses practice for graphical web user interfaces and animated designs."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["GUI 和动态图样的设计申请正在获得更清晰的官方审查框架。", "申请材料的视觉表达方式会直接影响可注册性和保护边界。", "数字产品团队与外部代理应同步更新设计申请模板。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Clarifies examination standards for digital assets like GUIs and animated designs in the UK.", "Practice note: Applicants should verify that visual representations meet the specific requirements outlined in DPN 01/26.", "What to monitor: Future revisions to UKIPO practice notices regarding digital and interface design protection."]
core_points_en: UKIPO publishes DPN 01/26 covering examination of graphic symbols and icons.
Guidance addresses practice for graphical web user interfaces and animated designs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies examination standards for digital assets like GUIs and animated designs in the UK.
Practice note: Applicants should verify that visual representations meet the specific requirements outlined in DPN 01/26.
What to monitor: Future revisions to UKIPO practice notices regarding digital and interface design protection.

items.title: Not so easy: easyGroup wins on confusion, but loses on non-use
items.title_zh: easyGroup胜混淆但败于未使用：商标侵权案解析
items.title_en: easyGroup Wins on Confusion but Loses Case Due to Non-Use Defence
items.summary: In easyGroup Limited v Jaybank Leisure Limited [2025] EWHC 3077 (IPEC), HHJ Hacon dealt with a trade mark claim with an unusual outcome. easyGroup succeeded on infringement in principle, but still lost the case. That is what makes the decision worth reading. Background and the issues
items.ai_summary_zh: 在英国easyGroup诉Jaybank案中，法院认定被告使用EASIHIRE构成侵权，但因原告无法证明easyHire商标在相关服务上的真实使用，依据第11A条抗辩驳回诉讼。此案凸显了第11A条作为实质性抗辩的功能，即无需单独提起撤销程序即可挑战商标可执行性。
items.ai_summary_en: In easyGroup Limited v Jaybank Leisure Limited, the UK Intellectual Property Enterprise Court found that Jaybank’s use of EASIHIRE infringed easyGroup’s easyHire mark under section 10(2) of the Trade Marks Act 1994. However, easyGroup ultimately lost the claim because it failed to prove genuine use of the mark for the relevant services. The defendant successfully raised a section 11A defence, demonstrating that the mark was liable to revocation at the relevant date. This judgment highlights that establishing a likelihood of confusion is insufficient if the claimant cannot substantiate genuine use, allowing section 11A to operate as a substantive defence within infringement proceedings without a separate counterclaim for revocation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了英国商标法中未使用抗辩的独立防御价值。权利人即便在混淆判定上占优，若缺乏充分的使用证据链，仍可能丧失救济。需关注法院对网站链接及品牌架构证据在证明真实使用时的严格审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision underscores the critical importance of maintaining robust evidence of genuine use alongside brand protection strategies. Rights holders should note that section 11A allows defendants to challenge enforceability directly within infringement actions. Courts will scrutinize digital evidence, such as website usage, strictly against statutory requirements rather than accepting broad brand architecture arguments. Ensuring documented, qualifying use for specific services is essential to prevent successful non-use defences, even when confusion is clearly established.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定被告标志易致混淆，原则上构成商标侵权", "原告未能证明涉案商标在主张服务上的真实使用", "被告依据第11A条成功抗辩，导致原告最终败诉"]

Practice note: Section 11A functions as a powerful substantive defence in UK proceedings, enabling defendants to invalidate claims without filing separate revocation counterclaims.
What to monitor: Judicial scrutiny of digital footprint evidence, including website links and brand structures, when assessing genuine use for specific service categories.
