items.title: New China regulations aim to block, punish measures deemed as foreign overreach
items.title_zh: 中国新规旨在阻断并惩罚被视为外国越权的措施
items.title_en: China Introduces New Regulations to Counter Foreign Extraterritorial Measures in SEP Disputes
items.summary: As it comes under scrutiny for its approach to cross-border SEP disputes, China now says it will act against foreign measures improperly exerting extraterritorial jurisdiction
items.ai_summary_zh: 在跨境标准必要专利（SEP）纠纷处理方式受到审查之际，中国宣布将采取行动，反制不当行使域外管辖权的外国措施。此举旨在应对国际司法管辖权冲突，保护本国企业在全球SEP许可谈判中的合法权益，防止外国法院通过禁令或全球费率裁决干涉中国司法主权及市场公平。
items.ai_summary_en: Amidst increasing international scrutiny regarding its handling of cross-border standard-essential patent (SEP) disputes, China has announced new regulatory measures designed to counteract foreign legal actions deemed to improperly exercise extraterritorial jurisdiction. These regulations aim to address conflicts in international judicial authority and protect the legitimate rights of domestic entities during global SEP licensing negotiations. The primary objective is to prevent foreign courts from interfering with China’s judicial sovereignty and market fairness through injunctions or global rate determinations. This development highlights a strategic shift in managing cross-border intellectual property litigation, signaling a more assertive stance against perceived foreign overreach. Market participants must now navigate a complex landscape where jurisdictional conflicts are increasingly politicized, requiring careful assessment of how these new rules impact ongoing and future SEP enforcement strategies across different legal systems.
items.ai_insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，需密切关注中欧司法管辖权博弈对SEP诉讼的影响。建议企业在面对全球FRAND许可谈判时，综合运用中外法律工具进行抗辩，避免单方面接受不利裁决。同时，应加强合规管理，评估新法规对跨境业务及知识产权布局的潜在风险，制定多元化争议解决策略。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders operating in Europe and globally should closely monitor the evolving dynamics between Chinese and foreign judicial jurisdictions regarding SEP enforcement. It is advisable for companies to employ a comprehensive strategy utilizing both Chinese and foreign legal instruments during global FRAND licensing negotiations, rather than accepting unfavorable unilateral rulings. Strengthening compliance management is critical to assess potential risks posed by these new regulations to cross-border business operations and intellectual property portfolios. Developing diversified dispute resolution strategies will help mitigate legal risks associated with conflicting jurisdictional claims and ensure robust protection of commercial interests in an increasingly fragmented legal environment.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["中国拟出台新规反制外国在SEP纠纷中的不当域外管辖行为", "此举旨在应对跨境知识产权诉讼中的管辖权冲突与法律对抗", "重点在于保护本土企业免受外国司法过度干预及不公平裁决影响"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["China plans to implement new regulations to counteract improper extraterritorial jurisdiction exercised by foreign authorities in SEP disputes.", "The initiative addresses jurisdictional conflicts and legal confrontations arising within the context of cross-border intellectual property litigation.", "The focus remains on protecting local enterprises from excessive foreign judicial intervention and potentially unfair legal rulings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注管辖权冲突，善用中外法律工具应对全球SEP许可谈判", "加强合规评估，制定多元化争议解决策略以规避跨境法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor jurisdictional conflicts and utilize combined legal tools to manage global SEP licensing negotiations effectively.", "Practice note: Enhance compliance assessments and develop diversified dispute resolution strategies to mitigate cross-border legal risks.", "What to monitor: Regulatory updates concerning extraterritorial application of laws and their impact on international SEP litigation strategies."]
core_points_en: China plans to implement new regulations to counteract improper extraterritorial jurisdiction exercised by foreign authorities in SEP disputes.
The initiative addresses jurisdictional conflicts and legal confrontations arising within the context of cross-border intellectual property litigation.
The focus remains on protecting local enterprises from excessive foreign judicial intervention and potentially unfair legal rulings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor jurisdictional conflicts and utilize combined legal tools to manage global SEP licensing negotiations effectively.
Practice note: Enhance compliance assessments and develop diversified dispute resolution strategies to mitigate cross-border legal risks.
What to monitor: Regulatory updates concerning extraterritorial application of laws and their impact on international SEP litigation strategies.

items.title: The UPC aligns with the EPO on added matter (UPC_CFI_808/2025)
items.title_zh: UPC 巴黎分院在新增事项问题上与 EPO 立场趋同
items.title_en: UPC Paris Aligns with EPO Strict Added Matter Standard in Guardant Health Ruling
items.summary: Court docket: LD Paris
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 巴黎地方法院在 Guardant Health 诉 Sophia Genetics 案中裁定，分案申请若将原申请作为“碎片库”组合特征，构成新增事项。法院强调发明必须能直接明确推导，且原告仅凭新闻稿不足以证明侵权。此判决显示 UPC 在新增事项审查上采纳了类似 EPO 的严格标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In Guardant Health v. Sophia Genetics, the UPC Local Division in Paris rejected provisional measures, aligning its added matter assessment with the European Patent Office's strict approach. The Court held that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application without clear indication constitutes impermissible added matter. Additionally, the ruling clarified procedural standards, deeming a three-month preparation period reasonable for complex technologies. Crucially, the Court emphasized that press releases alone are insufficient to meet the burden of proof for infringement under Rule 211.2 RoP, requiring deeper technical evidence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局分案时需避免拼凑原申请特征，确保权利要求可直接推导。诉讼中应准备详尽技术文档而非依赖公开信息，以应对 UPC 严格的举证和审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision signals that the UPC is unlikely to adopt a more lenient stance on added matter compared to the EPO, particularly regarding divisional patents derived from broad PCT disclosures. For rights holders, this reinforces the need for precise claim drafting that avoids relying on implicit combinations of features. In litigation, parties must ensure robust evidentiary foundations beyond public statements to satisfy the high threshold for proving infringement in preliminary proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定从原申请分散片段组合特征构成新增事项", "原告仅凭新闻稿无法满足侵权举证的高度确定性要求", "UPC 在新增事项审查上与 EPO 严格立场趋于一致"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC adopted the EPO's strict test, ruling that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.", "A three-month delay was deemed reasonable for preparing provisional measures applications involving complex technology and multiple patents.", "Press releases alone fail to demonstrate infringement with sufficient certainty; applicants must provide detailed technical documentation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["分案申请严禁将原说明书作为特征组合的素材库", "侵权诉讼需依托深层技术文档而非单一新闻发布"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should verify that divisional claims are directly and unambiguously derivable from original filings to withstand UPC scrutiny.", "Practice note: Litigants seeking provisional measures must secure detailed technical documentation rather than relying solely on press releases or public information.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions will clarify whether this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards persists across different Local Divisions."]
core_points_en: The UPC adopted the EPO's strict test, ruling that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.
A three-month delay was deemed reasonable for preparing provisional measures applications involving complex technology and multiple patents.
Press releases alone fail to demonstrate infringement with sufficient certainty; applicants must provide detailed technical documentation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should verify that divisional claims are directly and unambiguously derivable from original filings to withstand UPC scrutiny.
Practice note: Litigants seeking provisional measures must secure detailed technical documentation rather than relying solely on press releases or public information.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions will clarify whether this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards persists across different Local Divisions.

items.title: Quality dashboard: quarterly update
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局更新质量仪表盘：2026年一季度数据
items.title_en: EPO Quality Dashboard Update: Q1 2026 Search and Examination KPIs
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）更新其质量仪表盘，公布2026年第一季度审计数据。检索方面，93.5%的审计检索未发现新颖性或创造性问题；审查方面，89.5%的授权专利无影响有效性的缺陷，其中新增主题问题比例降至3.9%。该仪表盘自2024年3月启动，旨在通过定期发布关键绩效指标（KPI），提升专利授予过程的透明度，并支持年度质量行动计划。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has updated its Quality dashboard with audit figures for the first quarter of 2026. The data indicates sustained high quality in search operations, with 93.5% of audited searches showing no findings regarding novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter. In examination, a positive trend continues as 89.5% of audited grants had no validity-affecting findings. Notably, issues related to added subject-matter decreased from 4.6% to 3.9%, reflecting the impact of implemented quality measures across operational teams.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The continued improvement in EPO examination metrics, particularly the reduction in added subject-matter objections, signals a maturing quality framework under the annual Quality Action Plan. For rights holders and applicants, these transparent KPIs provide a benchmark for assessing procedural reliability. Monitoring these trends helps stakeholders align internal drafting and prosecution strategies with the Office's evolving quality expectations, potentially reducing procedural delays and enhancing grant predictability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年Q1检索审计显示93.5%无新颖性或创造性缺陷", "审查授权质量持续向好，新增主题问题比例降至3.9%", "质量仪表盘定期发布KPI以增强专利授予流程透明度"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Search quality remains high with 93.5% of audited searches free of novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter findings.", "Examination quality improves as 89.5% of audited grants show no validity defects, continuing a positive quarterly trend.", "Findings on added subject-matter dropped to 3.9%, demonstrating the effectiveness of recent EPO quality enhancement measures."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化前端检索与撰写质量，规避新增主题风险", "参考EPO KPI优化内部质检，提升授权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Transparent KPIs allow applicants to gauge the stability of EPO grants and adjust portfolio quality standards accordingly.", "Practice note: The decline in added subject-matter findings suggests that rigorous internal review of claim amendments is yielding better alignment with EPO practices.", "What to monitor: Future quarterly updates to track whether the downward trend in validity-related findings sustains through subsequent quarters."]
core_points_en: Search quality remains high with 93.5% of audited searches free of novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter findings.
Examination quality improves as 89.5% of audited grants show no validity defects, continuing a positive quarterly trend.
Findings on added subject-matter dropped to 3.9%, demonstrating the effectiveness of recent EPO quality enhancement measures.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Transparent KPIs allow applicants to gauge the stability of EPO grants and adjust portfolio quality standards accordingly.
Practice note: The decline in added subject-matter findings suggests that rigorous internal review of claim amendments is yielding better alignment with EPO practices.
What to monitor: Future quarterly updates to track whether the downward trend in validity-related findings sustains through subsequent quarters.

items.title: Copyright: Free Creative Choices That Reflect Personality
items.title_zh: 版权：体现个性的自由创造性选择
items.title_en: CJEU MIO & Konektra: Copyright for Utilitarian Objects Requires Personality-Reflecting Creative Choices
items.summary: Finally, the CJEU published its long-awaited judgment in the joint cases MIO & Konektra. A utilitarian object is protected by copyright if it expresses free and creative choices and reflects the author's personality.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在MIO与Konektra联合案中裁定，若实用物品表达自由创造性选择并反映作者个性，即受版权保护。权利人需证明选择非纯功能或平庸。侵权测试标准变更为创造性元素的可识别复制，而非整体印象匹配。荷兰法院已应用更严标准，强调外观设计注册的重要性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union has issued its long-awaited judgment in the joined cases MIO and Konektra, clarifying copyright protection standards for utilitarian objects. The Court ruled that such objects qualify for copyright only if they embody free and creative choices reflecting the author's personality. Decisions driven solely by technical or functional constraints, as well as banal or ordinary non-functional choices, do not meet this threshold. However, a combination of individually commonplace elements may still constitute an original work. The CJEU further established that the intent to create art or museum exhibition status is irrelevant. Crucially, the infringement test has shifted from assessing overall impression to determining whether recognizable creative elements meeting the work threshold have been reproduced. This analysis highlights the Secrid cardholder case, where Dutch courts denied copyright due to a lack of personality-reflected creativity, underscoring the strategic importance of timely EU design registration.
items.ai_insight_zh: 欧盟法院确立实用物品版权新标准，强调“个性反映”与“创造性选择”的证明责任。企业需注意侵权判定从整体印象转向元素识别，荷兰司法实践显示版权门槛提高，凸显及时注册欧盟外观设计以规避版权不确定性风险的实务价值。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants selling home goods or electronics in Europe face heightened copyright thresholds following the CJEU's MIO and Konektra rulings. Purely functional designs are unlikely to secure copyright protection, creating potential gaps in legal coverage. Rights holders should prioritize early EU design registration to ensure stable protection independent of subjective creativity assessments. In litigation, defendants can effectively challenge claims by demonstrating that alleged infringing features lack personality-reflected creative choices. Reliance on vague overall impression comparisons is no longer sufficient for establishing infringement. Practitioners must adapt strategies to focus on specific creative elements and consider design rights as a primary enforcement tool alongside copyright claims.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["实用物品若表达自由创造性选择且反映作者个性，即受版权保护，纯功能或平庸选择不受保", "侵权判定标准变更：不再依据整体印象匹配，而是看是否可识别地复制了符合“作品”门槛的创造…", "荷兰海牙上诉法院在Secrid案中驳回版权主张，因设计元素属现有技术或显而易见，未体现…"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Utilitarian objects require free, creative choices reflecting the author's personality to qualify for copyright protection under EU law.", "Purely functional or banal choices lack creativity, yet combinations of commonplace elements may still form an original work.", "Infringement assessment now focuses on recognizable reproduction of creative elements rather than matching the overall impression."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["权利人在主张实用物品版权时，必须具体解释为何相关选择具有创造性而非纯功能或平庸", "侵权诉讼焦点转移至特定创造性元素的可识别复制，而非产品整体视觉印象的相似性", "鉴于版权保护门槛提高及举证难度，应持续观察欧盟各国法院对“个性反映”标准的具体适用差异"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Secure EU design registration before market entry to mitigate risks from elevated copyright thresholds for utilitarian objects.", "Practice note: In infringement defenses, argue that challenged designs lack personality-reflected creative choices rather than relying on overall impression comparisons.", "What to monitor: National court applications of the new 'recognizable reproduction' standard for creative elements in design disputes."]
core_points_en: Utilitarian objects require free, creative choices reflecting the author's personality to qualify for copyright protection under EU law.
Purely functional or banal choices lack creativity, yet combinations of commonplace elements may still form an original work.
Infringement assessment now focuses on recognizable reproduction of creative elements rather than matching the overall impression.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Secure EU design registration before market entry to mitigate risks from elevated copyright thresholds for utilitarian objects.
Practice note: In infringement defenses, argue that challenged designs lack personality-reflected creative choices rather than relying on overall impression comparisons.
What to monitor: National court applications of the new 'recognizable reproduction' standard for creative elements in design disputes.

items.title: [Blog] Moldavie : 40ᵉ État Membre De L’OEB
items.title_zh: 摩尔多瓦将于2026年6月1日成为欧洲专利组织第40个成员国
items.title_en: Moldova Becomes 40th Member State of the European Patent Organisation
items.summary: La République de Moldavie rejoindra officiellement l’Organisation européenne des brevets (OEB) le 1ᵉʳ juin 2026, devenant ainsi le 40ᵉ État membre de la Convention sur le brevet européen (CBE).
items.ai_summary_zh: 摩尔多瓦共和国将于2026年6月1日正式加入欧洲专利组织（EPO），成为《欧洲专利公约》第40个成员国。该国已于2026年3月25日递交加入书，此前议会于同年2月批准。此举基于双方自1990年代起的合作及2015年生效的验证协议，旨在深化欧洲专利合作并配合其欧盟入盟进程。
items.ai_summary_en: The Republic of Moldova will officially join the European Patent Organisation on 1 June 2026, becoming the 40th member state of the European Patent Convention. The country deposited its instrument of accession on 25 March 2026, following parliamentary approval on 5 February 2026. This milestone concludes a process initiated by a formal application in 2019 and an invitation from the EPO Administrative Council in 2022. Prior cooperation included a validation agreement effective since 2015, which allowed recognition of European patents in Moldova. This accession strengthens European patent cooperation and aligns with Moldova’s broader European integration efforts, including ongoing EU accession negotiations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This accession simplifies patent protection in Moldova by replacing the previous validation route with direct designation under the EPC. Rights holders should note that European patents designating Moldova will take effect automatically from the entry-into-force date. The move reflects continued EPC expansion and harmonization with EU intellectual property standards, requiring updates to regional filing strategies and portfolio management protocols for markets covering Eastern Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["摩尔多瓦将于2026年6月1日正式成为《欧洲专利公约》第40个成员国", "摩尔多瓦于2026年3月25日递交加入书，议会于2026年2月5日批准加入", "此前双方已通过2015年生效的验证协议实现欧洲专利在摩尔多瓦的认可"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Moldova joins the European Patent Convention as the 40th member state effective 1 June 2026.", "The instrument of accession was deposited on 25 March 2026 after parliamentary approval in February.", "Previous validation agreements since 2015 established the framework for this deeper legal integration."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["摩尔多瓦加入后，欧洲专利指定该国将直接生效，降低布局成本与复杂性", "需关注EPO与摩尔多瓦知识产权局（AGEPI）在过渡期的具体协作流程", "结合摩尔多瓦欧盟入盟谈判背景，其知识产权法律框架可能进一步向欧盟标准靠拢"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: European patent applications designating Moldova will automatically extend protection there from 1 June 2026, removing prior validation steps.", "Practice note: Portfolio managers should update designation instructions for pending and new applications to include Moldova as a standard EPC contracting state.", "What to monitor: Transitional arrangements between the former validation regime and full EPC membership, including any specific guidance from AGEPI."]
core_points_en: Moldova joins the European Patent Convention as the 40th member state effective 1 June 2026.
The instrument of accession was deposited on 25 March 2026 after parliamentary approval in February.
Previous validation agreements since 2015 established the framework for this deeper legal integration.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: European patent applications designating Moldova will automatically extend protection there from 1 June 2026, removing prior validation steps.
Practice note: Portfolio managers should update designation instructions for pending and new applications to include Moldova as a standard EPC contracting state.
What to monitor: Transitional arrangements between the former validation regime and full EPC membership, including any specific guidance from AGEPI.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-590/23 Pelham (Concept of ‘pastiche’)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院就Pelham案“模仿”概念及采样作出判决
items.title_en: CJEU Clarifies Pastiche Exception Scope in Pelham Sampling Case
items.summary: The Court of Justice clarifies the scope of the exception for ‘pastiche’ in relation to sampling
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在C-590/23 Pelham案中发布判决，澄清了版权法中关于“模仿”（pastiche）例外情形在涉及音乐采样时的适用范围。该判决旨在明确欧盟版权指令下这一例外条款的法律界限。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union has issued a judgment in Case C-590/23 Pelham, clarifying the scope of the copyright exception for ‘pastiche’ specifically in relation to sampling. This ruling addresses the legal boundaries of this exception under EU copyright law. The decision provides necessary guidance on how the pastiche exception applies when musical samples are utilized, aiming to define the extent of permissible use without infringing on original rights holders' protections within the European Union framework.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment is significant for rights holders and users navigating EU copyright exceptions. It establishes judicial clarity on whether sampling qualifies as pastiche, impacting compliance assessments. Legal teams should review the full text to understand the specific criteria applied by the Court. Future national court applications will determine the practical impact on music licensing and infringement defenses across member states.

items.title: EUIPO Report on IP-Backed Finance Makes Policy Recommendations to Unlock Up To €580 Billion in Innovation Financing
items.title_zh: EUIPO 报告建议释放高达 5800 亿欧元创新融资
items.title_en: EUIPO Report Proposes Policy Changes to Unlock €580 Billion in IP-Backed SME Financing
items.summary: Today, the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) published a study exploring challenges faced by EU small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in obtaining financing by offering intellectual property (IP) as collateral. Set against the backdrop of the EU’s recently launched Savings and Investment Union (SIU) program, the EUIPO’s study identifies several structural barriers preventing SMEs from obtaining IP-backed financing and concludes with a series of policy recommendations desig
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布研究报告，探讨欧盟中小企业以知识产权为抵押获取融资时面临的挑战。该研究结合欧盟储蓄与投资联盟计划，识别了阻碍知识产权融资的结构性障碍，并提出一系列政策建议，旨在缩小中小企业信贷缺口，释放高达 5800 亿欧元的经济价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published a study examining the difficulties EU small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) face when seeking financing using intellectual property as collateral. Contextualized within the EU's newly launched Savings and Investment Union (SIU) program, the report identifies specific structural barriers that hinder access to credit for these businesses. It concludes with a series of policy recommendations aimed at bridging the SME credit gap. The EUIPO estimates that addressing these obstacles could unlock up to €580 billion in innovation financing, thereby generating significant economic value for the broader EU market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应关注欧盟 IP 融资新政，评估将商标专利转化为抵押品的可行性。建议提前规范 IP 资产管理，利用潜在政策红利拓宽融资渠道，降低资金成本。
items.ai_insight_en: This report signals a potential shift in how IP assets are valued and utilized within the EU financial ecosystem. For rights holders and corporate counsel, understanding these structural barriers is essential for strategic asset management. As policymakers consider reforms to facilitate IP-backed lending, companies should assess their current IP portfolios for readiness to serve as collateral. This development may influence future licensing strategies and capital raising approaches for innovation-driven firms operating in Europe.

items.title: [Blog] Palmarès 2025 Des Déposants De Brevets À L’INPI
items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 发布 2025 年专利申请排行榜
items.title_en: INPI Releases 2025 Patent Filing Rankings: Stellantis and Safran Lead National Applications
items.summary: L’Institut national de la propriété industrielle (INPI) a publié son palmarès 2025 des déposants de brevets, fondé sur les demandes déposées par la voie nationale entre le 1er janvier et le 31 décembre 2025.
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年国家途径专利申请排行榜。数据显示申请量同比增长 9%，Stellantis 与 Safran 连续三年位居前二，雷诺集团位列第三。汽车、航空及交通领域主导榜单，九家公共研究机构入选，外国申请人占比超一成，凸显法国作为专利保护地的吸引力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) published its 2025 ranking of patent applicants based on national filings from January to December 2025. The data reveals a 9% increase in applications compared to 2024, reinforcing the dominance of major industrial groups in France's inventive activity. Stellantis and Safran retained the top two positions for the third consecutive year, followed by Renault Group. Foreign entities accounted for over 10% of filers, while nine public research organizations, including CEA and CNRS, featured prominently. The automotive, aerospace, and transport sectors comprised nearly one-third of the ranked companies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The sustained growth in national filings and the prominence of specific industrial sectors highlight France's continued attractiveness for patent protection. For rights holders, the stability of top-ranking entities suggests entrenched competitive dynamics in automotive and aerospace technologies. The significant presence of public research institutions indicates robust opportunities for collaborative innovation. Monitoring these trends assists in benchmarking portfolio density against key competitors and understanding the strategic focus areas within the French market.

items.title: IP finance gap risks startup exodus, EUIPO warns
items.title_zh: 欧盟知识产权局警告：知识产权融资缺口恐致初创企业外流
items.title_en: EUIPO warns IP finance gap risks startup exodus from EU
items.summary: New report finds that just 13% of IP-owning firms have sought financing through their assets, with billions in potential funding left untapped, as structural barriers persist.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局新报告显示，仅13%拥有知识产权的企业曾尝试通过其资产寻求融资。由于结构性障碍持续存在，数十亿欧元的潜在资金未被利用。该报告警示这一融资缺口可能导致初创企业外流。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning that a significant gap in intellectual property financing poses a risk of driving startups away from the region. A new report indicates that only 13 percent of firms owning intellectual property assets have attempted to secure funding through these holdings. Consequently, billions in potential capital remain untapped due to persistent structural barriers. The agency highlights this underutilization as a critical economic issue, suggesting that the inability to leverage intangible assets for finance may compel emerging companies to seek more supportive jurisdictions. This data underscores the disconnect between asset ownership and accessible liquidity within the current European framework.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This report highlights a systemic inefficiency in leveraging intangible assets for capital within the EU. For rights holders, it signals that traditional valuation models may not align with lender requirements. Counsel should note the EUIPO's focus on structural barriers rather than individual case failures. Monitoring future policy responses is essential, as the agency may introduce guidelines or frameworks to facilitate asset-based lending. This development suggests a potential shift toward greater institutional support for IP monetization mechanisms across member states.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新报告显示仅13%拥有知识产权的企业曾通过资产寻求融资", "结构性障碍导致数十亿欧元的潜在融资机会未被利用", "欧盟知识产权局警告融资缺口存在导致初创企业外流的风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Only 13 percent of IP-owning firms have sought financing through their intellectual property assets.", "Billions in potential funding remain untapped due to persistent structural barriers in the market.", "EUIPO warns that this financing gap creates a risk of startup exodus from the EU."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注EUIPO后续是否发布针对知识产权融资障碍的详细分析报告", "监测欧盟范围内关于知识产权资产估值与抵押的法律或政策调整", "观察初创企业在欧盟境内因融资困难而产生的迁移趋势数据"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies holding significant IP portfolios should assess why they have not accessed asset-based financing despite available potential capital.", "Practice note: The low uptake rate suggests that legal teams must address structural valuation and security interest hurdles in transaction planning.", "What to monitor: Watch for subsequent EUIPO publications detailing specific structural barriers or proposing regulatory adjustments to improve IP finance access."]
core_points_en: Only 13 percent of IP-owning firms have sought financing through their intellectual property assets.
Billions in potential funding remain untapped due to persistent structural barriers in the market.
EUIPO warns that this financing gap creates a risk of startup exodus from the EU.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies holding significant IP portfolios should assess why they have not accessed asset-based financing despite available potential capital.
Practice note: The low uptake rate suggests that legal teams must address structural valuation and security interest hurdles in transaction planning.
What to monitor: Watch for subsequent EUIPO publications detailing specific structural barriers or proposing regulatory adjustments to improve IP finance access.

items.title: Determining Personalized Content To Be Inserted Into A Phishing Document Template: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 确定植入钓鱼文档模板的个性化内容：非技术性
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Phishing Content Selection Non-Technical Business Method
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for the automated creation of personalized phishing documents, intended for corporate security awareness training, that uses two separate databases...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1908/23 号案件中裁定，一种用于企业安全意识培训的自动化钓鱼文档生成方法缺乏技术性。该方案利用分层数据库和相关性值匹配来选择针对特定目标的认知内容。委员会认为，其核心在于选择具有心理欺骗效果的内容，属于 COMVIK 方法下的“商业方法”，单纯的数据库结构未贡献足够的创造性步骤。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1908/23, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.05 rejected a patent application for automated creation of personalized phishing documents used in corporate security training. The Board applied the COMVIK approach, determining that the hierarchical database structure and relevance-value matching process served to select cognitive content aimed at psychologically deceiving recipients. Consequently, these features were classified as non-technical business methods. The mere use of undefined database structures and parameter comparisons did not establish a technical contribution sufficient to support an inventive step under European patent law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及 AI 内容生成或网络安全培训专利时，需警惕“商业方法”排除风险。若发明核心仅是基于规则的内容匹配或心理策略，即便使用数据库，也难获授权。建议将权利要求聚焦于具体数据处理架构或底层技术改进，以体现真实技术贡献。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the strict separation between technical data processing and cognitive content selection in EPO practice. Applicants in cybersecurity and AI-driven content generation must ensure claims focus on underlying technical architectures or specific data handling improvements rather than the logic of content personalization itself. Merely automating a psychological strategy via standard IT tools is insufficient for patentability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["分层数据库与相关性匹配被视为选择认知内容的非技术手段", "旨在心理欺骗人类接收者的内容选择构成商业方法而非技术方案", "未定义的技术参数比较不足以确立满足创造性步骤的技术贡献"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Hierarchical databases and relevance matching for selecting phishing content are deemed non-technical business methods.", "Selecting psychologically effective content for human recipients lacks technical character under the COMVIK framework.", "Undefined database structures and parameter comparisons do not independently establish inventive step contributions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免将纯内容匹配逻辑包装为技术方案，需突出底层技术改进", "涉 AI 生成类专利申请应着重描述数据处理的特定技术架构"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders in cybersecurity training must distinguish technical infrastructure from cognitive content selection strategies.", "Practice note: Draft claims focusing on specific data processing architectures or technical improvements to avoid business method exclusions.", "What to monitor: Continued EPO application of COMVIK to AI-generated content and automated personalization methods in non-traditional sectors."]
core_points_en: Hierarchical databases and relevance matching for selecting phishing content are deemed non-technical business methods.
Selecting psychologically effective content for human recipients lacks technical character under the COMVIK framework.
Undefined database structures and parameter comparisons do not independently establish inventive step contributions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders in cybersecurity training must distinguish technical infrastructure from cognitive content selection strategies.
Practice note: Draft claims focusing on specific data processing architectures or technical improvements to avoid business method exclusions.
What to monitor: Continued EPO application of COMVIK to AI-generated content and automated personalization methods in non-traditional sectors.

items.title: Marque IMPRESS : le Tribunal de l'UE confirme son caractère laudatif et non distinctif
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院确认IMPRESS商标因缺乏显著性被拒注册
items.title_en: EU General Court Confirms Refusal of IMPRESS Trademark for Beauty Products Due to Lack of Distinctiveness
items.summary: Le Tribunal de l'Union européenne confirme le refus d'enregistrement de la marque verbale IMPRESS pour des produits de beauté, en raison de son caractère laudatif et dépourvu de distinctivité.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院于2026年3月11日作出判决，维持欧盟知识产权局对“IMPRESS”文字商标的驳回决定。该商标指定用于美容及美甲产品，法院认定其具有纯粹褒义性质，相关公众仅将其视为对产品质量或效果的宣传承诺，缺乏区分商品来源的显著特征，不符合欧盟商标条例注册条件。
items.ai_summary_en: The General Court of the European Union has upheld the EUIPO’s decision to refuse registration of the word mark IMPRESS for beauty and nail care products. The Court confirmed that the term is purely laudatory and devoid of distinctive character under Article 7(1)(b) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation. The applicant, KISS NAIL PRODUCTS INC., argued that the mark possessed sufficient distinctiveness despite its promotional nature. However, the Court ruled that the relevant public would perceive IMPRESS as a promise of impressive results rather than an indicator of commercial origin. This judgment reinforces the strict approach taken by the EUIPO regarding slogans and promotional messages, emphasizing that marks must serve to identify the source of goods. The decision highlights that even if a sign has weak distinctiveness in some Member States, it can still be refused if it lacks distinctiveness across a substantial part of the EU.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案重申了欧盟对于描述性及褒义商标的严格审查标准。企业在选择品牌时需避免使用直接暗示产品质量或效果的通用词汇，除非能证明其通过长期使用获得第二含义或具备足够的创意偏离常规宣传语，否则面临较高的驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling underscores the high threshold for registering descriptive or laudatory terms as EU trademarks. Applicants should avoid relying solely on generic praise words, as these are frequently rejected for failing to distinguish goods. To enhance registrability, brands should consider combining such terms with distinctive graphical elements or non-descriptive components. This strategy helps create a unique overall impression that meets the distinctiveness requirements. Monitoring EUIPO and CJEU trends on slogan registrations remains critical for developing robust filing strategies and avoiding costly refusals based on absolute grounds.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟普通法院维持驳回决定，认定IMPRESS用于美容产品时缺乏显著性", "法院指出该词被公众视为褒义宣传语，仅承诺强力持久的有利效果", "判决重申广告语需具备原创性或引发认知努力才具显著性，否则不予注册"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court found IMPRESS purely laudatory for beauty products, lacking the essential function of identifying commercial origin.", "Advertising slogans require originality or cognitive effort to achieve distinctiveness; mere praise leads to refusal.", "Refusal is valid if the mark lacks distinctiveness in a significant part of the EU, regardless of status in other regions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟法院对褒义形容词在美容类商品上的显著性认定持严格立场", "常规宣传口号若无独特创意或认知门槛，难以获准商标注册", "需关注法院对“最低限度解释努力”作为显著性判断门槛的适用逻辑"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid using standalone generic praise words as core trademark elements in EU applications to prevent rejection.", "Practice note: Combine descriptive terms with distinctive graphics or non-descriptive elements to enhance overall distinctiveness.", "What to monitor: Evolving case law from the EUIPO and CJEU regarding the registrability of advertising slogans and promotional messages."]
core_points_en: The Court found IMPRESS purely laudatory for beauty products, lacking the essential function of identifying commercial origin.
Advertising slogans require originality or cognitive effort to achieve distinctiveness; mere praise leads to refusal.
Refusal is valid if the mark lacks distinctiveness in a significant part of the EU, regardless of status in other regions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid using standalone generic praise words as core trademark elements in EU applications to prevent rejection.
Practice note: Combine descriptive terms with distinctive graphics or non-descriptive elements to enhance overall distinctiveness.
What to monitor: Evolving case law from the EUIPO and CJEU regarding the registrability of advertising slogans and promotional messages.

items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布新报告指出，知识产权有望为欧洲创新者释放数十亿欧元的融资机会。该资讯仅包含标题及摘要信息，未提供报告具体数据、方法论或详细结论，仅确认了EUIPO发布了此项关于知识产权融资潜力的研究成果。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published a new report indicating that intellectual property assets could unlock billions in financing for European innovators. The available source material consists primarily of the headline and summary statement, confirming the release of findings on the potential for IP to facilitate access to capital. No specific data points, methodological details, or sector-specific breakdowns are provided in the current excerpt. The report highlights the macroeconomic potential of IP as a financial instrument for innovation support within the European market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Given the limited available text, this item serves as an announcement of EUIPO's research into IP-backed financing. It signals institutional focus on leveraging intangible assets for economic growth. Rights holders should await the full publication to understand the underlying data and any proposed frameworks for valuation or lending. This development may influence future policy discussions on IP monetization and collateralization in Europe.

items.title: Jugend forscht – und denkt Patentschutz mit
items.title_zh: 德国专利局为“青年研究”竞赛提供专利辅导
items.title_en: DPMA Launches Patent Coaching Pilot for Young Inventors at Bavarian Youth Research Competition
items.summary: Jugend forscht – und denkt Patentschutz mit - Deutsches Patent- und Markenamt bietet mit Unterstützung der Patentanwaltschaft bei Landeswettbewerb Bayern von „Jugend forscht“ erstmals „Patentcoaching“ an, um Erfindungen wirtschaftlich nutzbar zu machen – Pilotprojekt könnte auf ganz Deutschland ausgeweitet werden – DPMA-Vizepräsident Bernd Maile: Jugendliche für geistiges Eigentum sensibilisieren und illegales Nachahmen von Erfindungen verhindern - DPMA-Impuls stößt auf großes Engagement in der
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）联合专利律师协会，在“青年研究”巴伐利亚州级竞赛中首次推出“专利辅导”试点项目。旨在帮助年轻发明人理解创造性活动及专利申请流程，促进发明成果的经济转化并防止非法模仿。约170名专利律师自愿提供免费咨询，若试点成功，该模式可能扩展至全德国。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA), in cooperation with the Patent Attorneys Chamber, has introduced a pilot patent coaching program during the Bavarian state competition of 'Jugend forscht' (Youth Research). This initiative provides young inventors with two hours of free professional consultation to understand patentability criteria and commercialization strategies. The goal is to sensitize students to intellectual property rights early on, preventing illegal imitation of their innovations. DPMA Vice President Bernd Maile emphasized that industrial property rights are essential for transforming research into marketable products. Following this successful pilot, the DPMA intends to expand the coaching service nationwide, aiming to strengthen the overall innovation ecosystem by ensuring young creators can effectively protect and exploit their inventions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此举措反映了德国官方强化知识产权早期教育的政策导向，试图解决研发成果商业化转化率低的问题。对于关注德国创新生态的企业而言，这表明未来潜在的技术人才将具备更强的IP意识。需观察该试点项目在巴伐利亚州的实施效果，以及后续是否真的如计划般推广至全国其他州，形成标准化的青年IP教育机制。
items.ai_insight_en: This initiative highlights a strategic shift in Europe toward strengthening intellectual property awareness at the earliest stages of innovation. By integrating IP education into youth competitions, European authorities aim to cultivate a generation of inventors capable of robust patent protection and commercial exploitation. For international companies operating in Europe, this suggests a future landscape with higher-quality domestic patent portfolios originating from early-stage innovators. Stakeholders should anticipate increased competition from well-protected local technologies and consider monitoring emerging talent pools as potential sources of both competitive threats and licensing opportunities.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["DPMA在巴伐利亚州“青年研究”竞赛中首次试点提供两小时一对一专利保护咨询", "约170名来自德国及瑞士的专利律师响应号召，自愿为参赛学生提供免费辅导", "DPMA副总裁强调，通过早期教育提升青少年对知识产权的认知，有助于防止发明被非法模仿"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["德国官方正通过教育前端介入，提升年轻一代对专利等工业产权保护的认知与重视程度", "专利律师协会的高参与度显示了行业对培养未来创新者IP意识的社会责任共识", "需持续跟踪该试点项目的评估结果，以判断其是否会成为德国全国性的标准教育模块"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced early-stage IP literacy among European youth may lead to stronger, more defensible local patent portfolios in the medium term.", "Practice note: Monitor regional innovation hubs and youth competitions for emerging technologies that may evolve into significant prior art or competitive barriers.", "What to monitor: Potential national expansion of DPMA coaching programs and increased engagement of young inventors in the European patent system."]
core_points_en: The DPMA partnered with patent attorneys to offer free, specialized IP coaching for the first time at a regional youth science competition.
The program educates student inventors on defining inventive steps and securing patents to transform ideas into commercially viable assets.
Approximately 170 patent attorneys volunteered for the initiative, which may be scaled nationally if the pilot proves effective.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced early-stage IP literacy among European youth may lead to stronger, more defensible local patent portfolios in the medium term.
Practice note: Monitor regional innovation hubs and youth competitions for emerging technologies that may evolve into significant prior art or competitive barriers.
What to monitor: Potential national expansion of DPMA coaching programs and increased engagement of young inventors in the European patent system.

items.title: JUB - Effet unitaire refusé sans couverture complète des États membres
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：未覆盖所有成员国拒授单一效力
items.title_en: UPC Appeal Court Rules Unitary Effect Denied Without Full Member State Coverage
items.summary: La Cour d’appel de la JUB confirme qu’un brevet européen ne peut bénéficier de l’effet unitaire que s’il couvre tous les états membres participants...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭确认，欧洲专利仅在覆盖所有参与国且权利要求一致时方可获单一效力。因涉案专利申请日早于马耳他加入欧专局日期，导致领土覆盖不全，法院驳回授予单一效力的请求，强调对相关法律条款的严格解释，排除灵活性适用。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal confirmed that a European patent qualifies for unitary effect only if it provides identical claims across all participating member states. In this case, the patent application date preceded Malta’s accession to the European Patent Office, resulting in a lack of coverage for that state. The court rejected arguments for flexible application of regulations due to circumstances beyond the proprietor's control. It strictly interpreted the relevant EU regulation, upholding the EPO’s decision to refuse unitary effect. This ruling establishes that historical gaps in territorial coverage prevent unitary protection, regardless of intent or external factors affecting designation at the time of filing.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了单一效力授予的严格领土完整性标准。实务中需核查基础欧洲专利在生效日前是否已指定所有现行参与国，特别是针对2007年前申请的旧专利组合，其获取单一效力的可能性受到实质性限制，需关注后续类似案件的司法一致性。
items.ai_insight_en: Proprietors must verify the alignment between their patent application dates and the accession timelines of EPC contracting states to ensure eligibility for unitary effect. Early applications may face inherent territorial gaps that permanently disqualify them from unitary status. Stakeholders should assess whether alternative national validation strategies or divisional filings are necessary to secure comprehensive protection in missing jurisdictions. Monitoring legislative updates regarding retroactive designations remains critical for optimizing portfolio management and avoiding unexpected loss of unitary rights.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉庭确认单一效力要求专利覆盖所有参与成员国且权利要求完全一致", "涉案专利因申请日早于马耳他加入欧专局时间，无法 retroactively 覆盖该国", "法院拒绝因非申请人过错而豁免领土完整性要求，维持EPO拒授决定"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unitary effect requires identical claim sets covering all participating member states without exception.", "Patents failing to cover specific members due to historical accession dates are excluded from unitary protection.", "Courts will strictly interpret regulations, refusing flexibility for territorial exclusions caused by past events."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["单一效力授予以领土全覆盖为硬性前提，无例外空间", "年3月1日前申请的欧洲专利因马耳他因素面临确权障碍", "需持续观察UPC对历史遗留专利领土缺陷问题的司法处理口径"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify application dates against member state accession timelines to confirm unitary eligibility.", "Practice note: Consider divisional applications or national validations to address historical territorial gaps.", "What to monitor: Legal interpretations regarding retroactive designations and strict regulatory compliance requirements."]
core_points_en: Unitary effect requires identical claim sets covering all participating member states without exception.
Patents failing to cover specific members due to historical accession dates are excluded from unitary protection.
Courts will strictly interpret regulations, refusing flexibility for territorial exclusions caused by past events.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify application dates against member state accession timelines to confirm unitary eligibility.
Practice note: Consider divisional applications or national validations to address historical territorial gaps.
What to monitor: Legal interpretations regarding retroactive designations and strict regulatory compliance requirements.

items.title: Bilan 2025 de la Douane : ce que les titulaires de droits de propriété intellectuelle doivent retenir
items.title_zh: 法国海关2025年报：知识产权权利人需知要点
items.title_en: French Customs 2025 Report: Key Takeaways for Intellectual Property Rights Holders
items.summary: Le bilan 2025 de la Douane française confirme que la contrefaçon est un phénomène massif, transversal et en constante adaptation. Avec plus de 20 millions d'articles contrefaisants retirés du marché en 2025...
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国海关2025年移除超2000万件假冒商品，三年累计超6000万件。1490名权利人在法申请海关干预，数量居欧盟第二，仅次于德国。电商与快递小包成为主要侵权渠道，89%小包源自中国，Shein、Temu和AliExpress占近四分之三。玩具与体育用品占查获量65%，Labubu仿品“Lafufu”被大量查扣。
items.ai_summary_en: The French Customs 2025 report confirms that counterfeiting remains a massive, evolving phenomenon. Over 20 million infringing articles were removed from the market in 2025, bringing the three-year total to more than 60 million seizures. These figures reflect both intense enforcement controls and the sheer volume of illicit flows. France ranks second in the EU for customs intervention applications, highlighting its strategic role as a transit hub. The landscape has shifted towards fragmented logistics, with e-commerce and express freight becoming primary channels. Small packages under 150 euros accounted for the majority of interceptions, with nearly 90 percent originating from China. Major platforms like Shein, Temu, and AliExpress dominate these shipments. Counterfeit goods increasingly pose health and safety risks, particularly in toys and sports equipment, necessitating vigilant monitoring by rights holders.
items.ai_insight_zh: 执法重心已向电商小包转移，传统集装箱查验模式面临挑战。权利人需关注法国作为欧盟第二大海关干预地的执法强度，以及针对热门潮流玩具等高频侵权品类的专项监控趋势。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders should prioritize compliance within cross-border e-commerce small package channels to avoid becoming targets of intensified customs scrutiny. Proactive registration of intellectual property with French customs authorities is essential to facilitate early interception of infringing goods. Companies must also enforce strict supply chain quality controls to mitigate liability for safety-related issues. By leveraging customs recording mechanisms, businesses can actively protect their rights and reduce the probability of cargo detention. This approach ensures better alignment with evolving enforcement trends and minimizes operational disruptions caused by regulatory actions against suspected counterfeit shipments.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法国海关干预申请量居欧盟第二（1490件），仅次于德国，反映其战略地位", "侵权物流碎片化，89%低价小包源自中国，三大电商平台占据主要份额", "玩具与体育用品成重灾区，占2025年查获量65%，热门IP仿冒风险高"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["France ranks second in the EU for customs intervention applications, underscoring its strategic importance as a key transit hub for international trade.", "E-commerce and small package shipments are now the primary channels for counterfeit goods, with nearly ninety percent of intercepted parcels originating from China.", "Popular items like Labubu dolls face widespread imitation, while seized products increasingly present significant health and safety risks to consumers."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法国在欧盟海关执法中地位显著，权利人应重视其在欧陆的边境保护布局", "跨境电商小包成为侵权主要载体，平台责任与源头追溯成为执法新难点", "潮流玩具等快消品侵权高发，需监测特定IP衍生品的市场仿冒动态"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Mitigate risks in high-volume e-commerce small package channels through rigorous export compliance reviews.", "Practice note: Utilize customs IP recording mechanisms to proactively enforce rights and lower the likelihood of goods detention.", "What to monitor: Track the rise of health and safety risks associated with counterfeit toys and sports equipment in express freight."]
core_points_en: France ranks second in the EU for customs intervention applications, underscoring its strategic importance as a key transit hub for international trade.
E-commerce and small package shipments are now the primary channels for counterfeit goods, with nearly ninety percent of intercepted parcels originating from China.
Popular items like Labubu dolls face widespread imitation, while seized products increasingly present significant health and safety risks to consumers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Mitigate risks in high-volume e-commerce small package channels through rigorous export compliance reviews.
Practice note: Utilize customs IP recording mechanisms to proactively enforce rights and lower the likelihood of goods detention.
What to monitor: Track the rise of health and safety risks associated with counterfeit toys and sports equipment in express freight.

items.title: Action en nullité des droits de propriété industrielle : le caractère rétroactif de l’imprescriptibilité affirmé
items.title_zh: 工业产权无效诉讼：确认不受时效限制的溯及力
items.title_en: French Supreme Court Affirms Retroactive Effect of Timeless Nullity Actions for Industrial Property Rights
items.summary: (Cour de cassation, civile, Chambre commerciale, 28 janvier 2026, 24-14.760, Publié au bulletin) Par Maître Charlotte GAUVIN, Avocate au barreau de Paris * La loi n° 2019-486 du 22 mai 2019 relative à la croissance et la transformation des entreprises (ci-après la « loi Pacte ») a instauré le principe d’imprescriptibilité des actions en nullité […] L’article Action en nullité des droits de propriété industrielle : le caractère rétroactif de l’imprescriptibilité affirmé est apparu en premier sur
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国最高法院商事庭于2026年1月28日作出判决（案号24-14.760）。依据2019年《帕克特法》，工业产权无效诉讼原则上不受诉讼时效限制。本案明确肯定了该“不受时效限制”原则具有溯及既往的法律效力，适用于法律生效前的相关权利状态。
items.ai_summary_en: The Commercial Chamber of the French Cour de cassation issued a landmark ruling on January 28, 2026, confirming that the principle of imprescriptibility for industrial property nullity actions, established by the 2019 PACTE Law, applies retroactively. This decision clarifies that the statutory limitation periods under previous legislation no longer bar challenges to patents and trademarks, even if those deadlines expired before the new law entered into force. Consequently, rights holders and interested parties may initiate nullity proceedings against existing industrial property titles without temporal restrictions. This interpretation fundamentally alters the legal landscape by removing time-based barriers to invalidity claims, thereby exposing previously secured rights to renewed scrutiny and potential cancellation regardless of their age or prior procedural history.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注该溯及力原则在既有案件中的具体适用边界。由于正文信息有限，暂无法评估对存量专利或商标无效请求的具体程序影响，建议持续追踪后续下级法院的适用判例。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling significantly impacts the stability of intellectual property portfolios in France. Rights holders must recognize that previously secure assets are now vulnerable to indefinite challenges. It is critical to conduct immediate audits of patent and trademark holdings to assess potential weaknesses. Companies should proactively evaluate the strength of their core rights and develop robust defense strategies against potential invalidity claims. Maintaining comprehensive documentation and monitoring competitor activities will be essential to mitigate litigation risks and ensure long-term portfolio security in this new regulatory environment.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法国最高法院确认工业产权无效诉讼不受诉讼时效限制", "法院裁定2019年《帕克特法》确立的不受时效限制原则具有溯及力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The French Supreme Court ruled that the imprescriptibility of nullity actions under the 2019 PACTE Law applies retroactively to all cases.", "Nullity challenges can now be filed against industrial property rights even if the statute of limitations had already expired under prior laws.", "Industrial property rights face ongoing validity risks as there are no longer any time limits for initiating nullity proceedings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注溯及力原则对历史权利稳定性的潜在冲击", "监测下级法院在具体无效案件中的程序适用标准", "观察立法过渡期案件的法律适用一致性"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Existing French IP assets face heightened risk of indefinite nullity challenges, requiring urgent stability assessments.", "Practice note: Conduct immediate compliance audits of patent and trademark portfolios to identify vulnerabilities and prepare defense mechanisms.", "What to monitor: Ongoing judicial interpretations regarding retroactive application and emerging trends in post-grant invalidity proceedings."]
core_points_en: The French Supreme Court ruled that the imprescriptibility of nullity actions under the 2019 PACTE Law applies retroactively to all cases.
Nullity challenges can now be filed against industrial property rights even if the statute of limitations had already expired under prior laws.
Industrial property rights face ongoing validity risks as there are no longer any time limits for initiating nullity proceedings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Existing French IP assets face heightened risk of indefinite nullity challenges, requiring urgent stability assessments.
Practice note: Conduct immediate compliance audits of patent and trademark portfolios to identify vulnerabilities and prepare defense mechanisms.
What to monitor: Ongoing judicial interpretations regarding retroactive application and emerging trends in post-grant invalidity proceedings.

items.title: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation
items.title_zh: 专利与设计：保护创新的两项互补资产
items.title_en: INPI Highlights Patents and Designs as Complementary Assets for Innovation Protection
items.summary: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation llegrand@inpi.fr 09 avril 2026 Imaginez qu'un concurrent commercialise une télécommande qui ressemble trait pour trait à la vôtre : même mécanisme interne, même design extérieur. C'est précisément ce qu'a vécu la société Somfy. En 2006, le Tribunal de grande instance de Paris a sanctionné un concurrent qui copiait à la fois les mécanismes internes et l'apparence extérieure des télécommandes Somfy. Le tribunal a condamn
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）发文指出，专利与设计是保护产品的互补工具。文章引用 Somfy 遥控器及 Bivouac 刀具案，展示法院如何分别认定技术功能与外观设计的侵权并判处独立赔偿。核心结论强调，单一专利无法覆盖产品全貌，组合布局可构建更稳固的法律防线，即使专利无效，设计权仍可独立存续提供保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) emphasizes the strategic value of combining patent and design rights to protect innovations comprehensively. Citing the 2006 Somfy case, the article illustrates how Paris courts awarded distinct damages for infringing both internal mechanisms (patents) and external appearance (designs). Similarly, the 'Bivouac' knife case confirmed that aesthetic choices are legally independent from technical functions. This dual approach ensures robust legal coverage, allowing rights holders to claim separate compensation for each type of infringement and maintain protection even if one title is challenged.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口高附加值产品时，切勿仅依赖专利申请。应同步评估产品外观价值，主动注册欧盟或成员国外观设计，构建“技术 + 外观”双重壁垒，以应对竞争对手的模仿诉讼及潜在的专利无效挑战，最大化维权收益。
items.ai_insight_en: This guidance underscores the importance of integrated IP strategies for companies operating in France. Relying solely on patents leaves the visual identity of a product vulnerable to imitation. By securing both technical and aesthetic rights, rights holders can maximize enforcement leverage and ensure continuous protection against comprehensive copying by competitors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利保护技术方案，设计保护外观美学，两者客体不同互不替代", "司法实践中，针对同一产品的技术与外观抄袭可分别定罪并累计赔偿", "构建专利与设计组合布局，能有效规避单一权利被无效后的保护真空风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patents protect technical solutions while designs safeguard aesthetic appearance, covering distinct aspects of a product.", "French courts award separate damages for patent and design infringements, recognizing them as independent legal violations.", "Combining patents and designs creates a resilient portfolio, ensuring protection remains valid even if one right is invalidated."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["推行“专利 + 设计”双轨布局，避免因单一权利瑕疵导致全面失守", "利用法国判例经验，在维权诉讼中主张技术与外观的双重独立赔偿"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies should evaluate both functional and aesthetic features during IP planning to avoid protection gaps.", "Practice note: In litigation, pleadings should clearly distinguish between technical and design infringements to secure cumulative damages.", "What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends regarding the independence of design rights when associated patents face nullity actions."]
core_points_en: Patents protect technical solutions while designs safeguard aesthetic appearance, covering distinct aspects of a product.
French courts award separate damages for patent and design infringements, recognizing them as independent legal violations.
Combining patents and designs creates a resilient portfolio, ensuring protection remains valid even if one right is invalidated.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies should evaluate both functional and aesthetic features during IP planning to avoid protection gaps.
Practice note: In litigation, pleadings should clearly distinguish between technical and design infringements to secure cumulative damages.
What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends regarding the independence of design rights when associated patents face nullity actions.

items.title: Dyson wins another PI in hair-styler fight against Dreame
items.title_zh: 戴森在美发器纠纷中再获针对追觅的初步禁令
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Grants Dyson New Preliminary Injunction Against Dreame Hair Styler Models
items.summary: Once again, the Hamburg local division under presiding judge Sabine Klepsch has prohibited Chinese manufacturer Dreame from distributing certain hair styling devices in the UPC territory and Spain by means of a preliminary injunction. A PI issued in August last year covered older versions of the models AirStyle and Dreame Pocket. The Luxembourg Court of […] The post Dyson wins another PI in hair-styler fight against Dreame appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）汉堡地方法院在Sabine Klepsch法官主持下，再次签发初步禁令，禁止中国制造商追觅在UPC辖区及西班牙分销特定美发造型设备。此前去年八月发布的禁令已涵盖旧款型号。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Hamburg Local Division, presided over by Judge Sabine Klepsch, has issued a new preliminary injunction prohibiting Dreame from distributing specific hair styling devices. This order applies across the UPC territory and extends to Spain. It follows a previous injunction granted last August, which restricted older versions of the AirStyle and Dreame Pocket models. The latest ruling indicates continued judicial scrutiny of Dreame’s product iterations in this ongoing dispute with Dyson. Details regarding the specific models covered by this new prohibition were not fully elaborated in the available summary.

items.ai_insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC Hamburg Local Division’s willingness to grant cross-border preliminary relief in consumer electronics disputes. For rights holders, it demonstrates that successive injunctions may be sought as competitors update product lines. The explicit inclusion of Spain highlights the court’s approach to territorial scope. Market participants should note the procedural continuity in enforcing IP rights against iterative design changes. Monitoring subsequent appeals or design-around attempts by the defendant will be essential to assess the long-term commercial impact of these interim measures.

items.title: Trust is not enough: German Supreme Court tightens liability for Google Ads
items.title_zh: 信任不足：德最高法院收紧Google Ads责任
items.title_en: German Supreme Court Rules Retailers Liable for Unlawful Google Ads on Third-Party Platforms
items.summary: In a landmark ruling in Google-Ads (I ZR 28/25), the German Supreme Court dealt with the question whether a retailer is liable for unlawful advertisements placed by Google on third-party platforms.   Background The claimant is a registered qualified trade association whose members include numerous retailers of household electrical appliances. The defendant is a retailer for such appliances. In
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国最高法院在Google-Ads案（I ZR 28/25）中作出里程碑式裁决，审理零售商是否需对Google在第三方平台投放的违法广告承担责任。原告为家电零售商行业协会，被告为家电零售商。法院认定仅凭信任不足以免责，收紧了相关 liability 标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In a landmark decision (I ZR 28/25), the German Federal Court of Justice addressed whether retailers bear liability for unlawful advertisements displayed by Google on third-party platforms. The case involved a qualified trade association suing an electrical appliance retailer. The Court rejected the defense that mere trust in Google’s automated systems suffices to exempt advertisers from liability. Instead, it established stricter scrutiny obligations for advertisers regarding content placed on external platforms. This ruling significantly impacts digital marketing compliance, reinforcing the responsibility of brands and retailers to ensure their advertising campaigns do not infringe intellectual property rights or other legal standards, even when managed through automated third-party tools.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确立了更严格的广告审查义务，零售商不能仅依赖平台自动化投放而免责。需关注法院对“合理审查”边界的具体界定，以及该判例对电商品牌方使用关键词广告合规流程的影响。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants utilizing automated advertising services must reassess their compliance frameworks. Reliance on platform algorithms is no longer sufficient to mitigate legal risks associated with third-party ad placements. Companies should implement proactive monitoring mechanisms, including rigorous keyword screening and regular compliance audits. Establishing negative keyword lists can help prevent associations with infringing content. Regular auditing of ad displays on third-party platforms is essential to identify and rectify potential violations promptly, thereby reducing exposure to joint liability claims under German law.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国最高法院审理零售商对Google第三方平台违法广告的连带责任问题", "案件编号为I ZR 28/25，原告为qualified trade associat…", "标题显示法院立场为“信任不足”，意味着对广告主的责任认定标准趋严"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Retailers cannot rely solely on trust in Google to avoid liability for unlawful advertisements placed on third-party platforms.", "The Supreme Court established higher scrutiny standards for advertisers concerning content displayed on external digital platforms.", "This judgment significantly increases intellectual property compliance costs for e-commerce operators and retail enterprises."]

items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Advertisers must actively monitor automated ad placements to avoid joint liability for third-party infringements.", "Practice note: Implement negative keyword lists and conduct regular audits of third-party platform ad displays.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial standards regarding advertiser due diligence and scrutiny obligations in automated marketing."]

items.title: HPE joins Sisvel’s Wi-Fi multimode pool as sixth licensee
items.title_zh: HPE加入Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池成第六被许可人
items.title_en: HPE Joins Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode Pool as Sixth Licensee, Validating Wi-Fi 7 Strategy
items.summary: Securing buy-in from the second-biggest enterprise WLAN vendor is a significant endorsement of the Wi-Fi 7-era pool
items.ai_summary_zh: IAM Media报道，第二大企业WLAN供应商Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) 已加入Sisvel的Wi-Fi多模专利池，成为第六家被许可人。此举被视为对Sisvel在Wi-Fi 7时代专利池模式的重大背书。随着Wi-Fi技术迭代，标准必要专利（SEP）许可格局持续演变，主要厂商通过加入专利池以合规方式获取授权，降低侵权风险并稳定供应链关系。
items.ai_summary_en: IAM Media reports that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), recognized as the second-largest enterprise WLAN vendor globally, has joined Sisvel’s Wi-Fi multimode patent pool. This move establishes HPE as the sixth official licensee within the portfolio. The participation of such a prominent market player serves as a significant endorsement of Sisvel’s licensing framework for the emerging Wi-Fi 7 era. As Wi-Fi technology continues to iterate, the landscape for standard-essential patent (SEP) licensing is evolving rapidly. Major industry participants are increasingly turning to patent pools to secure necessary authorizations through compliant channels. This strategic shift aims to mitigate infringement risks effectively while stabilizing supply chain relationships across the global electronics sector.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国Wi-Fi设备出口企业应密切关注Sisvel等主流专利池的动态。HPE的加入表明头部厂商倾向于通过打包许可解决SEP问题。建议中国企业提前评估自身产品涉及的SEP风险，主动接触权利人以谈判合理费率，避免被动诉讼导致的市场准入障碍或高额赔偿。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely track developments within major SEP pools like Sisvel, as leading vendors increasingly favor bundled licensing solutions to manage complex SEP obligations. Companies exporting Wi-Fi-enabled devices to Europe must proactively assess their exposure to relevant standard-essential patents. Engaging in early negotiations with rights holders can help secure reasonable royalty rates and prevent costly litigation or market access barriers. Proactive compliance strategies are essential for maintaining stable operations and avoiding high damages claims in competitive jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["HPE作为第二大企业WLAN供应商加入Sisvel专利池", "该许可行为显著背书了Sisvel在Wi-Fi 7时代的专利池模式", "Sisvel专利池目前已有六家正式被许可人加入"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注Sisvel专利池动态，预判行业许可趋势", "主动谈判SEP许可，规避出口欧洲的侵权风险"]

items.title: [Blog] Brevets, Marques Et Dessins & Modèles : Évolution Contrastée En 2025
items.title_zh: 2025年国际工业产权申请呈现差异化演变
items.title_en: WIPO 2025 Data: Divergent Trends in Global Patent, Trademark, and Design Filings
items.summary: L’Organisation mondiale de la propriété intellectuelle (OMPI) a publié, le 5 mars 2026, ses estimations relatives aux demandes internationales de titres de propriété industrielle pour l’année 2025.
items.ai_summary_zh: WIPO于2026年3月5日发布2025年国际工业产权申请估算数据。PCT专利申请量微增0.7%，主要由数字通信和半导体驱动；马德里商标申请量下降1.5%；海牙外观设计申请量增长9.4%。中国保持PCT和海牙体系申请首位，美国在商标领域领先。德国、法国在欧洲申请人中表现突出，但美德日整体略有回落。
items.ai_summary_en: The World Intellectual Property Organization released its 2025 estimates for international industrial property applications on March 5, 2026. The data reveals contrasting trends across different IP rights, driven by the growing influence of digital technologies. PCT patent applications rose by 0.7% to 275,900, marking a second consecutive year of growth, primarily fueled by digital communications and semiconductor sectors amid sustained AI investments. Conversely, Madrid System trademark filings declined by 1.5%, with the United States leading in volume. L’Oréal remained the top applicant for the fifth year. The Hague System for industrial designs saw significant growth, increasing by 9.4%, with China maintaining the lead. Additionally, WIPO reported a notable rise in arbitration and mediation activities, highlighting evolving dispute resolution dynamics alongside these filing trends.
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示全球IP申请呈现结构性分化：技术驱动型专利与外观设计持续增长，而商标申请略显疲软。欧洲企业需关注数字技术与AI领域的专利布局趋势，同时留意主要贸易伙伴在商标与外观上的策略调整，以优化全球组合管理。
items.ai_insight_en: The divergent trends in global IP filings underscore the strategic importance of aligning portfolio management with sector-specific growth patterns. Companies should leverage the expanding Hague System to accelerate high-value design protection in key markets. Simultaneously, intensifying competition in digital patents requires robust risk monitoring mechanisms against potential barriers in Europe and the US. With trademark volumes stabilizing, optimizing global brand strategies becomes critical. Furthermore, the increased activity in WIPO’s arbitration center suggests that alternative dispute resolution is becoming a vital tool for managing cross-border IP conflicts efficiently.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年PCT国际专利申请27.59万件，同比增长0.7%，数字通信与半导体领域增长显著", "马德里体系国际商标申请同比下降1.5%，美国居首，欧莱雅连续五年位列最大申请人", "海牙体系外观设计申请同比增长9.4%，中国位居申请来源国第一，德国紧随其后"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["PCT patent applications grew for the second consecutive year, driven by strong performance in digital technology and semiconductor sectors.", "Madrid trademark applications slightly decreased, with the United States leading filings while L’Oréal maintained its top position globally.", "Hague design system registrations surged by 9.4%, with China remaining the top filer, followed closely by Germany and the United States."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["PCT申请向数字通信和半导体集中，反映AI投资对专利布局的结构性影响", "商标申请量下滑可能预示品牌保护策略趋于保守或市场整合效应显现", "需持续监测中国在海牙体系中的外观设计申请增速及其对欧洲市场的潜在冲击"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage the Hague System's growth to expedite overseas industrial design protection for high-value products.", "Practice note: Monitor digital patent competition in Europe and the US to strengthen core R&D and establish early warning systems.", "What to monitor: Optimize global brand strategies amidst trademark volume fluctuations and utilize WIPO arbitration for efficient dispute resolution."]
core_points_en: PCT patent applications grew for the second consecutive year, driven by strong performance in digital technology and semiconductor sectors.
Madrid trademark applications slightly decreased, with the United States leading filings while L’Oréal maintained its top position globally.
Hague design system registrations surged by 9.4%, with China remaining the top filer, followed closely by Germany and the United States.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage the Hague System's growth to expedite overseas industrial design protection for high-value products.
Practice note: Monitor digital patent competition in Europe and the US to strengthen core R&D and establish early warning systems.
What to monitor: Optimize global brand strategies amidst trademark volume fluctuations and utilize WIPO arbitration for efficient dispute resolution.

items.title: EU General Court confirms IMPRESS is a laudatory trademark
items.title_zh: 欧盟普通法院确认IMPRESS商标因具褒义性被驳回
items.title_en: EU General Court Confirms IMPRESS Is a Laudatory Mark Lacking Distinctiveness
items.summary: Discover why the IMPRESS trademark was rejected as laudatory in the EU and the challenges of establishing distinctiveness in such cases.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年3月11日，欧盟普通法院在T326/25号案件中维持EUIPO决定，驳回美国Kiss Nail Products公司“IMPRESS”商标注册申请。法院认定该词在第3类和第8类美容美甲产品上仅被视为对效果的褒义描述，缺乏显著性。尽管褒义标语可注册，但需具备原创性或引发认知过程，而本案标志仅为普通广告信息。
items.ai_summary_en: The EU General Court upheld the EUIPO’s refusal to register the word mark IMPRESS for cosmetic products and manicure tools. The Court confirmed that the term is perceived by the relevant public as a laudatory message promising strong, long-lasting, and favorable results regarding appearance improvement. Consequently, the sign fails to function as an indicator of commercial origin under Article 7(1)(b) of the EU Trademark Regulation. The judgment reinforces that even weak distinctiveness is insufficient if the primary perception remains purely promotional. This decision highlights the strict application of absolute grounds for refusal when marks consist of advertising slogans or quality indications directly related to the goods' intended effects.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了褒义性商标在欧盟注册的严格界限：仅有弱显著性不足够，必须证明标志超越普通广告语并引发公众认知努力。企业在选择描述性词汇作为商标时，需警惕其被直接视为质量承诺或效果宣传，从而因缺乏固有显著性而被驳回，除非能证明其具有独特的原创表达。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling underscores the high threshold for registering laudatory terms as trademarks within the EU jurisdiction. Practitioners should note that signs functioning primarily as advertising slogans or quality indicators face significant hurdles under Article 7(1)(b). Even if a mark possesses some minimal distinctive elements, it may still be refused if the dominant impression remains promotional. Companies must carefully evaluate whether proposed marks convey direct messages about product efficacy rather than serving as unique identifiers of commercial origin to avoid similar refusals during examination proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟普通法院维持驳回，认定IMPRESS在美容产品上仅传达强力持久效果承诺，属纯褒义描述", "法院重申显著性评估须结合具体商品及相关公众感知，缺乏显著性即便仅存在于部分欧盟地区也可…", "褒义商标若仅构成普通广告信息而无原创性或需解读的认知过程，则无法满足注册的实质性条件"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EU General Court upheld the EUIPO's rejection of the IMPRESS mark for lack of distinctive character in classes 3 and 8.", "The Court found IMPRESS to be purely laudatory, signaling a promise of strong and favorable aesthetic results to consumers.", "Distinctiveness is assessed against the specific goods and public perception, requiring more than just weak differentiation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["褒义性词汇在美容护理等注重效果的品类中极易被认定为缺乏显著性的广告语", "司法实践强调商标需具备原创性或引发认知过程，单纯的效果承诺难以获准注册", "需持续观察法院对‘弱显著性’与‘纯褒义’之间界限的具体个案认定标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid selecting marks that directly describe or praise product efficacy, as they are likely to be deemed non-distinctive.", "Practice note: Conduct thorough distinctiveness assessments focusing on the average consumer's perception of laudatory language.", "What to monitor: Monitor CJEU and General Court trends regarding the boundary between descriptive, laudatory, and distinctive signs."]
core_points_en: The EU General Court upheld the EUIPO's rejection of the IMPRESS mark for lack of distinctive character in classes 3 and 8.
The Court found IMPRESS to be purely laudatory, signaling a promise of strong and favorable aesthetic results to consumers.
Distinctiveness is assessed against the specific goods and public perception, requiring more than just weak differentiation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid selecting marks that directly describe or praise product efficacy, as they are likely to be deemed non-distinctive.
Practice note: Conduct thorough distinctiveness assessments focusing on the average consumer's perception of laudatory language.
What to monitor: Monitor CJEU and General Court trends regarding the boundary between descriptive, laudatory, and distinctive signs.

items.title: Illustration très concrète de la mauvaise foi lors du dépôt de marque
items.title_zh: 商标注册恶意认定的具体实例：TOGG商标被撤销
items.title_en: Paris Court Annuls TOGG Trademark Registration Due to Applicant Bad Faith
items.summary: Par Maître Jessica SANDOWSKI, Avocate (CA de Paris, Pôle 5 – Ch. 2, 19 décembre 2025, n°24/10600) Le 19 décembre 2025, la cour d’appel de Paris, infirmant une décision de l’INPI, a annulé la marque française TOGG, déposée par un particulier, en raison de la mauvaise foi de celui-ci lors du dépôt. Elle a, pour […] L’article Illustration très concrète de la mauvaise foi lors du dépôt de marque est apparu en premier sur BLIP! .
items.ai_summary_zh: 2025年12月19日，巴黎上诉法院推翻法国国家工业产权局（INPI）决定，裁定撤销一名个人注册的法国“TOGG”商标。法院认定该申请人在提交商标注册申请时存在恶意行为，因此宣告该商标无效。
items.ai_summary_en: On December 19, 2025, the Paris Court of Appeal issued a significant ruling in case number 24/10600, overturning a prior decision by the French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI). The court ordered the cancellation of the French trademark TOGG, which had been registered by an individual applicant. The judicial body determined that the registration was filed in bad faith, constituting a clear violation of trademark law principles. This decision highlights the judiciary's active role in scrutinizing the intent behind trademark applications. By reversing the INPI's initial acceptance, the court reinforced the legal standards required for valid trademark acquisition. The ruling serves as a concrete illustration of how bad faith is assessed and penalized during the registration process, ensuring that the trademark system is not abused by applicants acting with improper motives or deceptive intentions against established market players.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了法国法院在商标异议或无效程序中认定“恶意”的具体司法实践。需关注法院如何结合客观事实推断申请人主观状态，以及此类判例对后续类似非正常申请案件的参照意义。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment underscores the critical importance of demonstrating good faith during trademark filings in France. Rights holders should be aware that national courts actively review the subjective intent of applicants, particularly when marks coincide with well-known foreign brands. For brand owners, this precedent strengthens the ability to challenge squatters or opportunistic registrants who lack genuine commercial intent. Legal teams must gather robust evidence of the applicant's knowledge and lack of legitimate interest to succeed in bad faith claims. Monitoring new filings for potential conflicts with existing global portfolios remains essential, as early opposition based on bad faith can prevent costly enforcement actions later in the lifecycle of the mark.
